Fellow Conservative, This week, I issued a subpoena to FBI Director Christopher Wray for an FD-1023 form that a whistleblower said links Joe Biden to a criminal scheme.
We’ve been wondering why so many foreign nationals paid the Bidens so much money, and we could be very close to finding out.
**This FD-1023 form that the FBI has links Joe Biden himself to a criminal scheme involving money for policy decisions during his vice presidency.**
It is with a heavy heart that I fear our Commander-in-Chief may be compromised by foreign actors, and I’m going to do everything in my power to deliver the whole truth to the American people.
These revelations destroy the Democrat’s and media’s false narrative about Joe Biden and his family, and they are going to fight until the end to stop me from exposing their lies.
I am under constant attack, and they are only going to intensify as I get closer to providing Americans the facts. **[My only defense is fighting back and defending my integrity and credibility, and I rely on grassroots conservatives to help me do that. ](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=259b857aada14fdebe3082d2452af3b0&_e=h624fDRcYCiFCIQ8qG3kS97HY-7XNwum4gZZnj5zIoP-U21tMncUAAzqLsXmF_EsmR9FXwYk2kjd7rt6HF_1yqbw9HrcQf2AOeyZbhVRULR0pKQ8kIu5v9m8i-d99d6Lv8tVrLbvx_mo1uro2IlxrwJGzfiVIZnlgBwgFikZ7A3EmTMpWOq0-Igpr9SooXIMBLTU6AJaDbaraTYT0f8wPgAjVdP0pmejAch25ecXGv20HAqsy3hYTahorn_3_ESMahqp_GCUXsJCAsCGBLb3F0PbeuMdyu_vAjvEMoSFlwuag9qnKKdPiMVJp2lmNPq6k9UvMHnjPJ0J64vWDw8r5UlfeJCR3zmOYBrobt67Z0KhwrEMDpYWKTgeSn8DSxiuLG3TpSgxMEuZABlmCaaFPA%3D%3D)**
| [ **DEFEND COMER** ](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=259b857aada14fdebe3082d2452af3b0&_e=h624fDRcYCiFCIQ8qG3kS97HY-7XNwum4gZZnj5zIoP-U21tMncUAAzqLsXmF_EsmR9FXwYk2kjd7rt6HF_1yqbw9HrcQf2AOeyZbhVRULR0pKQ8kIu5v9m8i-d99d6Lv8tVrLbvx_mo1uro2IlxrwJGzfiVIZnlgBwgFikZ7A3EmTMpWOq0-Igpr9SooXIMBLTU6AJaDbaraTYT0f8wPgAjVdP0pmejAch25ecXGv20HAqsy3hYTahorn_3_ESMHiwu6J-evb0cW5eki4E4N893Sh6XTBGBRgPjr8evxWepduZj_opUA9eoShdb33dAZ8foc4K8utRDamPxtn72WFYynosdoROa_pMUEyeqQtdk09zyrcTBH_ykar74ZJpV2ogf2M3Nafys4rRIxbW3tg%3D%3D)

Like I’ve said before, county boys from West Kentucky are a tough breed, _**we don’t back down and we don’t cave to pressure from high and mighty big city liberals on cable TV.**_
But that’s not going to stop the folks in the mainstream media from attacking me and trying to destroy the credibility of my work and the good name I’ve spent an honest life building.
**[So please, if you’re able, chip in a couple bucks so my team and I can mount a defense to the onslaught of attacks that have already begun.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=259b857aada14fdebe3082d2452af3b0&_e=h624fDRcYCiFCIQ8qG3kS97HY-7XNwum4gZZnj5zIoP-U21tMncUAAzqLsXmF_EsmR9FXwYk2kjd7rt6HF_1yqbw9HrcQf2AOeyZbhVRULR0pKQ8kIu5v9m8i-d99d6Lv8tVrLbvx_mo1uro2IlxrwJGzfiVIZnlgBwgFikZ7A3EmTMpWOq0-Igpr9SooXIMBLTU6AJaDbaraTYT0f8wPgAjVdP0pmejAch25ecXGv20HAqsy3hYTahorn_3_ESMlWE2nrck4VQ-HNZWayY3-bgEqZudMIF04nx8GINhEa0s67l3Wbd3gslqpEtBgdFLBMjtU0zBMUQrovAI0lQyLY5bCY-mOng-7xlOHp5XhqMEJPUzBPq2in3mOpcdwQ95SLGuv8mZvEqrDjyApVbyHA%3D%3D)**

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: **Katie Hill** <[team@her-time.com](mailto:team@her-time.com)>
Date: Thur, May 11, 2023
Subject: BREAKING: The Senate Judiciary Committee just passed the SHIELD Act
To: <dpwillis67@gmail.com>
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63167989/405812990/-1193769910?refcode=AU_HTP_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20230511_PM2_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiM2IzMzhhZmYtNTlmMC1lZDExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=yO_rF0e6MAf9NIB69RXiqUUzxRl0E7LboZQKdHQ-eeY=)
BREAKING news, Peter: The _SHIELD Act_ was just passed out of committee by a bipartisan, unanimous vote.
The _SHIELD Act_ would**FINALLY** make image-based sexual abuse, including so-called “revenge porn,” a federal crime. It’s just common sense.
This is an issue very personal to me, and it has been one of my number one legislative priorities since stepping away from Congress. Now, we’re closer than ever before to seeing this bill signed into law.
[_**It’s critical that we build on this momentum and push the entire Senate to approve the _SHIELD Act_ while we have their attention. clean_body: | Hey Peter, did you see Katie’s note from earlier today? The SHIELD Act , one of HER Time’s #1 legislative priorities, passed out of the Senate Judiciary Committee by unanimous vote. The bill’s co-author, Senator Amy Klobuchar, even thanked Katie for her tireless advocacy: = This would have likely never happened without the work Katie and HER Time have been doing behind the scenes to push legislators on this critical issue — and that work wouldn’t have been possible without your support. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thanks, Peter. — HER Time \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Katie Hill <mailto:team@her-time.com> Date: Thur, May 11, 2023 Subject: BREAKING: The Senate Judiciary Committee just passed the SHIELD Act To: <dpwillis67@gmail.com> = BREAKING news, Peter: The SHIELD Act was just passed out of committee by a bipartisan, unanimous vote. The SHIELD Act wouldFINALLY make image-based sexual abuse, including so-called “revenge porn,” a federal crime. It’s just common sense. This is an issue very personal to me, and it has been one of my number one legislative priorities since stepping away from Congress. Now, we’re closer than ever before to seeing this bill signed into law. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = | = = | = = Thanks for all your support over the years. body:
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8599?refcode=EM_NBI_OR_20230511_FR_Philly_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Philly&t=1009&akid=4268%2E5885482%2EnErQ6Q ][IMG]

Peter Willis,

With just five days to go, Our Revolution
has a real shot to elect former teacher and union organizer Helen Gym as
the next Mayor of Philadelphia!

On the heels of electing Brandon Johnson to be Mayor of Chicago, Bernie
Sanders, AOC, and Our Revolution members are rallying in Philly this
weekend to help Helen win what polling shows will be a razor-thin race.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8599?refcode=EM_NBI_OR_20230511_FR_Philly_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Philly&t=1010&akid=4268%2E5885482%2EnErQ6Q ]Our Revolution has over 40,000 supporters in Philadelphia, and with
polls showing a deadlocked race, everything will come down to turnout. We
need to raise another $14,503 to fund our final push to get out the vote
through phone banks and other voter outreach. Can we count on you to pitch
in?

Trump 45th President of the United States Contributions to Trump Save America JFC are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. subject: Most don't know this about Memorial Day

Peter, It’s Gary Sinise here. You may know me from my roles in movies like _Apollo 13 _and _The Green Mile _or the CBS television series _CSI NY_ — but it was in 1994 and playing the role of Lt. Dan in _Forrest Gump,_ that my life changed and inspired my enduring connection to our defenders, veterans, and first responders. **This year, I’m honored to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal for the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C.** The National Memorial Day Parade is an event like no other ... and this year, the American Veterans Center is bringing it BACK in full force, with 5,000+ participants marching down Constitution Avenue before a crowd of 250,000+ in-person, as well as T.V. broadcast that reaches 100 million households around the country. [**Peter, the National Memorial Day Parade is PRIMARILY FUNDED by private contributions, including from generous Americans like you. Will you help chip in today to help support the Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, or more?**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=c2eed8af1adc4b2188e588e710f79c87&_e=cTAsIP1o_xeG4fxVjOvjyMbeijX3We6njAMvs74rMhKxERpHo5JeBAxmRQPkep2Yvb8STHjJ2YZRp_YCqGOu5ccfzfTo6n1nO_UYV8efCG2k4_tIbhZFV8QhHEYLv0XUeKiu00ih8N83YMywLnYXXlNUxNUYJ8DiN3Sboah0Yv-sjGZ8hLxxpBHofYygA8Ajhu7YyuAP36i65LsGQNgzH-XdxAi_NUTGaq8d3pgyD9ct2Vp6yWliroUKl1QbRm23UGwTieTn_Lqkq-vaTcJ0l45OjaSQdMzfwFcWQ3eKAmUe7F2Yy-y0wP3j9UOFePgy)
---
[**Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=c2eed8af1adc4b2188e588e710f79c87&_e=cTAsIP1o_xeG4fxVjOvjyMbeijX3We6njAMvs74rMhKxERpHo5JeBAxmRQPkep2Yvb8STHjJ2YZRp_YCqGOu5ccfzfTo6n1nO_UYV8efCG2k4_tIbhZFV8QhHEYLv0XUeKiu00ih8N83YMywLnYXXlNUxNUYJ8DiN3Sboah0Yv9e6FksjLW21xGY69gABibqH6wLZvOT_6-qQOlfPgomvfRNlYbF6Y-9Lx65uu2BbRYLjqGd8Blub9-WdwU_Rc45aFtImt97d1ziLZzrpBgJy_gTMlVEtqRUcYkulr-JfEcCBYiD9iaz_SbjKEK7YIvc)
---
[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=c2eed8af1adc4b2188e588e710f79c87&_e=cTAsIP1o_xeG4fxVjOvjyMbeijX3We6njAMvs74rMhKxERpHo5JeBAxmRQPkep2Yvb8STHjJ2YZRp_YCqGOu5ccfzfTo6n1nO_UYV8efCG2k4_tIbhZFV8QhHEYLv0XUeKiu00ih8N83YMywLnYXXlNUxNUYJ8DiN3Sboah0Yv90CTMkiSXwhHbnwaoDpdyOy2N2YeWId3c4vk6jAnQAWIHK5ZXEyqXli-VyUltQe6NpxWvsZybIhPM0R9nSniq_lOlT5Afa4A99Jo3jyjI-0PNMO_DVxr6apdjuHmVXwJLjYUPXshFVur8lUMs2RjOr)
---
When the American Veterans Center first called me 18 years ago and invited me to the National Memorial Day Parade, I was honored to join the event to remember our fallen heroes. The American Veterans Center revived the Parade in 2005 after it had been dormant for nearly 70 years. And this year, they’re bringing the Parade back better than ever. Every American should be proud that generations of our brave servicemen and servicewomen, from the last of our “Greatest Generation” heroes of World War II to our veterans from Afghanistan and Iraq, will get the public thanks for their service that they deserve this year. But I know that the defenders and families of the fallen who will join me in the National Memorial Day Parade will be thinking of their friends and loved ones who made the ultimate sacrifice for our country — the brave Americans we honor on Memorial Day. **Sadly, our country is losing hundreds of World War II veterans each day, so the mission of the National Memorial Day Parade is _more important now than ever_ — as this year’s event may be the LAST opportunity for our WWII heroes to commemorate their friends who never came home.** [**Please make your most generous contribution of $25, $50, $75, $150, $250, $500, to support the National Memorial Day Parade and make it the tribute that our nation’s heroes deserve.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=c2eed8af1adc4b2188e588e710f79c87&_e=cTAsIP1o_xeG4fxVjOvjyMbeijX3We6njAMvs74rMhKxERpHo5JeBAxmRQPkep2Yvb8STHjJ2YZRp_YCqGOu5ccfzfTo6n1nO_UYV8efCG2k4_tIbhZFV8QhHEYLv0XUeKiu00ih8N83YMywLnYXXlNUxNUYJ8DiN3Sboah0Yv_pYYvrTAm_hKA3A4xViR_L_uaWqYanyliyjwttvQD8969EqkTnLF-Uhpq8SKwRB9myaxEXcR7lIRaRAtC2U48vPQ5Ku3bkC9E1m2pTxk0TBwzOa_uVN39lPpSiMLb-7e2G_OEzVdCaV4Ef_jIshJma)
---
[**Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=c2eed8af1adc4b2188e588e710f79c87&_e=cTAsIP1o_xeG4fxVjOvjyMbeijX3We6njAMvs74rMhKxERpHo5JeBAxmRQPkep2Yvb8STHjJ2YZRp_YCqGOu5ccfzfTo6n1nO_UYV8efCG2k4_tIbhZFV8QhHEYLv0XUeKiu00ih8N83YMywLnYXXlNUxNUYJ8DiN3Sboah0Yv-KL0xrRPv9n3yhRGh_ohgIucok9czmGiRiCjSKnZzvucyMR_piNwbzwpLJVm1pvOIOOPxiQRLv_okHFuWGMvC1tELR4jVsdSjs90sON_VjIgnrr9sLRD8iJxAwq4agkosxToyzcLfJjxtLscvu4wXD)
---
The National Memorial Day Parade costs a fraction of other major public events to put on each year. In fact, the entire parade costs about as much as just THREE balloons in the Macy’s Thanksgiving Day Parade or TWO floats in the Rose Bowl Parade! _That means that every dollar that’s contributed by a generous American like you makes a difference for this important event._ Your support of the American Veterans Center not only helps the Parade, but also supports great programs like:
* Recording hundreds of oral histories of veterans from World War II to today before we lose these stories forever.

* Holding our National Youth Summit which allows young students a chance to hear firsthand from veterans from WWII, Korea, and Vietnam.

* Producing veteran-focused T.V. documentaries and specials that remind Americans of the price of our freedom.

[**Please join me in support of the National Memorial Day Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, $250, $500, or more right now.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=c2eed8af1adc4b2188e588e710f79c87&_e=cTAsIP1o_xeG4fxVjOvjyMbeijX3We6njAMvs74rMhKxERpHo5JeBAxmRQPkep2Yvb8STHjJ2YZRp_YCqGOu5ccfzfTo6n1nO_UYV8efCG2k4_tIbhZFV8QhHEYLv0XUeKiu00ih8N83YMywLnYXXlNUxNUYJ8DiN3Sboah0Yv-5yD1e_Qe8PkclmJ-poGBBbNTQrIDt6nm3OeyZoxdK2IQM7Akor60ZumUS3SYacSb0Pg6GFFlEGGgMQmxCfa_vWWecGQFio6fKYG54-KTgXUbqe_8AvpSc14r8qj6kf01St1jXco4KKp6S4TdJNB9S) But no matter how much you can give to this important cause, I want to ask something additional of you.

On Memorial Day — this year and every year — please join me in honoring those who made the ultimate sacrifice for our freedoms. Come to the National Memorial Day Parade in D.C. Visit a local veterans’ cemetery. Send a note to a family of the fallen. Or simply take a quiet moment to think about the men and women who gave their lives to defend OUR country. _I believe while we can never do enough to express our gratitude to our defenders, veterans, and first responders, we can always do a little more._ Peter, thank you for your support of America's heroes, and please — [**if you're able, make a gift to help fund the National Memorial Day Parade right now.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=c2eed8af1adc4b2188e588e710f79c87&_e=cTAsIP1o_xeG4fxVjOvjyMbeijX3We6njAMvs74rMhKxERpHo5JeBAxmRQPkep2Yvb8STHjJ2YZRp_YCqGOu5ccfzfTo6n1nO_UYV8efCG2k4_tIbhZFV8QhHEYLv0XUeKiu00ih8N83YMywLnYXXlNUxNUYJ8DiN3Sboah0Yv8Brx6L0HQWHYakGNZ_rdYsZHN1TmJBTB6_WghHc-gZ4SpPyWmbcKlbeQ6Q4D9vQYvT1G5PNxA1tLn6AcyIU1m19urVXtoyCySIgnGdAwz5z-xezVkUmcE4wgq0tEYKJj9qSdmXSZSmsH7KTc7bzbPO)
---
Sincerely,

Gary Sinise
Honorary Grand Marshal
National Memorial Day Parade
---
[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=c2eed8af1adc4b2188e588e710f79c87&_e=cTAsIP1o_xeG4fxVjOvjyMbeijX3We6njAMvs74rMhKxERpHo5JeBAxmRQPkep2Yvb8STHjJ2YZRp_YCqGOu5ccfzfTo6n1nO_UYV8efCG2k4_tIbhZFV8QhHEYLv0XUeKiu00ih8N83YMywLnYXXlNUxNUYJ8DiN3Sboah0Yv_Sm7zTag5kAiLLMtryzQ_FPAYLnlafAFPS1MdPpgdZetwX0WaPTkcGIZjTgwH4EI3NKuA2yyJDSGlGpoH3-s4jG8gvtHL1VNnAWtaR3wsZUugkHNjFc76lEc4NAApHYj1nptgEJ2SyqkOLZ3aiDnwW)

Every Republican president since 1988 has been elected without winning the popular vote, all thanks to the Electoral College.

_**It’s the reason Trump took office, and it let him nearly stage a coup in 2021!**_

Luckily, Democrats like Pete Buttigieg, Amy Klobuchar, and Robert Reich are trying to ABOLISH the Electoral College once and for all!

name: Ro Khanna (Our Revolution)
subject: Healthcare is a human right
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

Peter Willis,

The leading cause of bankruptcy for families
in our country is medical debt, affecting more than 100 million people.

Every American deserves the medical care they need without risking
financial ruin. That’s why I’m working with Our Revolution on solutions to
our broken healthcare system that puts profits over real people's lives.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/signup/medical_debt_sv/?source=EM_NBI_OR_20230511_SV_MedicalDebt_0_3MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_MedicalDebt&t=1011&akid=4267%2E5885482%2ES-1Q9c ]Have you or someone you know dealing with the crushing weight of
medical debt? Please share your story with us today →

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/signup/medical_debt_sv/?source=EM_NBI_OR_20230511_SV_MedicalDebt_0_3MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_MedicalDebt&t=1012&akid=4267%2E5885482%2ES-1Q9c ]SHARE YOUR STORY

Medical debt should not exist in our country.

The United States is the wealthiest country in the world, yet every day
Americans struggle with the burden of medical debt because of the
predatory practices of our healthcare system. As the industry rakes in
record-breaking profits year after year, families have to choose between
making collection payments and putting food on the table.

Healthcare is a basic human right.

It is un-American to continue allowing people to face such extreme
consequences for getting sick at no fault of their own.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/signup/medical_debt_sv/?source=EM_NBI_OR_20230511_SV_MedicalDebt_0_3MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_MedicalDebt&t=1013&akid=4267%2E5885482%2ES-1Q9c ]Please consider sharing your thoughts and experiences on medical debt
here.

When we organize, we win.

Ro Khanna

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

name: American Defense News
subject: Study Ancient Christianity
body:
I’ve always been fascinated by the story of the earliest Christians.

This sponsored message from American Defense News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z8353a5arvq5nnn2pek16ecbpcrhrv2pt8ucdva0_rp22sh2s8i66o76c3geaor1chh2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend,

I've always been fascinated by the story of the earliest Christians.

I wanted to learn more about how they worshipped and prayed, faced persecution and hardship, and settled theological disputes.

But, beyond reading the New Testament and some of the stories of early Christian martyrs, it was daunting to figure out how to proceed. I always got lost in foreign names and locations and the complicated history of Imperial Rome. The result was a large gap in my understanding of how the Christian faith took shape and spread from the apostles through the age of Constantine.

To uncover this fascinating history, we've produced our newest online course, "Ancient Christianity," which we'll release on May 23.

In this course, Professor Kenneth Calvert is your guide through the first four centuries of Christianity as he explains the remarkable ways the new faith transformed the Roman world.

**You can watch the video trailer for the course and preregister today using the secure link below:

** [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z253u1gfaligmg2q92vact5nrtmj6ebcuntk4sd8_rp22sh2s8i66o76c3geaor1chh2bs)
[**https://online.hillsdale.edu/landing/ancient-christianity/prereg**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zulb8b8pueldlcor36jg8vdt00gldo8hjlig4avg_rp22sh2s8i66o76c3geaor1chh2bs)

I hope you join us in learning more about the courage and faith of the first Christians.

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

American Defense News
---

name: Alan Keck
subject: T-minus 5️⃣ days!
body:
Would you sign a pledge of support for Team Keck? And tell us ‘why’ so my team and I know where we need to spend these last few days!
[](https://keckforkentucky.cmail19.com/t/y-l-pjitkc-dytiuyidkd-r/) It's been a long six months since we launched our campaign for governor of Kentucky-_but time flies when you 're having fun,_ _**and boy have these six months flown right by. Together, your support is the reason I 've been able to add thousands of miles to the odometer, shaking just as many hands along the way. **_**_But we 're now just FIVE days from the primary election,_** and while I'm not asking for your time, talent or treasure-_I am going to ask if I can count on your vote at the ballot box._ [__**Would you sign a pledge of support for Team Keck? And tell us 'why' so my team and I know where we need to spend these last few days!**__](https://keckforkentucky.cmail19.com/t/y-l-pjitkc-dytiuyidkd-j/) [✅ PLEDGE YOUR SUPPORT FOR TEAM KECK](https://keckforkentucky.cmail19.com/t/y-l-pjitkc-dytiuyidkd-t/) We're so close to making history in the Commonwealth-_so close to ending the status quo that sees career politicians taking turns at higher office,_ instead of finding who's best for the role, best for the moment, and best for the Commonwealth. _**What Kentucky needs now is less of that status quo, and more of something a bit different. A governor with a track record of successes in both the private and public sector -a governor who won't kowtow to special interests, or a national party. **_ [✅ PLEDGE YOUR SUPPORT FOR TEAM KECK](https://keckforkentucky.cmail19.com/t/y-l-pjitkc-dytiuyidkd-i/) **_I 'm proud to have proven myself to be that diamond-in-the-rough candidate, because Kentucky ideas can solve Kentucky's problems,_** and that's precisely the kind of homebred policymaking that's turned my hometown of Somerset around. _**It 's about time the same be said for Kentucky.**_ [__**With your pledge and your vote, that and more is possible.**__](https://keckforkentucky.cmail19.com/t/y-l-pjitkc-dytiuyidkd-d/) [✅ PLEDGE YOUR SUPPORT FOR TEAM KECK](https://keckforkentucky.cmail19.com/t/y-l-pjitkc-dytiuyidkd-h/) God Bless. [](https://keckforkentucky.cmail19.com/t/y-l-pjitkc-dytiuyidkd-k/) [](https://keckforkentucky.cmail19.com/t/y-l-pjitkc-dytiuyidkd-u/) Alan Keck ### | [Unsubscribe](https://keckforkentucky.cmail19.com/t/y-u-pjitkc-dytiuyidkd-o/)
---
clean_body: Would you sign a pledge of support for Team Keck? And tell us ‘why’ so my team and I know where we need to spend these last few days! It's been a long six months since we launched our campaign for governor of Kentucky-but time flies when you 're having fun, and boy have these six months flown right by. Together, your support is the reason I 've been able to add thousands of miles to the odometer, shaking just as many hands along the way. But we 're now just FIVE days from the primary election, and while I'm not asking for your time, talent or treasure-I am going to ask if I can count on your vote at the ballot box. We're so close to making history in the Commonwealth-so close to ending the status quo that sees career politicians taking turns at higher office, instead of finding who's best for the role, best for the moment, and best for the Commonwealth. What Kentucky needs now is less of that status quo, and more of something a bit different. A governor with a track record of successes in both the private and public sector -a governor who won't kowtow to special interests, or a national party. I 'm proud to have proven myself to be that diamond-in-the-rough candidate, because Kentucky ideas can solve Kentucky's problems, and that's precisely the kind of homebred policymaking that's turned my hometown of Somerset around. It 's about time the same be said for Kentucky._ God Bless. Alan Keck ### |

name: Kevin McCarthy
subject: Should I put you down for Option 1 or Option 2?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McCarthy for Congress
body:
As Speaker of the House, I need to know.

| |
---
| | | Biden renewed his push for mass amnesty of millions of illegal immigrants in his State of the Union speech - including the more than 5 MILLION he's ushered in under his administration.
As Speaker of the House, I need to know. Where do you stand on Biden's Mass-Amnesty plan?
**Option 1: We surrender to Biden 's Open-Borders agenda, and allow him to legalize millions of illegal immigrants.**

name: =?UTF-8?B?SGlsbHNkYWxlIENvbGxlZ2UgdmlhIOKYhkNJ?=
subject: Study Ancient Christianity
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vsLvlpcDNF

I've always been fascinated by the story of the earliest
Christians.

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/osLvlpcDNF

Please see a special message from our
sponsor:

Dear
Friend,

I've
always been fascinated by the story of the earliest Christians.

I wanted
to learn more about how they worshipped and prayed, faced
persecution and hardship, and settled theological disputes.

But,
beyond reading the New Testament and some of the stories of early
Christian martyrs, it was daunting to figure out how to proceed.
I always got lost in foreign names and locations and the
complicated history of Imperial Rome. The result was a large gap
in my understanding of how the Christian faith took shape and
spread from the apostles through the age of Constantine.

To
uncover this fascinating history, we've produced our newest
online course, "Ancient Christianity," which we'll release on May
23.

In this
course, Professor Kenneth Calvert is your guide through the first
four centuries of Christianity as he explains the remarkable ways
the new faith transformed the Roman world.

You can
watch the video trailer for the course and preregister today
using the secure link below:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61794999:sLvlpcDNF:m:3:2532013465:9B7E07B8BDFBFBD934D0C186138C263B:r

I hope
you join us in learning more about the courage and faith of the
first Christians.

Best
regards,

Kyle
Murnen, '09
Director
of Online Learning
Hillsdale
College

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com
You were added to the system January 18, 2022.
For more information please follow the URL below:

subject: Gaining momentum
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vivek 2024
body:
Here’s what the latest polling says among likely Republican Voters...

|
New CBS News Poll
[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c666254%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ZtT%2bS1N50g0IswpQBpKoJg&sysid=1)
The latest polling shows that we're TIED with Vice President Mike Pence.

Even the mainstream media is noticing our movement. They are feeling the _**Ramaswamy TSUNAMI.**_

Fellow American, we've got to continue to build this momentum ahead of the August presidential debate.

To secure a prominent spot on the debate stage, we must show strong polling numbers (_which are steadily climbing_) and unique, grassroots donors.

I am on the campaign trail EVERY DAY to meet voters, I am taking the debate to CNN (_bye Don Lemon_) and Chuck Todd. **I could really use your help in securing new donors before May 9th.**

**We've set an aggressive goal of unique donors and only have ONE WEEK to get there.**

I am looking to you to help today. **[Any amount you give will help us achieve this goal- even just $1 or $5.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c666265%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=BVcpwzSBYBOAzNkrYigYQA&sysid=1)**

| [Chip in $1 ➔](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c666266%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2fRZpNAOjGySlBvmx1L5cug&sysid=1) | | [Chip in $5 ➔](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c666267%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=fgncB%2bs1P4Tl5DJMGJt61A&sysid=1)
---|---|---
[Chip in $10 ➔](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c666268%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=1ifV%2fsTOljQjRftVNEh8kw&sysid=1) | | [Chip in $24 ➔](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c666269%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=BcOmErDBT1I%2fGJIoJSLH5g&sysid=1)

We cannot afford to let the recent polling momentum we've built teeter out. **[Help however you can, Fellow American.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c666260%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=q2Lrhb2BuTRmxydxz%2b4L8Q&sysid=1)**

Thanks,

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c666254%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ZtT%2bS1N50g0IswpQBpKoJg&sysid=1)
Vivek Ramaswamy

[** JOIN THE MOVEMENT → **](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c666261%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=vsqP1ONaSo5SRVmmhMWNXQ&sysid=1)
---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[ ** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c666262%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=A4q2r6deLcP8HWTMq8yq3Q&sysid=1)

---

| [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c666263%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=y4%2fIHxY2Z4ZpTBFBmsQEGw&sysid=1) | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c666264%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=pmQgmQ5umxZbrJ9WdfPHtA&sysid=1) | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c666275%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Uz7lpsN3ihnjJdfJoLJBfA&sysid=1)
---|---|---

name: Vikram Mansharamani
subject: Kelly Ayotte and Vikram Mansharamani - NAVIGATING UNCERTAINTY
body:
Podcast, radio show, conversations...
| | | |
---
# Former US Senator Kelly Ayotte...
---
In this week's episode, Dr. Mansharamani had a wide-ranging conversation with Former US Senator Kelly Ayotte. The episode will be aired on The Pulse of New Hampshire this weekend and is available on the Pulse of New Hampshire app or wherever you get your podcasts (links to several sites are at the end of this email).
---
---

EPISODE 9: FORMER US SENATOR KELLY AYOTTE
Former US Senator Kelly Ayotte joins Dr. Mansharamani in the most recent episode of Navigating Uncertainty to share insights learned along her journey from Nashua to Washington DC and back to New Hampshire. They discuss her time in the courtroom (both as a litigator at McLane Middleton and later as NH's attorney general) and her path to elected politics. She also reveals her love of ice cream (particularly chocolate chip) and her thinking about the greatest challenges facing the United States and New Hampshire.
---
EPISODE 8: NCUA VICE CHAIR KYLE HAUPTMAN
Last week, Dr. Mansharamani speaks with Kyle Hauptman, Vice Chair of the National Credit Union Administration. Kyle discusses his time growing up as a "townie" in a place where people use "summer" as a verb, the perspective he gained from his front-row seat at the implosion of Lehman Brothers, his more recent entrance into the world of politics and policy, and his love of movies.
---
EPISODE 7: MAYOR FRANCIS SUAREZ
In the seventh episode, Dr. Mansharamani speaks with Miami Mayor Francis Suarez. Mayor Suarez shares what it was like growing up as the oldest of four children and his path to being elected with 86% of the vote. They discuss how the Mayor navigated his career decisions, his approach to governance, his vision for America, and his love of New Hampshire (yes, New Hampshire!) barbecue.
---
EPISODE 6: GOVERNOR CHRIS SUNUNU
In the sixth episode, Dr. Mansharamani speaks with Chris Sununu, Governor of the State of New Hampshire. Governor Sununu shares what it was like growing up as the seventh of eight children as well as a bit about his time at MIT. They discuss how the Governor navigated his early career decisions, the three ingredients he believes are responsible for New Hampshire's successes, and why he now prefers french toast to pancakes.
---
EPISODE 5: COMMISSIONER FRANK EDELBLUT
In the fifth episode of Navigating Uncertainty, Dr. Mansharamani speaks with Frank Edelblut, Commissioner of Education for the State of New Hampshire. An accountant turned successful businessman, Commissioner Edelblut shared how he has navigated uncertainty in his personal life as well as his thinking around several important education topics. Topics addressed include charter schools, education financing, parental rights, and the increasing importance of lifelong learning.
---

EPISODE 4: COMMISSIONER TAYLOR CASWELL
In the fourth episode of Navigating Uncertainty, Dr. Mansharamani speaks with Commissioner Taylor Caswell, head of the Department of Business and Economic Affairs for the State of New Hampshire. A native of Littleton, Commissioner Caswell shared his philosophy around navigating a career in the public and private sectors, his hopes for a restoration of civil civic engagement, and his love of the outdoors (and cookies)!
---

EPISODE 3: VIVEK RAMASWAMY
In episode three, Dr. Mansahramani speaks with entrepreneur, one-time stand up comic, and prolific author Vivek Ramaswamy about the American dream and what it was like growing up in Ohio. In addition to exploring the power of annoyance, they discuss the key decisions that took Vivek from the Ivy League to a very successful biotech company (with a stint as a comedian along the way)...and his recent announcement to enter the US Presidential contest as part of his quest to help restore an American identity.
---
EPISODE 2: GENERAL LORI ROBINSON
In the second episode, Dr. Mansharamani speaks with General Lori Robinson, USAF (Ret), a New Hampshire native who served as the Commander of North American Aerospace Defense Command (NORAD). General Robinson was also America's first female Combatant Commander and served as head of Northern Command. She is an awesome leader, dedicated America who has served the United States for decades, and all around amazing person. She has also faced (and successfully navigated) many forms of uncertainty on her path to becoming a four-star general.
---
EPISODE 1: MIKE ROGERS
In the first episode, Dr. Mansharamani speaks with Mike Rogers, former chair of the House Permanent Select Committee on Intelligence, and former multi-term Congressman from Michigan. Mike served in the military and also fought organized crime as a member of the Federal Bureau of Investigation. He's a class act, a first-rate thinker, and a patriotic American who cares deeply about the United States and its future.

---
| |
---
---
|
---
|
Navigating Uncertainty is a show in which acclaimed global trend-watcher and futurist [Vikram Mansharamani](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001J_NCf23fVQP_n2nlpprQOJFTRQ25O95r4oa9RD9kutWUpbxSlP-b7b2ycgcOz2ODgzq3nl7TQiiQ_dZs8nQqV-8P5eiipYeZgSOVA7-4Mk5nk0BDvH9fTye7BOQMTQx-gIqAPnunXSiCjHHdR10CQQ==&c=pomRUY0nnNEt73hjDJPg-0j9bpYvXl4wU2kb76ai8NrsGCYOAEb3NA==&ch=PAMjGWoPVsjqBYW7480Rg4mDakWPKppVYaZOvjdvl-Z78JcG0V-AWA==) dives into how leaders make decisions. Through long-form conversations that move beyond sound-bites, Dr. Mansharamani explores how some of the most successful people think about tough choices. Serious, irreverent, entertaining, heart-warming, and occasionally tear-jerking, Navigating Uncertainty offers listeners bite-sized authentic biographies of high-impact leaders from all walks of life.Weekly episodes are released every Thursday via Apple Podcast, Spotify and everywhere podcasts are generally available!
To learn more about Dr. Mansharamani, please visit his website at [www.mansharamani.com](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001J_NCf23fVQP_n2nlpprQOJFTRQ25O95r4oa9RD9kutWUpbxSlP-b7b2ycgcOz2ODgzq3nl7TQiiQ_dZs8nQqV-8P5eiipYeZgSOVA7-4Mk5nk0BDvH9fTye7BOQMTQx-gIqAPnunXSiCjHHdR10CQQ==&c=pomRUY0nnNEt73hjDJPg-0j9bpYvXl4wU2kb76ai8NrsGCYOAEb3NA==&ch=PAMjGWoPVsjqBYW7480Rg4mDakWPKppVYaZOvjdvl-Z78JcG0V-AWA==).

name: Great America Update
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future.

This sponsored message from Great America Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c79290%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=zEclYb1cbN8ljJjeQBIDCA&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c79291%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=TJ8WHnR1gTMBS%2fb2hRAkBg&sysid=1) For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale’s American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c79291%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=TJ8WHnR1gTMBS%2fb2hRAkBg&sysid=1) And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

Great American Update

clean_body: It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. This sponsored message from Great America Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a National Survey on Presidential Selection. By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the National Survey on Presidential Selection by using the link below: For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty. This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include: Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;” Reaching over six million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty; Promoting constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people; Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and Restoring excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale’s American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers. subject: Banks Collapsing... Former President Arrested... What’s Next?
body:
We keep saying it...Because it's true.

| Dear Reader, We keep saying it... Because it's true. It doesn't matter what cycles through the news... Like former President Trump being arrested in New York Or how the market reacts... Market Wizard Larry Benedict continues to generate wins for his subscribers. What's his secret? He doesn't invest the traditional way... He doesn't "buy and hold." And he doesn't trade the way a traditional broker would tell you to. Larry's been using this type of strategy for decades. As a hedge fund manager, it helped him deliver $95 million to his clients during the 2008 financial crisis. And now Larry's revealing his unique trading strategy - including a 10-second demo of him in action. If you've been losing money in the markets... name: Senator Amanda Chase
subject: Thank you to those who have given already. I still need your help. Please chip in $100 today.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Amanda Chase
body:
Please chip in $100 today
| | | |
---
|
---
---
| |
---
| Friend could you please quickly make a $100 donation right now?
---
| Thank you to those who have chipped in already. Please donate today so we can reach voters in these final weeks
---
| |
---

Friend Thanks to those of you who answered my call to donate so that we can get our commercial ads up and running. They have been produced. We've raised about $2500 through email alone, but we still need more to move forward.
Could you please make a $100 donation today or give what you can to get me over the finish line?
Successful campaigns are expensive. It costs money to reach voters through mail, radio and TV. And you know I'm not funded from the deep pockets of lobbyists and PACs. I work for you.
I've been going door to door most every day. I'm amazed at the number of people who still don't know there's an election going on now through Tuesday, June 20 despite all of our signs, mailers and email blasts. It's amazing.
I'm a fighter for you and I know I can win this re-election fight if everyone gives something. If you can't give $100, please give something. If you can give more, please do. The more you give, the more people I can reach. It's that simple.
The RINO politicians don't want me back in the Virginia Senate representing you. They want a puppet they can control. Look no further than my opponent's campaign finance report to figure out who they will work for.
Thanks to those of you who answered the call and donated recently. I know who you are and I thank you for your faithful generosity.
How much does it mean to you to keep your conservative fighter in the Senate? If they silence me, who will fight for you?
And you don't have to live in Senate District 12 to give. You may not be able to vote for me, but I can vote for you. Vote with your dollars.

name: Gary Sinise
subject: The National Memorial Day Parade is back
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9RkZPMzg4NjAifQ/wfsHVzEUwFeYxW-LSOX13A)
---
Fellow American, It's Gary Sinise here. You may know me from my roles in movies like _Apollo 13 _and _The Green Mile _or the CBS television series _CSI NY_ \- but it was in 1994 and playing the role of Lt. Dan in _Forrest Gump,_ that my life changed and inspired my enduring connection to our defenders, veterans, and first responders. **This year, I'm honored to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal for the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C.** The National Memorial Day Parade is an event like no other ... and this year, the American Veterans Center is bringing it BACK in full force, with 5,000+ participants marching down Constitution Avenue before a crowd of 250,000+ in-person, as well as T.V. broadcast that reaches 100 million households around the country. [**Fellow American, the National Memorial Day Parade is PRIMARILY FUNDED by private contributions, including from generous Americans like you. Will you help chip in today to help support the Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, or more?**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9RkZPMzg4NjAifQ/2UcDPv17bcNVVsrQ7_XobA)
---
[**Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9RkZPMzg4NjAifQ/1lkv_JNh8AgwRB2wu4WDKA)
---
[](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9RkZPMzg4NjAifQ/LltEpr27Oa5T9XkOU0aSsg)
---
When the American Veterans Center first called me 18 years ago and invited me to the National Memorial Day Parade, I was honored to join the event to remember our fallen heroes. The American Veterans Center revived the Parade in 2005 after it had been dormant for nearly 70 years. And this year, they're bringing the Parade back better than ever. Every American should be proud that generations of our brave servicemen and servicewomen, from the last of our "Greatest Generation" heroes of World War II to our veterans from Afghanistan and Iraq, will get the public thanks for their service that they deserve this year. But I know that the defenders and families of the fallen who will join me in the National Memorial Day Parade will be thinking of their friends and loved ones who made the ultimate sacrifice for our country - the brave Americans we honor on Memorial Day. **Sadly, our country is losing hundreds of World War II veterans each day, so the mission of the National Memorial Day Parade is _more important now than ever_ \- as this year's event may be the LAST opportunity for our WWII heroes to commemorate their friends who never came home.** [**Please make your most generous contribution of $25, $50, $75, $150, $250, $500, to support the National Memorial Day Parade and make it the tribute that our nation's heroes deserve.**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9RkZPMzg4NjAifQ/ZiEs-QxNNmUf84vHOcyaQA)
---
[**Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9RkZPMzg4NjAifQ/MZTxacwtcnz53yS0ICZFvw)
---
The National Memorial Day Parade costs a fraction of other major public events to put on each year. In fact, the entire parade costs about as much as just THREE balloons in the Macy's Thanksgiving Day Parade or TWO floats in the Rose Bowl Parade! _That means that every dollar that's contributed by a generous American like you makes a difference for this important event._ Your support of the American Veterans Center not only helps the Parade, but also supports great programs like:
* Recording hundreds of oral histories of veterans from World War II to today before we lose these stories forever.

* Holding our National Youth Summit which allows young students a chance to hear firsthand from veterans from WWII, Korea, and Vietnam.

* Producing veteran-focused T.V. documentaries and specials that remind Americans of the price of our freedom.

[**Please join me in support of the National Memorial Day Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, $250, $500, or more right now.**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9RkZPMzg4NjAifQ/ojVapYPn_1TquaiRzPV5-g) But no matter how much you can give to this important cause, I want to ask something additional of you.

On Memorial Day - this year and every year - please join me in honoring those who made the ultimate sacrifice for our freedoms. Come to the National Memorial Day Parade in D.C. Visit a local veterans' cemetery. Send a note to a family of the fallen. Or simply take a quiet moment to think about the men and women who gave their lives to defend OUR country. _I believe while we can never do enough to express our gratitude to our defenders, veterans, and first responders, we can always do a little more._ Fellow American, thank you for your support of America's heroes, and please - [**if you're able, make a gift to help fund the National Memorial Day Parade right now.**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9RkZPMzg4NjAifQ/PMA1flTLaxKMjQLjijKrRQ)
---
Sincerely,

Gary Sinise
Honorary Grand Marshal
National Memorial Day Parade
---
[](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9RkZPMzg4NjAifQ/F1ZDpFWZmyw8fq7-d4FHeA)
---
[**Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9RkZPMzg4NjAifQ/MNZpEj5TAu6F4Nvhm6NxAg)
---
The mission of the American Veterans Center and the World War II Veterans Committee is to preserve and promote the legacy and experiences of America's veterans and active duty service personnel from World War II through today. A non-profit educational organization, the AVC and WWIIVC are funded solely through generous contributions from people like you. All contributions are tax-deductible. © American Veterans Center
1100 N. Glebe Road Suite 910, Arlington, VA 22201
---
Freedom First Project P.O. Box 523692 Springfield, VA 22152If you no longer wish to receive sponsored promotional emails from us [_click here_](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.com/uu/3/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTI2MDY0NDI4MiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMTMyLTA4NTBmYjBlNmExYjQ3NzRhZGZmZmYwODA0MzE5YjAzIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlfQ/cYsZKzfKQN5vj-0sgy_Tpw) to unsubscribe.

name: Defend the Constitution
subject: Banks Collapsing... Former President Arrested... What’s Next?
body:
We keep saying it...Because it's true.

| Dear Reader, We keep saying it... Because it's true. It doesn't matter what cycles through the news... Like former President Trump being arrested in New York Or how the market reacts... subject: Should I put you down for Option 1 or Option 2?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McCarthy for Congress
body:
Biden renewed his push for mass amnesty of millions of illegal immigrants

| |
---
| | | Biden renewed his push for mass amnesty of millions of illegal immigrants in his State of the Union speech - including the more than 5 MILLION he's ushered in under his administration.
As Speaker of the House, I need to know. Where do you stand on Biden's Mass-Amnesty plan?
**Option 1: We surrender to Biden 's Open-Borders agenda, and allow him to legalize millions of illegal immigrants.**

---

I know where I stand: as long as I am Speaker of the House, there will be _NO_ amnesty for illegal immigrants. **[Are you with me?](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=133b7eba3472428d81aad84e4e5ef74e&_e=qGkwcnAklVc5TKlvroof_9mNFFdWxXAcyqAfSHbcZ7fj0CegO25I8jdhK74dRD-cavnFPIYciUTbTzontR4pnvVZ0DvvG8WkPp0L2j1AWGmInaT_hD5avzAP27r1NirDaKWcCKZ-Js0WIlBrO7cYP-PEpgqMz8ADv4VmLafIsRe3iZDvTEBVryql6zmvq31naphVFsCFHHdPgGxpjaIXLym3aA_XpNYp9r34OmU-moeDMsDbDKHkyGazRU5Pm_XPEEMZEdeJRw8Dyuo_Pv2NawD7LRhRMrYhSBVt3YvVDBRzI4diwcKU_ArBtdIeLQWnJXCFh11vdsvPAtBjTXciZv-ujCs60QRTX51s7ODadOhXDf1ekEw2V4gc4d8S-IQwuI6Cn7JtKhB17pWrH7s7dBEihhg6X6wBZile4x-t-T22_Q7Nd248CSH1-Cl9XJc8r0nNo8g-Yzs2T2iOSn0xKg%3D%3D "Are you with me?")** I need you to make your decision ASAP. ## Judge Blocks Honor System at Border
A federal judge [temporarily stopped](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0L2yoyAUAOCnwQ4HDiJaWOwWdtlmZ2dLB-WoJ-EnAyRO3v42t7xv8M33_7bcLHmKxx8bcKp7WuxW6Y2L0FwCB7VA46YdEVA1OMl-UMMopeqac5LC9IPex96CWkfjbG-2UULfgVPaIDY0gQAltAQpBHRjO6waOyvH3up1WA2yTqCjmnJ7TxTribv_pDfmdkuh8dNZ67Mw9YvBzGC-rqt1lvwnWPLtltrXg8Ec8SoMZpsrbR65BGG0FobBPKPDbD2_v9yBnMIzFSy8XolfiA---rQ9-G9yGLl1gSKVmm2lFHlGj7ZQPHigI9tYC__3tz1r8E2e3PMi76n0hnXi-LaEpv6c9xUAAP__kxJyQg) the Biden administration from releasing migrants into the U.S. without a court date. The ruling came hours before the expiration of [Title 42](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLuO2zAQAL9G6tYgl6IlFyrSqLu0KY2VuTI3x4dBLk64vw-c-uoBBoP583H_IElSnr8p86pHvdND5YvvxoNFQHfHMawHM7IbebXXxS03a900xvUx7zdPB_qd_DzPxruAzi9HOB4-BEejrGjQGW_RGoPT7bLsnieytyv5fdlnHibDQbS2y98qRSMf6bt-cbs8ah7TGlVffXC_BtwG3DRylJTebMAt1syFzz7gRiFLka6NVGoZcJuMsdbMkOm7tk_qkKl9duASoB6goolhQjhFIxCc1IqUJxy1QZZno6IdNDLstQVuIB1KVagvfrvHtobXKSlJv87DZJ6Z5H_TqD_v-xcAAP__fXlzQw) (a Covid-era policy that resulted in many migrants being turned away at the southern border). Although the administration is replacing Title 42 with new deportation guidance, huge surges in immigration are happening now to the tune of 10,000 people per day--more than the border infrastructure can handle. In response to already-overloaded border sectors, the head of the U.S. [Border Patrol authorized](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0L1urDAQQOGngW6QPea3oLgN3d42JTJ4vExkMLKHJcnTR0md-jRH39tjflgOfDz_251G8XG2q_CLZtWARkAzY-lGT4RkShp125t-0NrU5TYatF47dKahtu86o5rGu5raQQ9u0J0reUSFRjUatVJYD1W_NFRbPbS2Wfqlo6JW5Fhiqt4jH7KRD5_xRala416GcRM5c2H-FTgVON33Xfn4cdCdf3qB0xkDC6-5wGmJyVGC00qKAdaNyYO9ZIuJvyhDokA2E-z8TPaQDFeGm2WLl8AaryTgrFAGYQkENQIdLpdpdOfNIXBuu6JWz91y-F2Tv6W-AwAA__-mGW2q) the use of _parole release_ : a protocol that allows migrants to enter the country without an alien registration number or court date. Judge T. Kent Wetherell II reversed the authorization, putting a two-week restraining order on the policy.
## New CEO Coming to Twitter
Elon Musk once said that he would hand over the CEO role at Twitter once he found someone "foolish enough to take the job." He's apparently [found someone](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskD1vwyAUAH-N2Yjg8WE8MHTJlq4drQc8ElpsLJvG6r-v0rnj6YaT7uM237DUst7fcSHfc5sx9vKkWRgugYOagSWfiYAUIy-tU26SUmn28IQKZEgIk04Z0ViYhLZORxAhilGx4kGAEkaCFAL0dHHBkEY5WTTBhZEGLSiV3vbLZytrf1CuP-1J-yW2hVX_6H07BvU2wHWAK24rncdLvWDvJVYa4NrP0jvtfPk-vvhKJ4_U-NkWXLkhkGhCwkhydOCyyAmihVErg0lntvu0naXWcthx0OK-YKl_7f7_it8AAAD___TjXps) that meets the criteria: Musk [referred to](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsz79u6yAUgPGngS0RHP5mYLjSFVu6drSwOcS02ETmJFHfvlK7dv6GT7_363RNtdX99pY2DFT6lBaqT5yEOUk4gZqA51AQARXHIK1X_iKl0nwNOTkQ2mfwxuYC2fgFC6Iu1qmcwfAaQIASRoIUAvTl7GeDOsmLTWb2s0OmBeZK_Th_9LrTiqV99Sce56VvvIWV6D6Y-scgMoj0qkS_jUHE1vftMT4ZxEGJHoNBlNZYp53wYJx0AM4opuJg6j8IfoR8f9XW6rCOaXHbUm0_H_qb_R0AAP__bINV8A) the unnamed replacement as "she" and said the hire will be complete in about six weeks. The most likely candidate is Linda Yaccarino, a veteran advertising sales executive for NBCUniversal. Twitter has lost advertising revenue since Musk took over, and shareholders are hopeful that Yaccarino--or someone like her--will [entice advertisers](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsj7FyhCAQQL8GOxxY4MSCIo3dpU3prLicm6DcKDlzf5-51KnfzHvzPq7jFTnzdnvHlUJNZcRY-UGjclKDBDNCM4dEBGQaCvrije-1NrZZgvKdw5koxU5Fm6beKJ9M501vcHYWGw6gwCinQSsFtm_95Mii7i_oJj91JKyimWvZ28_CW10o5Wd50N7GsjY5LLXeD2HeBAwChvM8W_zhcryogOHlFjAoJ2DQIGCoJ9dKu8y8zSifGCPuvBUZqUjKZZPr9_HV7GG-n5wzH5dOWHVbkfNfr_6__xsAAP__Z1Fa3w) to resume buying ad space on the platform.
## Former Marine Charged for NYC Subway Death
A decorated Marine veteran is [being charged](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskL2SpCAcB58GMyz44wcGBpeYzaUXWgg_R2YYsJAb17ffmo037-rq6n-3-WZ88PH-17wwljXNxhb_xixaLomTmqly4woQVIVRdlrpQUrVVNuo13YVpKRepJFAp53oB2hF6FYnLCo_kiAlWklSCGqGWi8tGiOHzrSLXnqwRsD5knL9SD6WDWu40hu5tulVhXErZT-Y-sNoYjSd51nHxUacV8rPD8JoijgPRlNI1gRGkzPRI_AdMV4cXztsgeMl8QXcbibf4biP_JGyM5FHIFzcbumJLQXHHUzZ-JH-Z4uPtVHU9ooYTVUe3X76EPzR9awR95fx4aey_D7tOwAA__8eu29b) with manslaughter by Manhattan DA Alvin Bragg. Daniel Penny was riding a train in NYC when, according to witnesses, a man named Jordan Neely began harassing and aggressively threatening passengers. Penny intervened and subdued the belligerent man with a chokehold, and Neely eventually died. "Daniel never intended to harm Mr. Neely and could not have foreseen his untimely death," Penny's lawyer said in a statement. A [video](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0DGPhCAUBOBfgx0beIjrFhTX0O21V5qHPIVbBSOcG__9xauvmeZLJpP5eg5PjEtM8yeuZOqUBxxrPGgQmkvgoAZovJmIgFRDRna96h9SqrYJBr1y0mmpfdv1nSDQOLWkSLlRooO-iQYEKKElSCGgfdx6p6lF-ehQu97dibWCfKx5v33nmGqgaTnzQfttzGuzmFDrVpj6YGAZ2HRuudSLGNirmIEV-gpgYEvI4yummR_RU-Yl5HfhB847psodXTKG_CLPa-aesAaeE0_nyMuPe-PJwOK6MbDNbvz2jssSS3dnrZhXjMvfoPr_P78BAAD__xYUZng) of the incident went viral, and protests sprang up in response. Penny was released after telling police he didn't intend to kill Neely, but now he'll face a [second-degree](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0DFvhCAUwPFPgxsGHooyMDRp3K5L03Q0T3ieXBEuSO_it2_aufN_-ef3eZkvGGJI1zfcydY1z-hqeNAsei6Bg5qh8XYlAlINWalHNRopVddsVhNq4RDH1QwGO0_gVz86BOwNkV6aYEGAEr0EKQR0ph2XnjqURmO_jMtArBPkQ82lveWQ6kZrPPODSuvy3kS71Xo_mHphMDGYcHGJnkd7zb-ZwfTxzmDymAJFfqeUTr5j4m7LX-T58b088eQleCr8lovHxBNRPBlMR83lZGoKnqlXY6Q2MMimWH9_hhjDoQfWieuOIf6N1P9dfgIAAP__PPFk3A) manslaughter charge.
➤ **A member** of the House (Sylvia Garcia, D-TX) used a large photo of caged children at the Mexican border to bolster her argument against a GOP-backed immigration measure. One problem: the photograph was taken during the Obama era. ([More](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLtypDAQAL8GsqH04BkQXEK2l15IjaQB5iwYCmkX--9d3thxd9DV_x7zAznysf7Fnca8yIw-84tm1YA2YOxsyjAuRIZsSaNue9sPWtu63MbBKjKtsm3nh1arDpXtbAgenbZour7k0ShjVaONVsrUQ9W7hmrUQ4uN611HRa0ocJar-i985I2W-CUvuiovexnHLeczFfZPYabCTPd9V4t8HnSnH16Y6ZTImX0qzLTJMxEE2uGZKIE43BEcBzqALoRzkyzgcaUAO68XHhn8xjFcdICcpySCVU5w6D8oAO9vKbMc4DjG8hrDeXOMnNquqNW6I8d3ZP792XcAAAD__31TcM4)) ➤ **A federal judge** in Virginia ruled that laws preventing handgun purchases by 18-20 year-olds violate the Second Amendment. The Justice Department will likely appeal the ruling. ([More](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskL2u4yAUhJ_G7k7Ef-zCxTbpsu2W1gEONlkMEeCs9u2vEt3yVlN80szo-3Nf7xhTzNtvPGjpoazoenzRyjRwAUKuYvRLIBIkR1q4meQ0cy7VuC_SaIakybmZk5GazeFqiHu0Rpng5jEuggnJNBecMaHmy2Q1KeSzQW0ne6VBMfKxl3p5lJj7TiH9Ly-qF1eOMS177882yF-DuA3i1nfaY0pvNoibTWVr3wm2Rgoxb1DLByrG2KwVBPJUMcHj9BtBPRM1QH-m3gA3asAnEAwc5lw6WAKbivtLHkItBzzP6nZs79ods9_O_N4b6-Kf_2JKsZnroNh2YPx8GvvP-r4CAAD__9gPclM)) ➤ **Things** got a bit heated during Donald Trump's CNN town hall appearance. Trump became frustrated with interviewer Kaitlan Collins and said "You're a nasty person, I'll tell ya" while answering a question. ([Watch](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsz79uwyAQgPGnwVui4_hjGBi6eEvXjhY2R0xEILKvifL2ldq18zd8-n1d5ksstbTrZ7xT4NznuHJ50gzmJPGEasYhhUyEpAYK0jrlvJRKD1uA7JVHgGjHZDKsydo0Qhr9Ct7ILIcSEFCBkSgBUPuzWwzpKL2NZnHLSEIDpcJ9P996abxRru_-pP289vtQw8b8OIT6EDgJnPhVmP-awGmh1t63vrWjN4HTwZG_D4GTtMZq6xzqEYxzDo0d9pAer1JrOewoNFzvsdTfBf8v_gkAAP__eQtU0A)) ➤ **Leaked** emails from State Department officials reveal an unwillingness in the Biden administration to capitalize on China’s spy balloon incursions. Rather than using the spying events to push Beijing on policy initiatives like human rights and export controls, the State Dep. delayed any action to prevent diplomatic tension. ([Watch](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLGStCAQhJ8Gs7FgEFcDgj8x2z-90BplXLliYQvYtXz7Ky--sLuTr7-v-3wnH3x8_Kcn27qlmdbqPzxLAwoB9YyNsxszsm7Yqn7Qw6iU7prdMmliLTvqb9tqxh5pkYtBjbQRO2cab1GilkahkhK7sR0Wwx2psSezDMuNRSfZ-Zpy-518rDtv4Uwfzu2ank2we62vIvQ_gZPA6TiONvO7ci7XfjUpBydwepcr7Ce8CzgOdLKDdfeRoFBcq0-xAG2VM5Q9perjA1w6IpTXCQuFkFKEixSu00rg1GTrXocPwZf-Jjr5eJIPv1D1b0c_AQAA__8f4Wlt)) ➤ **Donald Trump** is appealing the verdict that found him liable for sexual assault and defamation. His lawyers submitted the paperwork to the 2nd Circuit Court of Appeals. We’re on our feet all day getting The Flyover ready for takeoff, so we understand how important it is to be comfortable and pain-free. Our partners at Fulton understand this too, and that's why they make [comfortable cork insoles](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxszz1uwyAUAODTwBYLHj-GgaFLtnTtaAF-tl-DjWVQot6-Uude4JO-r8f0iFToWD_jjqEvdYq50wsnYW4SbqAm4HNYEAEVxyCtU85LqTTfgssWYfHaeq3HNLqknUrZL7OXc7JOcQogQAkjQQoB2g8uGdRRehtNcmlEpgXO1Os1fFc6-oZL-akvvIZcd17C1vvZmPpgcGdwL3Q829De8Ww95ueQK4O7WdHwK8znm0qhZkemxbpHKn9E_3_0GwAA___H-kwJ) that mold to your foot as you walk to provide customized arch support. Most shoes lack any arch support, resulting in misalignment from the ground up. Minor imbalances at the start of the kinetic chain can have substantial consequences further up your body. clean_body: A federal judge temporarily stopped the Biden administration from releasing migrants into the U.S. without a court date. A federal judge temporarily stopped the Biden administration from releasing migrants into the U.S. without a court date. | | | | | | Friday, May 12, 2023 ---|--- Good morning! Today we’re covering the unfolding chaos at the southern border, an unknown new CEO at Twitter, and the world’s biggest lake trout. Is this your first time reading The Flyover? and never miss a thing. How did our Editor do today? mailto:editor@jointheflyover.com?subject=Feedback for The Flyover and tell us exactly what you liked or didn't like in today's edition. Want to stay informed throughout the day? and stay in touch. Note: We’ve added a new writer to The Flyover team: welcome David! Also, you’ll notice an advertisement in today’s edition. This helps us cover costs and get The Flyover airborne five days per week; if you enjoy the content and would like to contribute, take a look at today’s advertisement and consider making a purchase. Thanks for flying with us today! | Judge Blocks Honor System at Border A federal judge the Biden administration from releasing migrants into the U.S. without a court date. The ruling came hours before the expiration of (a Covid-era policy that resulted in many migrants being turned away at the southern border). Although the administration is replacing Title 42 with new deportation guidance, huge surges in immigration are happening now to the tune of 10,000 people per day--more than the border infrastructure can handle. In response to already-overloaded border sectors, the head of the U.S. the use of parole release : a protocol that allows migrants to enter the country without an alien registration number or court date. Judge T. Kent Wetherell II reversed the authorization, putting a two-week restraining order on the policy. New CEO Coming to Twitter Elon Musk once said that he would hand over the CEO role at Twitter once he found someone "foolish enough to take the job." He's apparently that meets the criteria: Musk the unnamed replacement as "she" and said the hire will be complete in about six weeks. The most likely candidate is Linda Yaccarino, a veteran advertising sales executive for NBCUniversal. Twitter has lost advertising revenue since Musk took over, and shareholders are hopeful that Yaccarino--or someone like her--will to resume buying ad space on the platform. Former Marine Charged for NYC Subway Death A decorated Marine veteran is with manslaughter by Manhattan DA Alvin Bragg. Daniel Penny was riding a train in NYC when, according to witnesses, a man named Jordan Neely began harassing and aggressively threatening passengers. Penny intervened and subdued the belligerent man with a chokehold, and Neely eventually died. "Daniel never intended to harm Mr. Neely and could not have foreseen his untimely death," Penny's lawyer said in a statement. A of the incident went viral, and protests sprang up in response. Penny was released after telling police he didn't intend to kill Neely, but now he'll face a manslaughter charge. ➤ A member of the House (Sylvia Garcia, D-TX) used a large photo of caged children at the Mexican border to bolster her argument against a GOP-backed immigration measure. One problem: the photograph was taken during the Obama era. () ➤ A federal judge in Virginia ruled that laws preventing handgun purchases by 18-20 year-olds violate the Second Amendment. The Justice Department will likely appeal the ruling. () ➤ Things got a bit heated during Donald Trump's CNN town hall appearance. Trump became frustrated with interviewer Kaitlan Collins and said "You're a nasty person, I'll tell ya" while answering a question. () ➤ Leaked emails from State Department officials reveal an unwillingness in the Biden administration to capitalize on China’s spy balloon incursions. Rather than using the spying events to push Beijing on policy initiatives like human rights and export controls, the State Dep. delayed any action to prevent diplomatic tension. () ➤ Donald Trump is appealing the verdict that found him liable for sexual assault and defamation. His lawyers submitted the paperwork to the 2nd Circuit Court of Appeals. () Flying together with: Do your feet hurt? We’re on our feet all day getting The Flyover ready for takeoff, so we understand how important it is to be comfortable and pain-free. Our partners at Fulton understand this too, and that's why they make that mold to your foot as you walk to provide customized arch support. Most shoes lack any arch support, resulting in misalignment from the ground up. Minor imbalances at the start of the kinetic chain can have substantial consequences further up your body. Fulton's insoles and align your body to prevent injury. As a reader of The Flyover, you can at checkout with the code NEWSLETTER15, and you'll get a 90-day risk-free guarantee. out today! ➤ Brett Favre is dropping his defamation lawsuit against Pat McAfee. The lawsuit was based on McAfee's statement that Favre was a "thief" who was "stealing from poor people in Mississippi" while getting a volleyball facility built at his alma mater, Southern Mississippi U. () ➤ The Super Bowl champion Chiefs will kick off the new NFL season against the Lions on September 7. The matchup could have featured the Eagles or Bengals--both on the Chiefs' slate--but the league gave the Lions the nod instead. () ➤ Warriors coach Steve Kerr mentioned the Lakers' flopping habits in his post-game presser, and Lebron James wasn't happy. "That's just not us," he said. () Market Report 5/11/23 | ▲ | Nasdaq Natl. Assoc. of Securities Dealers Automated Quotations | 12,328.51 | + 0.18% ---|---|---|--- ▼ | S&P S&P Global Rating | 4,130.62 | - 0.17% ▼ | DOW J Dow Jones Industrial Average | 33,310.04 | - 0.66% ▼ | BTC Bitcoin | $26,368.0 | - 2.40% ▼ | APP AppLovin Corporation | $22 | - 23.53% ➤ 10,000 Southwest pilots are going on strike. The airline says it's not worried about staffing issues: presumably like they weren't worried before last Christmas' blizzard of canceled flights. () ➤ Disney is fighting for its share price on at least four fronts: a third round of layoffs, a writer's strike that's delaying production, duking it out with Ron DeSantis over taxes and land rights, and now a huge drop in Disney+ subscribers. It lost 4 million subs in Q2. () ➤ Peloton is recalling 2.2 million stationary bikes because they have a tendency to break. The seat post assemblies can snap during use; unpleasant results ensue. () ➤ 1,500 light-years away, baby stars are being born. Stitch together one million images from modern observatories (including one in orbit), and you get a pretty good picture of the sky's latest lights. () ➤ Hammerhead sharks hold their breath when hunting in deep waters. They do it to conserve warmth as water temperatures drop. () ➤ A woman in Utah published a children's book about dealing with the loss of a father. Several weeks later, she was charged with the murder of her children's father. () ➤ Pat Sajak got a little choked up when his daughter, Maggie, filled in for Vanna White on an episode of Wheel of Fortune. He may have felt a different emotion when Vanna's son gave Maggie a kiss after the show. () ➤ A father** and son caught a world record-breaking lake trout in Gunnison, Colorado, but they likely won't get credit for the 73-pounder because they threw it back. () | Daily Quote | “Joe Biden, this is your fault.” \- Ted Cruz on the border crisis Today's Trivia What is the nearest star system to our sun? subject: This is a JOKE

body:
Secretary Mayorkas should be ashamed. | [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61795915:s_DMrcDdN:m:1:877327319:C19C3C6D9E1D7958776CE67BEBE601EF:r)
---
Fellow American - I'm disgusted. This is a joke.

President Biden's Secretary of Homeland Security, Alejandro Mayorkas, is misleading Americans about how the immigration system works. On his watch, illegal immigration has increased 5 times.

He's covering for Biden's FAILED immigration policies, and it's a disgrace.

The policy choices Democrats in Washington have made has led to **an invasion of this country from the southern border.**

We're on track to have more illegal crossing this year than last year. Now that Title 42 has expired, _**we're going to double the number of daily crossings.**_

I've never been more disappointed and disgusted than I am right now, Fellow American.

Alejandro Mayorkas should be fired! _**[Do you agree?](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61795915:s_DMrcDdN:m:1:877327319:C19C3C6D9E1D7958776CE67BEBE601EF:r)**_

| [** YES **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61795915:s_DMrcDdN:m:1:877327319:C19C3C6D9E1D7958776CE67BEBE601EF:r)
---

[** NO **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61795915:s_DMrcDdN:m:1:877327319:C19C3C6D9E1D7958776CE67BEBE601EF:r)
---

Democrats hate President Trump so much that they will REJECT his policies - even though they worked. Instead of trying to appease the far-Left, Biden and Mayorkas should take a page out of Donald Trump's book and keep policies enacted that are working to the benefit of the United States.

Bottom line - The Biden administration is failing us.

None of the immigrants heading to America will turn around because Mayorkas held a press conference in Washington, DC. They know what Mayorkas said is all BS. **[The lack of a solid plan to protect America's southern border is a fireable offense.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61795915:s_DMrcDdN:m:1:877327319:C19C3C6D9E1D7958776CE67BEBE601EF:r)**

Will you let me know what you think - **[should Secretary Mayorkas be fired for his terrible handling of the border crisis?](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61795915:s_DMrcDdN:m:1:877327319:C19C3C6D9E1D7958776CE67BEBE601EF:r)**

This crisis is costing us billions of dollars, and more importantly it's costing people their lives with the invasion of drugs like fentanyl. Someone must ANSWER for the ineptitude of the Biden Administration.

We didn't believe "Baghdad Bob's" press conferences during the invasion of Iraq in the 2000s - and we don't believe Secretary Mayorkas today.

**[Let me know if you think he should be FIRED before the day is over.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61795915:s_DMrcDdN:m:1:877327319:C19C3C6D9E1D7958776CE67BEBE601EF:r)**

Thanks,

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61795915:s_DMrcDdN:m:1:877327319:C19C3C6D9E1D7958776CE67BEBE601EF:r)
Lindsey Graham

name: NextGen America
subject: Friend, celebrate AAPI power with us
body:
| | Friend, **Happy Asian American and Pacific Islander heritage month! **This May, we’re shining a light on the incredible power of AAPI youth. According to recent statistics, Asian American and Pacific Islanders are among the fastest-growing groups in America. Their energy and activism have driven monumental change — including historic voter turnout in 2020 that helped put our country back on the path to progress. And AAPI youth are so much more than just these statistics. **Their culture, values, and contributions are building incredible change in our country, and we’re dedicated to supporting them. ** [ACT: Volunteer with us as we continue to fight for and amplify the voices of AAPI youth.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63189159/405898079/-2081417805?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZTY5N2RhOS1kNWYwLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QhmAXC9ag42-o5xrPoLwCGQ4tmMgZp7GqgWoeHPM9C8=&emci=51cab9ca-33f0-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=ee697da9-d5f0-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=6787172) Recent data shows that AAPI youth feel unheard. **So we want to be clear — AAPI communities have a home here. AAPI youth are an integral part of our community, and we stand with them.** We’re fighting for AAPI communities year-round. Our work doesn’t begin or end with this month. We’re taking control of our future, and we’re doing it together. **Will you join us?** | [Volunteer](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63189160/405898080/647465550?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZTY5N2RhOS1kNWYwLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QhmAXC9ag42-o5xrPoLwCGQ4tmMgZp7GqgWoeHPM9C8=&emci=51cab9ca-33f0-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=ee697da9-d5f0-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=6787172 "CTA Button")

---
A monarch butterfly flies 3,000 miles to its wintering grounds, hoping to pass on the migratory torch to the next generation. But there's a problem...on its journey back,_**it can't find milkweed, the only place it can lay its eggs.**_ This problem is now widespread. And this year, we saw the presence of Eastern monarch butterflies in their wintering grounds**DROP by 22%!** They are now declared endangered by the International Union for Conservation of Nature. What's worse, a key driver of this decline is preventable: toxic pesticides like Bayer-Monsanto's Roundup. [**We need to stop Bayer-Monsanto from wreaking more havoc on endangered monarchs before they are all gone! Make your contribution of $27 or more before the clock strikes midnight and protect precious monarchs and our planet!**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1767897?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
**Western monarchs have declined by over 99% since the 1980s.** They're at risk of disappearing forever -- and they are more at risk than ever before. A key factor in their decline is the widespread use of glyphosate -- a.k.a. Bayer-Monsanto's Roundup.
We need to get this toxic pesticide out of our food system before it's too late for monarchs. But as long as profit prevails over the survival of these iconic butterflies, we will keep seeing declines until there are no more monarchs left to count. We can't let it come to that, Friend, but we need your help urgently!
**Help save monarchs and protect our planet from toxic pesticides. Donate $27 or more today. **
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
[Donate $27](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1767893?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
