---
[Donate another amount](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1767896?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
Scientists have confirmed what we have long feared: milkweed, vital to the survival of the monarchs, is contaminated by TOXIC pesticides. A recent study found every single sample of milkweed was contaminated -- scientists found 64 different pesticides, and **a third of samples contained pesticides at levels known to be deadly to monarchs. **
This poisoning of the only food source for monarch caterpillars is one more factor driving monarchs to the brink. And it's all for the sake of corporate greed.
Bayer-Monsanto needs to be held accountable for its role in this tragic loss._**As monarch populations have plummeted, the amount of Bayer-Monsanto's Roundup used each year has skyrocketed**_ \-- from 11 million pounds in 1987 to nearly 300 million pounds in 2016. Roundup -- an herbicide that kills virtually all plants except crops genetically engineered to survive it -- is wiping out milkweed, the ONLY food young monarchs eat.
Corporations like Bayer-Monsanto are doubling down on their pollinator-toxic pesticides -- lobbying against critical environmental protections and pushing for even more widespread use of pesticides to increase their profits. It's up to us to put a stop to it before it's too late!
**Don't let Bayer-Monsanto drive monarch butterflies toward extinction. Add your support for monarchs and our planet with a $27 donation to Friends of the Earth. **
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
[Donate $27](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1767893?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)

[Donate another amount](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1767896?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
The migration of the monarch butterfly is unlike any other. Each fall, millions of these colorful creatures leave their summer feeding and breeding grounds and travel up to 3,000 miles south to reach their overwintering grounds in Mexico and California.**No other insect in the world migrates such a distance to places it has never been before.**
The butterflies making their way back north today could be the great-great-grandchildren of the monarchs that left in the fall. It is a team effort -- an epic, intergenerational journey hardwired into their DNA.
**This migration is unique, remarkable, and fragile.** The monarch is the only butterfly known to make a two-way migration as birds do. But unlike any other great migrators, like birds or caribou, none of these individual butterflies will ever return. Instead, they will fly part of the way back north, where they will mate and lay eggs on only one plant: milkweed. There, their eggs will hatch into colorful caterpillars, who then feed on the milkweed and transform into butterflies before continuing north, and over multiple generations, finish their round trip.
But milkweed is being wiped out by Bayer-Monsanto's Roundup, and the monarch butterflies that depend on it are being decimated. Fewer monarchs are surviving as a result -- and soon, it could be none at all.
Companies like Bayer-Monsanto are using their money and power to protect their profits at all costs. What's more, they are **spending millions to distract the public and policymakers from the role their pesticides play in the killing of pollinators** \-- taking a page right out of the playbook of Big Tobacco.
Our plan has the power to win comprehensive protections for monarch butterflies, people, and the planet. But we need you to step up and be the hero in this story -- before these beautiful and iconic butterflies disappear forever. Make your membership contribution of $27 or more before it's too late for butterflies, people, and the planet!
**It's now or never for monarchs. Show your support for them and our planet with a $27 donation to Friends of the Earth before the clock strikes midnight! **

clean_body: | | | | | ---|---|--- | | Dear Friend, | Don’t let Bayer-Monsanto drive monarch butterflies toward extinction. Donate $27 or more before the clock strikes midnight! If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | == == == == A monarch butterfly flies 3,000 miles to its wintering grounds, hoping to pass on the migratory torch to the next generation. But there's a problem...on its journey back,it can't find milkweed, the only place it can lay its eggs. This problem is now widespread. And this year, we saw the presence of Eastern monarch butterflies in their wintering groundsDROP by 22%! They are now declared endangered by the International Union for Conservation of Nature. What's worse, a key driver of this decline is preventable: toxic pesticides like Bayer-Monsanto's Roundup. == Western monarchs have declined by over 99% since the 1980s. They're at risk of disappearing forever -- and they are more at risk than ever before. A key factor in their decline is the widespread use of glyphosate -- a.k.a. Bayer-Monsanto's Roundup. We need to get this toxic pesticide out of our food system before it's too late for monarchs. But as long as profit prevails over the survival of these iconic butterflies, we will keep seeing declines until there are no more monarchs left to count. We can't let it come to that, Friend, but we need your help urgently! Help save monarchs and protect our planet from toxic pesticides. Donate $27 or more today. If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: == == == == Scientists have confirmed what we have long feared: milkweed, vital to the survival of the monarchs, is contaminated by TOXIC pesticides. A recent study found every single sample of milkweed was contaminated -- scientists found 64 different pesticides, and a third of samples contained pesticides at levels known to be deadly to monarchs. This poisoning of the only food source for monarch caterpillars is one more factor driving monarchs to the brink. And it's all for the sake of corporate greed. Bayer-Monsanto needs to be held accountable for its role in this tragic loss.As monarch populations have plummeted, the amount of Bayer-Monsanto's Roundup used each year has skyrocketed \-- from 11 million pounds in 1987 to nearly 300 million pounds in 2016. Roundup -- an herbicide that kills virtually all plants except crops genetically engineered to survive it -- is wiping out milkweed, the ONLY food young monarchs eat. Corporations like Bayer-Monsanto are doubling down on their pollinator-toxic pesticides -- lobbying against critical environmental protections and pushing for even more widespread use of pesticides to increase their profits. It's up to us to put a stop to it before it's too late! Don't let Bayer-Monsanto drive monarch butterflies toward extinction. Add your support for monarchs and our planet with a $27 donation to Friends of the Earth. If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: == == == == The migration of the monarch butterfly is unlike any other. Each fall, millions of these colorful creatures leave their summer feeding and breeding grounds and travel up to 3,000 miles south to reach their overwintering grounds in Mexico and California.No other insect in the world migrates such a distance to places it has never been before. The butterflies making their way back north today could be the great-great-grandchildren of the monarchs that left in the fall. It is a team effort -- an epic, intergenerational journey hardwired into their DNA. This migration is unique, remarkable, and fragile. The monarch is the only butterfly known to make a two-way migration as birds do. But unlike any other great migrators, like birds or caribou, none of these individual butterflies will ever return. Instead, they will fly part of the way back north, where they will mate and lay eggs on only one plant: milkweed. There, their eggs will hatch into colorful caterpillars, who then feed on the milkweed and transform into butterflies before continuing north, and over multiple generations, finish their round trip. But milkweed is being wiped out by Bayer-Monsanto's Roundup, and the monarch butterflies that depend on it are being decimated. Fewer monarchs are surviving as a result -- and soon, it could be none at all. Companies like Bayer-Monsanto are using their money and power to protect their profits at all costs. What's more, they are spending millions to distract the public and policymakers from the role their pesticides play in the killing of pollinators \-- taking a page right out of the playbook of Big Tobacco. Our plan has the power to win comprehensive protections for monarch butterflies, people, and the planet. But we need you to step up and be the hero in this story -- before these beautiful and iconic butterflies disappear forever. Make your membership contribution of $27 or more before it's too late for butterflies, people, and the planet! It's now or never for monarchs. Show your support for them and our planet with a $27 donation to Friends of the Earth before the clock strikes midnight! If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: == == == == Standing with you, Kendra Klein Deputy director of science, Friends of the Earth | Contact Us: Friends of the Earth U.S. Washington, D.C. | Berkeley, CA 1-877-843-8687

| Fellow Patriot,

This is Dr. Ben Carson, and I’m writing to you today because your name is on my list of Americans who **[cherish our nation's guiding values of life, liberty, community, and faith.](http://trk.libertyledger.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM1MjE2Mjk1NiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMTMyLTk4MWQzOWI5OWI3ZDQyMmI4Y2FmMmE4NGYzZDBhN2QyIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjEiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3NlY3VyZS5hbWVyaWNhbmNvcm5lcnN0b25lLm9yZy9kb25hdGU_dXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWV2ZXJncmVlbmFzayZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9Z2l2aW5nc2Vhc29uX0FFX0xMTzM4ODg1JnNvdXJjZV9jb2RlPUFDSTIzMDVFUDAwMSJ9/vD7DOMhQRsbeNdslaInPgw)**

This is democracy in action: **[because every dollar you give is a vote for the future you want to see.](http://trk.libertyledger.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM1MjE2Mjk1NiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMTMyLTk4MWQzOWI5OWI3ZDQyMmI4Y2FmMmE4NGYzZDBhN2QyIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjMiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3NlY3VyZS5hbWVyaWNhbmNvcm5lcnN0b25lLm9yZy9kb25hdGU_dXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWV2ZXJncmVlbmFzayZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9Z2l2aW5nc2Vhc29uX0FFX0xMTzM4ODg1JnNvdXJjZV9jb2RlPUFDSTIzMDVFUDAwMSJ9/VRslWbUhxv_vrYcos3ga5A)**

I'd like to personally invite you to join me in advancing common-sense solutions to our nation's toughest challenges by **[making a generous gift of whatever your budget allows.](http://trk.libertyledger.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM1MjE2Mjk1NiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMTMyLTk4MWQzOWI5OWI3ZDQyMmI4Y2FmMmE4NGYzZDBhN2QyIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjQiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3NlY3VyZS5hbWVyaWNhbmNvcm5lcnN0b25lLm9yZy9kb25hdGU_dXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWV2ZXJncmVlbmFzayZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9Z2l2aW5nc2Vhc29uX0FFX0xMTzM4ODg1JnNvdXJjZV9jb2RlPUFDSTIzMDVFUDAwMSJ9/VD7ofbSjUJIqSVXPg1DxKA)**

Will you join me? If so, you can support these efforts by clicking the link below:

**[https://secure.americancornerstone.org/](http://trk.libertyledger.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM1MjE2Mjk1NiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMTMyLTk4MWQzOWI5OWI3ZDQyMmI4Y2FmMmE4NGYzZDBhN2QyIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjYiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3NlY3VyZS5hbWVyaWNhbmNvcm5lcnN0b25lLm9yZy9kb25hdGU_dXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWV2ZXJncmVlbmFzayZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9Z2l2aW5nc2Vhc29uX0FFX0xMTzM4ODg1JnNvdXJjZV9jb2RlPUFDSTIzMDVFUDAwMSJ9/9DB8g2wqv8YeRnx0Fgs9_w)**

Where the Left wants bigger government, we'll fight for limited government and self-determination.

America is the greatest country that has ever existed. Please help me do everything possible to make sure it stays that way.

Thank you for your support,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder and Chairman
American Cornerstone Institute

P.S. I know these are uncertain times. But no gift is too small. And every dollar you give today will have a long-term impact on restoring our nation's founding values. **[Click here to give whatever you can today »](http://trk.libertyledger.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM1MjE2Mjk1NiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMTMyLTk4MWQzOWI5OWI3ZDQyMmI4Y2FmMmE4NGYzZDBhN2QyIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjciLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3NlY3VyZS5hbWVyaWNhbmNvcm5lcnN0b25lLm9yZy9kb25hdGU_dXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWV2ZXJncmVlbmFzayZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9Z2l2aW5nc2Vhc29uX0FFX0xMTzM4ODg1JnNvdXJjZV9jb2RlPUFDSTIzMDVFUDAwMSJ9/Vpo5I5UTYTRJHcGg3mRawg)**

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Will you help me restore America’s guiding values?
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| |
---
| | | [](http://trk.readactnews.-8WpWg)
---
| Fellow Patriot,

This is Dr. Ben Carson, and I’m writing to you today because your name is on my list of Americans who **[cherish our nation's guiding values of life, liberty, community, and faith.](http://trk.readactnews.)**

Have you ever stopped to think about how charitable giving is a brilliant reflection of freedom?**[](http://trk.readactnews.-WhljDIUOIGhKpEqNHg)**It’s a way for every American to use our hard-earned money to freely support the causes we care most about.

This is democracy in action: **[because every dollar you give is a vote for the future you want to see.](http://trk.readactnews.)**

I'd like to personally invite you to join me in advancing common-sense solutions to our nation's toughest challenges by **[making a generous gift of whatever your budget allows.](http://trk.readactnews.-NO-M0uCyWssLivZ1Q)**

Your investment will allow the American Cornerstone Institute to engage in independent research, grassroots outreach, and collaboration with conservative leaders to set forth a better path forward for our country, **[safeguarding freedom for you and your family in the coming years.](http://trk.readactnews._jv078dAF9E9yslQ)**

Will you join me? If so, you can support these efforts by clicking the link below:

**[https://secure.americancornerstone.org/](http://trk.readactnews.-qLYTjHx8FjQ)**

Where the Left wants bigger government, we'll fight for limited government and self-determination.

America is the greatest country that has ever existed. Please help me do everything possible to make sure it stays that way.

Thank you for your support,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder and Chairman
American Cornerstone Institute

P.S. I know these are uncertain times. But no gift is too small. And every dollar you give today will have a long-term impact on restoring our nation's founding values. **[Click here to give whatever you can today »](http://trk.readactnews.)**
---
---
| |
---
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country's most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government's role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation's citizens.

FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE
May 12, 2023

Press Contact:
Chris Farmer
chris@chaseforva.com
804 912 6007

Scheduling Press Interview:
Debbie Gwynn
debbie@chaseforva.com
804 393 2715

Sen. Chase Supports Virginia
Leaving ERIC

Next step is to pass Voter Confidence Restoration Act

CHESTERFIELD, VA- Virginia's Board of Elections has announced that the commonwealth will withdraw participation from the Electronic Registration Information Center (ERIC).

"Virginia leaving Soros funded ERIC is long overdue and a huge victory for Virginia, and I applaud the Governor for his action," said Senator Chase. "ERIC is a national system that Deep State officials say is an important tool to keep voting rolls clean. Nothing could be further from the truth. In fact, it would be used for insidious and nefarious purposes to include an abuse of power in controlling our elections. We can't stop there though. We need to pass my Voter Confidence Restoration Act which returns elections to paper ballots, hand counts, no voting computers, no tabulators, photo identification to vote, an Election Day and notary signature requirement for any mail in ballots."

All three Senate District 12 Republican Candidates claim to support voter integrity, but Senator Amanda Chase is the only candidate running who has led on this issue from the beginning.

The Republican Primary is on June 20th and Early Voting has started.

clean_body: | | | | == | | | | | ---|--- FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE May 12, 2023 Press Contact: Chris Farmer chris@chaseforva.com 804 912 6007 Scheduling Press Interview: Debbie Gwynn debbie@chaseforva.com 804 393 2715 Sen. Chase Supports Virginia Leaving ERIC Next step is to pass Voter Confidence Restoration Act CHESTERFIELD, VA- Virginia's Board of Elections has announced that the commonwealth will withdraw participation from the Electronic Registration Information Center (ERIC). "Virginia leaving Soros funded ERIC is long overdue and a huge victory for Virginia, and I applaud the Governor for his action," said Senator Chase. "ERIC is a national system that Deep State officials say is an important tool to keep voting rolls clean. Nothing could be further from the truth. In fact, it would be used for insidious and nefarious purposes to include an abuse of power in controlling our elections. We can't stop there though. We need to pass my Voter Confidence Restoration Act which returns elections to paper ballots, hand counts, no voting computers, no tabulators, photo identification to vote, an Election Day and notary signature requirement for any mail in ballots." All three Senate District 12 Republican Candidates claim to support voter integrity, but Senator Amanda Chase is the only candidate running who has led on this issue from the beginning. The Republican Primary is on June 20th and Early Voting has started. | | | | | | | | | | == | | == | | == | Authorized and Paid for by Friends of Amanda Chase | | | | | | | Senator Amanda Chase | P.O. Box 5811, Midlothian, VA 23112 | | == Sent by mailto:amanda@chaseforva.com powered by == ==

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: George Santos is now facing 13 criminal charges *and* a Democratic challenger. It’s time to pile on the consequences for his many lies.
body:
Consequences come home for George Santos
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6bb82d27-72d5-4441-99c8-a0e641bafcd3/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, **Hallelujah! The Justice Department, as you probably know by now, filed 13 criminal charges vs George Santos.** **_Santos was charged with money laundering, wire fraud, theft of public funds & more. _**[_Luckily we have a great candidate ready to take out Santos in this Democratic leaning seat. State Senator Anna Kaplan, who's as real deal as real deal gets._](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta11720a4-da6b-4aec-bb8e-67650b5b88cc/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _From her email yesterday:_ [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T44ed3c32-b1e0-4cb3-9c55-35b70aac0e75/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _**Kaplan is a compassionate, talented star. **_**_Santos? He claimed his grandparents survived the Holocaust, mom survived 9/11, worked at Goldman Sachs, ran a foundation that saved thousands of dogs and cats. ALL. LIES._** _Santos is a Pro-Trump, anti-choice lunatic who is such a ghoul, he isn't only pro-assault rifle, but as children were being massacred by them, wore an assault rifle pin to Congress. Sickening. __Kaplan, on the other hand, will take on Trump and others who attack our democracy, anti-choice fanatics, and AR-15 fetishists._ [**_Join us in electing Anna Kaplan and removing this disgrace--and per the Justice Department, criminal--George Santos, by giving Kaplan $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can, to elect her and win back a Democratic House Majority._**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2f5eb933-c29f-42de-b81f-1bd3cf52f88f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _This race is as clear and crucial as it gets. Thank you for fighting for what's right._ Cliff
---
|
---
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
|
---

1776 Mentor Ave. #411 | Norwood, Ohio 45212
513.438.0171 | info@blueampaction.com
---
| Having trouble viewing this email? [View it in your web browser](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/santoschallengerannakaplan-n?wvpId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | |
---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0cbbe807-c318-48f5-898e-b85ca219fe7b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Roy Cooper
subject: Why the GOP’s law is just so appalling
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
body:
They want you to think this is the compromise.
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63171369/405846439/823540626?refcode=ea.41c34981-bcf0-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ms=ea.41c34981-bcf0-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MWMzNDk4MS1iY2YwLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Zi56Qc9dWkCaPBXE7a9FYq2BJ35snHQ40puoITQQ954=&emci=f3ecba36-83ef-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=41c34981-bcf0-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=1049176)
Peter — A week ago, the far-right extremist supermajority in the General Assembly passed a dangerous ban on abortion care. They want you to think this is a 12 week ban. **It’s not.** It bans medication abortion at 10 weeks and will effectively ban abortions for many people at any time because of the new requirement of 3 in-person visits and new burdens and restrictions that create obstacles for women, doctors and clinics. Republican leadership wanted to satisfy their centrist lawmakers, so they called it a 12 week ban. But they couldn’t get the far right extremists in their party to vote for a 12 week ban, so they threw in a bunch of fine print that bans abortion in many cases. _I will veto it._ I’ll explain further, but first, **I need to request your help.** **[The only way for us to secure reproductive freedom in North Carolina is by ousting anti-abortion Republicans and electing Democrats we can trust to defend our rights. Please, help me do so by contributing to power our work ahead of next year’s elections>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63171370/405846440/435245919?refcode=ea.41c34981-bcf0-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ms=ea.41c34981-bcf0-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MWMzNDk4MS1iY2YwLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Zi56Qc9dWkCaPBXE7a9FYq2BJ35snHQ40puoITQQ954=)** Make no mistake: far-right Republicans want to ban abortion completely, and this legislation is just their first step. By restricting the use of medication abortion down to ten weeks and putting onerous requirements on when and where visits to medical professionals are needed, abortion will become inaccessible to many women. **This is just wrong — and the GOP knows it.** That’s why they pushed their bill through in just two days, preventing amendments (even from their own members). **I have always pledged to do everything in my power to protect North Carolinians’ most fundamental rights. That’s why I’ll use my veto power on this, Peter.** _But we have to be ready to fight back at the ballot box, too._ **[I need your help right away. I’m asking you to donate $25, or another amount that’s right for you, to power my work for North Carolina>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63171371/405846441/744853338?refcode=ea.41c34981-bcf0-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ms=ea.41c34981-bcf0-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MWMzNDk4MS1iY2YwLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Zi56Qc9dWkCaPBXE7a9FYq2BJ35snHQ40puoITQQ954=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [DONATE $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63171372/405846443/435245919?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=ea.41c34981-bcf0-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ms=ea.41c34981-bcf0-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MWMzNDk4MS1iY2YwLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Zi56Qc9dWkCaPBXE7a9FYq2BJ35snHQ40puoITQQ954=)

clean_body: They want you to think this is the compromise. | Peter — A week ago, the far-right extremist supermajority in the General Assembly passed a dangerous ban on abortion care. They want you to think this is a 12 week ban. It’s not. It bans medication abortion at 10 weeks and will effectively ban abortions for many people at any time because of the new requirement of 3 in-person visits and new burdens and restrictions that create obstacles for women, doctors and clinics. Republican leadership wanted to satisfy their centrist lawmakers, so they called it a 12 week ban. But they couldn’t get the far right extremists in their party to vote for a 12 week ban, so they threw in a bunch of fine print that bans abortion in many cases. I will veto it. I’ll explain further, but first, I need to request your help. = Make no mistake: far-right Republicans want to ban abortion completely, and this legislation is just their first step. By restricting the use of medication abortion down to ten weeks and putting onerous requirements on when and where visits to medical professionals are needed, abortion will become inaccessible to many women. This is just wrong — and the GOP knows it. That’s why they pushed their bill through in just two days, preventing amendments (even from their own members). I have always pledged to do everything in my power to protect North Carolinians’ most fundamental rights. That’s why I’ll use my veto power on this, Peter. But we have to be ready to fight back at the ballot box, too. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = = = = Thank you very much, Roy = = = Send donations via check to: Cooper for North Carolina PO Box 1190 Raleigh, NC 27602 Thank you! mailto:info@roycooper.com | Cooper for North Carolina PO Box 1190 Raleigh, NC 27602 United States Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. name: Team Evergreen
subject: Join us TODAY to discuss EPA's new rules for power plants
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN ACTION
body:
You don't want to miss this, friend
| Friend— We wanted to make sure you saw this message from Lena. Our virtual event on EPA's new carbon pollution standards with Governor Jay Inslee and a panel of climate champions is **happening _today_ at 9 AM PT / 12 PM ET. Can you make it?** **[RSVP here to join us for this important conversation on what these rules mean and how they can supercharge our transition to a clean energy future.](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4542?t=2&akid=13321%2E53494%2ENM6TcE)
** The new standards would avoid 617 million tons of CO2 pollution through 2042—equivalent to reducing the annual emissions of half the cars in the U.S. **They're a critical step forward to cleaning up our air and protecting our climate, and we need your help to make them even stronger.** | [JOIN US](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4542?t=3&akid=13321%2E53494%2ENM6TcE)
---
See you soon,
Team Evergreen
\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: Lena Moffitt, Evergreen Action
Date: Thurs, May 11, 2023
Subject: BIG NEWS FOR CLIMATE: Join Gov. Jay Inslee, Leah Stokes, and me
[](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4542?t=4&akid=13321%2E53494%2ENM6TcE)
---
Friend,
**EPA just proposed new carbon pollution standards for power plants, and that's big news for climate.**
Tomorrow, I'm going to sit down with Washington Governor Jay Inslee and a panel of climate champions to talk about what these rules mean, why they are so important, and how we can work to make them even stronger.
**[RSVP right now for the live virtual event with Governor Jay Inslee, Energy Innovation CEO Sonia Aggarwall, Dr. Leah Stokes, and more TOMORROW at 9 AM PT / 12 PM ET.](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4542?t=5&akid=13321%2E53494%2ENM6TcE)
**
[RSVP NOW](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4542?t=6&akid=13321%2E53494%2ENM6TcE)
---
[](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4542?t=7&akid=13321%2E53494%2ENM6TcE)

These climate pollution standards are the single most effective tool this administration has for reducing carbon emissions, **and we need your help defending these rules against Big Polluters.**
**[Join me and a line-up of climate experts tomorrow for "Big News for Climate: EPA’s New Power Plant Rules" to learn about the rules and why we need your help.](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4542?t=8&akid=13321%2E53494%2ENM6TcE)
**
[RSVP NOW](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4542?t=9&akid=13321%2E53494%2ENM6TcE)
---
Hope to see you there,
Lena Moffitt
Executive Director
Evergreen Action

* * *
**P.S.** Can't make it for the live event? **[RSVP anyway](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4542?t=10&akid=13321%2E53494%2ENM6TcE)** , and we'll send you a recording.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [Click here to unsubscribe](https://act.evergreenaction.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=11&akid=13321%2E53494%2ENM6TcE). Contributions or gifts to EVERGREEN ACTION are not tax deductible. | PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN ACTION
---

name: Conservative Intel
subject: Why Government is the Problem
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vW9EFAcDNm

The major social problems of the United States-deteriorating
education, lawlessness and crime, homelessness, the collapse of
family values, the crisis in medical care-all have one thing in
common.

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oW9EFAcDNm

Dear
Friend,
The major
social problems of the United States-deteriorating education,
lawlessness and crime, homelessness, the collapse of family
values, the crisis in medical care-all have one thing in common.
They have all been produced by the well-intended actions of the
government.

And yet,
for some reason, more and more Americans look to government as
the solution to their problems.

That's
why I want you to have a free digital copy of Milton Friedman's
Why Government Is the Problem.

In this
eBook, Friedman uses his humble and direct style to:

Analyze the continuing social and economic problems as government
intervention increases in the U.S.
Shed
light on the government and its tilt toward special interests
over citizen interests.

Demonstrate how and why government is the problem.

I really
think you'll get a lot out of this eBook. It's a favorite among
supporters of Hoover. And although some of the particulars have
changed since he wrote this in 1993, I think you'll find the
situation is frighteningly similar today.

Please
use this link to get access to your copy of Why Government Is the
Problem now.

Thank
you,

Greg

Greg
Stamps | Online Development
Hoover
Institution | Stanford University

With its
eminent scholars and world-renowned Library and Archives, the
Hoover Institution is a non-partisan, data-driven policy research
organization that seeks to improve the human condition by
advancing ideas that promote economic prosperity, national
security, and democratic governance. Over more than one hundred
years, Hoover's work has directly led to policies that have
produced greater freedom, democracy, and opportunity in the
United States and around the world.

body:
I’m writing you this email today because I’ve learned critical information about the far-left’s plan

| |
---
| |
---
| | I’m writing you this email today because I’ve learned critical information about the far-left’s plan to turn America into a socialist nation that will rock you to your core. My latest book **“[ Final Battle: The Next Election Could Be the Last](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z9fn262e7nnttc17092vbpvddv9j4giapnmucpo8_rp22sh2s8i66o76cjg69o32c9h2bs)”[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zfiavegibkkam75i4m76l10h9srumei5qdqtn2a0_rp22sh2s8i66o76cjg69o32c9h2bs)** lays out how the left plans to influence our elections to destroy the very freedoms America was founded on. And this crucial information needs to be in the hands of every American patriot.But don’t take my word for it – take the word of Donald Trump and other patriots concerned for America’s future.
---
| | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z2je4ef89tngvbevaqmc1tokjbn0lgcb9lfumbm0_rp22sh2s8i66o76cjg69o32c9h2bs)

| | |

| |

| "David Horowitz exposes the outrages perpetrated by the Biden administration and the Democratic left."

**\-- Dinesh D’Souza****New York Times Bestselling Author and Filmmaker**

| |
---
| _"Final Battle_ may be the most devastating book-length indictment of the Democratic Party yet written. This is nothing less than a handbook for the salvation of the United States of America.”
---
**\-- Dennis Prager****Nationally Syndicated Radio Talk Show Host**
---
| | |
---
| | **With your donation of $35 or more today, I will mail you a copy of my must-read new book _Final Battle: The Next Election Could be the Last_.**Thousands of patriotic Americans who felt disenfranchised after the 2020 elections are reading my book, **“[ Final Battle: The Next Election Could be the Last.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zmqtlcftlp0jk99uoqckpauqipi1ha9khdccfki8_rp22sh2s8i66o76cjg69o32c9h2bs)”**They’re learning about the damage the radical left has done to the integrity of our elections and what you and I need to do to fight back and restore America.
---
| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zmopd3u4vmii1s6ob85eo7p9mhaplr0n4m9at6j8_rp22sh2s8i66o76cjg69o32c9h2bs)
---
| | You see, 50 years ago, I was a Marxist revolutionary determined to bring America as we know it to its end...
---
**_I was one of them... before I saw the truth..._**
---
| | That’s how I know the radical Left inside and out— because I was deeply involved. I was side by side with Huey Newton and the leaders of the Black Panthers. I edited _Ramparts_ – the largest magazine for radical Marxists.But after the Black Panthers murdered my friend and aided the Communists in Vietnam, I finally opened my eyes to their lies. I cast my vote for Ronald Reagan, and never looked back. And ever since, I’ve dedicated my life to exposing and destroying their radical plans for our country.That’s exactly what I write about in my latest book **[Final Battle: The Next Election Could be the Last.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zo1nst93eambclffk3nubm7uer745q47s6fppbng_rp22sh2s8i66o76cjg69o32c9h2bs)** **That’s why I’m asking you to join me and thousands of other Americans in this fight, through a donation of $35 or more today. With your $35 donation I’ll send you a complimentary copy of Final Battle so you can read the truth the Left is fighting so hard to keep out of your hands.** The Left thrives when no one knows what they’re doing, why they’re doing it, or who’s helping them do it. That is why I’ve dedicated my life to exposing the methods and motives of the radical left to American patriots like you.
---
| | In Freedom,
---
---
David Horowitz
---
P.S. As Trump said in his speech in Waco, TX: “2024 is the final battle, it’s going to be the big one.” We must arm as many Americans as we can with the truth about 2020 and the leftist plans for America. **Will you donate $35 today so I can mail you your copy right away?**
---

| Greater Georgia Newsletter May 12, 2023
As Greater Georgia works to wrap up our issues advocacy efforts for the 2023 legislative session, we're turning our focus to 2024. With a date officially set for the March 12, 2024 presidential primary - there are just over 300 days until it's Election Day again in Georgia. It's why we've already started working to register and engage voters to grow the conservative movement. There's plenty left to do in 2023 - so please read on, and get involved!
---
| |
---
| LATEST NEWS
---
| FIRST ANNUAL GREATER GEORGIA LEGISLATIVE AWARDS CEREMONY Wednesday, April 26
Greater Georgia honored conservative legislators at our first annual Greater Georgia Legislative Awards Ceremony. The audience of more than 200 heard from special guest speakers, including Governor Brian Kemp, First Lady Marty Kemp, Lt. Governor Burt Jones, and Speaker of the House Jon Burns. We were thrilled to present leadership awards to ten state lawmakers - and are already looking forward to next year's ceremony!
Read more about the event and view additional photos [HERE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ukCFSTVfMG22eB4NiGGPSIdisLbztxFSI3lG_rzTpGoKIvUgd6q5Dz5cpq28u6gX54Rvo6YG2isueHNzV_iecrujoLa2MjeHiEkLKsWWxl_QNh0ayxT9AG_jW3fGLp789QZABrvxsbMlZHri7osRlO9owxyDg0AydYqvROHHvi3b9oh4wztePJXDL12Dvzu1RhdmW0YQJ9Vatdtpwyr-kw2oYQhrRa4DJbBelmb4O2PZ41VEcsNBFgyOOg1XB1Jp&c=iYlpRuz_Oxp-wsDmAitdOsX11NppmmlKlKHsFvtrEUQIpC3ydu1zEQ==&ch=avr_wMTlZoVlURGug-daYYrtineb8fqwCXlWZVxyuR3ENROzUuAdUQ==).

| SENATE BILL 222 SIGNING Wednesday, May 3
Last week, Greater Georgia Chairwoman Kelly Loeffler had the honor of joining Governor Kemp for the bill signing of SB 222. The legislation was initially introduced in February after Greater Georgia [blew the whistle](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0016NcRVvgHi6GIN9wjCufmBjdCs_5DuOHg6R2YkcbI8OdGzdYDL_9AGP6KJR8By3y4tQnC97A56ST8tnmWVMJUzrElB7rzmSeRR9uQn7CvsC8s1rQhxuVAp6LRlhEv75aURR0ztNiD7S-I0WCAthpDKMeOULQDyEAAPQDLvDJneQDMvF7mZEAA8DNARol0LCLZG9jdQE2IzBuX5AMGKJaUW8kMmMbxVXa8_F7wy0c_w8GoKl8id7cLr6SWuRBt-dTNaG4Nk6vkk_o=&c=sYHXHqQ-JWwLQhBzC70Z26j8A2XS9s1npB20z4A8IvpoKcuCGs60-A==&ch=2x_cpRo1pazfSJ8gfJ_51wlwPcU0sDAIQTLJOHSVIDIgukeyqjx46g==) on DeKalb County, which covertly sought and then accepted $2 million in grant funding from the Center for Tech and Civic Life (CTCL). Now that the bill has become law, local boards of election are banned from accepting outside money, also known as "Zuckerbucks," to pay for elections.
Read our press release about the bill signing [HERE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ukCFSTVfMG22eB4NiGGPSIdisLbztxFSI3lG_rzTpGoKIvUgd6q5Dz5cpq28u6gXkXDdNADdzeJ4bpb9ABxIYXtGrTyZFLBoDVK6ZR0-851wHvqcItr_2qG-BEm5zvvWzCqg-fD5XLdhjtNKWQLC1FM3ma0er9QxaHYQocRP-8DPcBkbbS3M-rt1s6phRVknZR9ppdz3sFTI5C1ODr8G_7NUUOlMoxcDl34b8qB0Da_SLr9hn7LaUQ==&c=iYlpRuz_Oxp-wsDmAitdOsX11NppmmlKlKHsFvtrEUQIpC3ydu1zEQ==&ch=avr_wMTlZoVlURGug-daYYrtineb8fqwCXlWZVxyuR3ENROzUuAdUQ==), read coverage in the Atlanta Journal-Constitution [HERE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ukCFSTVfMG22eB4NiGGPSIdisLbztxFSI3lG_rzTpGoKIvUgd6q5DwIGu4HAR-MBabKFT43W5JXcvFk9HAlOC1Pp69LYi6ruGmSvYrvnHJ4WL5hSvEyZHi7mioPapKMjwmWRNQCnXkZGdE5eHIOcX8FZZPVvu_XRNFWyuPanCUClKICwbTnyj7tSGSGO3DiU31xXsdfduJ9dQPL0KZpMLPmpgSIEmzpjkqMcMCC28oW0-tmE4Bw7AnwVKQOkaATGfqbrOIa42j_B81jxXvV_uA==&c=iYlpRuz_Oxp-wsDmAitdOsX11NppmmlKlKHsFvtrEUQIpC3ydu1zEQ==&ch=avr_wMTlZoVlURGug-daYYrtineb8fqwCXlWZVxyuR3ENROzUuAdUQ==), or read an excerpt of Kelly's statement below:
"I am deeply grateful to the Governor for signing SB 222 into law, and to all our conservative lawmakers who took immediate action to stop partisan influence in our elections when Greater Georgia blew the whistle on it earlier this year. This is a tremendous win not only for our organization but for every Georgia voter - and we will never stop fighting to hold bad actors accountable, to deliver free and fair elections in the state of Georgia."

| HISPANIC OUTREACH CAMPAIGN Friday, May 5
Last week, we launched our latest Hispanic Voter Outreach Campaign. The campaign, which includes Spanish-language digital ads and in-person events, aims to inform voters about key legislative achievements during the 2023 Legislative Session. The effort encourages Hispanic citizens to register to vote and engage in the electoral process.
View our press release about the initiative [HERE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ukCFSTVfMG22eB4NiGGPSIdisLbztxFSI3lG_rzTpGoKIvUgd6q5Dz5cpq28u6gXN0RszVnI3kjtxqdWx1Mqd69DqUqru0puiskNN_NSUvuBBZA0mr0VM_sHgG4Y2GaVU0T30e7EOI_resBISaUWcc2Pz91QugusljujKkcp3BYrBNDMigTycI4KSOPRVqQ_jp6YXrUFv1ethCMW8XhdPTDzQdW-ONDjUe4Lx-6tPU29C4iGAwE5Mw==&c=iYlpRuz_Oxp-wsDmAitdOsX11NppmmlKlKHsFvtrEUQIpC3ydu1zEQ==&ch=avr_wMTlZoVlURGug-daYYrtineb8fqwCXlWZVxyuR3ENROzUuAdUQ==) and view a sample of the ads below:

| YOUTH VOTER OUTREACH Friday, April 21
Greater Georgia continues to focus heavily on voter registration and education within high schools and colleges across Georgia. Last month, our staff visited Gainesville High School to meet with their Teen Republican chapter. We talked about conservative values, taught them how to set up a voter registration drive, and even registered a few new voters.

Greater Georgia Chairwoman Kelly Loeffler was honored to speak to conservative women at the Cobb County Republican Women's "Spring into Action" event. clean_body: | | | | == | | | Greater Georgia Newsletter May 12, 2023 As Greater Georgia works to wrap up our issues advocacy efforts for the 2023 legislative session, we're turning our focus to 2024. With a date officially set for the March 12, 2024 presidential primary - there are just over 300 days until it's Election Day again in Georgia. It's why we've already started working to register and engage voters to grow the conservative movement. There's plenty left to do in 2023 - so please read on, and get involved! | | | LATEST NEWS | FIRST ANNUAL GREATER GEORGIA LEGISLATIVE AWARDS CEREMONY Wednesday, April 26 Greater Georgia honored conservative legislators at our first annual Greater Georgia Legislative Awards Ceremony. The audience of more than 200 heard from special guest speakers, including Governor Brian Kemp, First Lady Marty Kemp, Lt. Governor Burt Jones, and Speaker of the House Jon Burns. We were thrilled to present leadership awards to ten state lawmakers - and are already looking forward to next year's ceremony! Read more about the event and view additional photos ==. | | | | | SENATE BILL 222 SIGNING Wednesday, May 3 Last week, Greater Georgia Chairwoman Kelly Loeffler had the honor of joining Governor Kemp for the bill signing of SB 222. The legislation was initially introduced in February after Greater Georgia == on DeKalb County, which covertly sought and then accepted $2 million in grant funding from the Center for Tech and Civic Life (CTCL). Now that the bill has become law, local boards of election are banned from accepting outside money, also known as "Zuckerbucks," to pay for elections. Read our press release about the bill signing ==, read coverage in the Atlanta Journal-Constitution ==, or read an excerpt of Kelly's statement below: "I am deeply grateful to the Governor for signing SB 222 into law, and to all our conservative lawmakers who took immediate action to stop partisan influence in our elections when Greater Georgia blew the whistle on it earlier this year. This is a tremendous win not only for our organization but for every Georgia voter - and we will never stop fighting to hold bad actors accountable, to deliver free and fair elections in the state of Georgia." | | | | HISPANIC OUTREACH CAMPAIGN Friday, May 5 Last week, we launched our latest Hispanic Voter Outreach Campaign. The campaign, which includes Spanish-language digital ads and in-person events, aims to inform voters about key legislative achievements during the 2023 Legislative Session. The effort encourages Hispanic citizens to register to vote and engage in the electoral process. View our press release about the initiative == and view a sample of the ads below: | | HISPANIC VOTER REGISTRATION DRIVE Sunday, May 7 As part of our outreach campaign, we spent time this weekend at La Victoria in Gwinnett County - registering Hispanic voters at a local supermercado. View photos below! | | | | | YOUTH VOTER OUTREACH Friday, April 21 Greater Georgia continues to focus heavily on voter registration and education within high schools and colleges across Georgia. Last month, our staff visited Gainesville High School to meet with their Teen Republican chapter. We talked about conservative values, taught them how to set up a voter registration drive, and even registered a few new voters. | | | COMMUNITY REGISTRATION DRIVES Flowery Branch Spring Festival on April 22 Johns Creek International Festival on April 29 Our interns, staff, and volunteers were also out several times this past month at community gatherings, registering and educating voters on the importance of supporting - and voting for - conservative values. | | | | | COBB COUNTY REPUBLICAN WOMEN Friday, May 5 Greater Georgia Chairwoman Kelly Loeffler was honored to speak to conservative women at the Cobb County Republican Women's "Spring into Action" event. You can read coverage of Kelly's remarks == from the Marietta Daily Journal, or read an excerpt below: "The beauty of working year-round every year is when something comes up like a special election ... we can be ready, we can mobilize, we can make sure that people get out the vote, so we're going to make sure that we're always ready, and then when '24 is here we're going to be organized. We're not going to let them catch us unaware or unprepared or get outworked because none of us are willing to be outworked." | | | | | GREATER GEORGIA STORE LAUNCH Finally, we're thrilled to announce the rollout of the official Greater Georgia store! You can support our cause and purchase some Greater Georgia "swag" by clicking ==! | | | == | | | HAPPY MOTHER'S DAY! Wishing a joyful Mother's Day weekend to all the wonderful moms across our state! | | | GET INVOLVED Greater Georgia's work is critical to defending conservative values, and it is only possible through the hard work and support of strong, grassroots volunteers. We need your help! -- Click the buttons below to find out how you can join the fight for conservative values. | | == | | == | == | | | ON SOCIAL MEDIA | == == == | == == == | | | NEWS TO WATCH | == - Georgia voter check-in devices stolen from DeKalb elections warehouse == - Trans Cyclist Wins Women's Category in Tour of the Gila Race in New Mexico == - The Godfather of A.I.' Leaves Google and Warns of Danger Ahead == - Illegal Alien Accused Of Murdering 5 Neighbors In Texas Was Deported 5 Times: Report Fox Business | | | To learn more, visit ==, and follow along on ==, ==, and == to stay up to date with the latest information. | | == | | | Paid for by Greater Georgia Action, Inc. name: Pro Life Update
subject: Ancient Christianity: a new free course from Hillsdale
body:
I’ve always been fascinated by the story of the earliest Christians.

This sponsored message from Pro Life Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zo1jlsl2kbmdhtsn6803l9dmbklrccfnqrben7ao_rp22sh2s8i66o76cji60o71c9h2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend,

I've always been fascinated by the story of the earliest Christians.

I wanted to learn more about how they worshipped and prayed, faced persecution and hardship, and settled theological disputes.

But, beyond reading the New Testament and some of the stories of early Christian martyrs, it was daunting to figure out how to proceed. I always got lost in foreign names and locations and the complicated history of Imperial Rome. The result was a large gap in my understanding of how the Christian faith took shape and spread from the apostles through the age of Constantine.

To uncover this fascinating history, we've produced our newest online course, "Ancient Christianity," which we'll release on May 23.

In this course, Professor Kenneth Calvert is your guide through the first four centuries of Christianity as he explains the remarkable ways the new faith transformed the Roman world.

**You can watch the video trailer for the course and preregister today using the secure link below:

** [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zlbakjspvff7t5jvnpg0lnhgapgrtsa72njvpcu0_rp22sh2s8i66o76cji60o71c9h2bs)
[**https://online.hillsdale.edu/landing/ancient-christianity/prereg**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zq7mo0beuvs93oo67tpjog4nmvsn0k7monm86b0g_rp22sh2s8i66o76cji60o71c9h2bs)

I hope you join us in learning more about the courage and faith of the first Christians.

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

Pro Life Update
---

subject: Big news about the “Big Guy”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Comer for Congress**
body:
The FD-1023 form at the FBI is going to shed light on exactly what I’ve been saying.
| | [ [Unsubscribe](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_s=0e31a757632c4aaa9ebde15e9f9cc0c9&_t=5JxCrZBsBwsiFLOx-aNoOBdTJYTubC5U2wsm0QMmh9JCQqn6-cq8dQ7Y6cOPCNS2K96rAWDGC2PRM3jKjQa2ScYZaW6V1i4THRLnyYp9FgQ%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_s=0e31a757632c4aaa9ebde15e9f9cc0c9&_t=5JxCrZBsBwsiFLOx-aNoOBdTJYTubC5U2wsm0QMmh9JCQqn6-cq8dQ7Y6cOPCNS2K96rAWDGC2PRM3jKjQa2ScYZaW6V1i4THRLnyYp9FgQ%3D)

](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=0e31a757632c4aaa9ebde15e9f9cc0c9&_e=-RFS9-KORofQXLVvMwWg_2UrtxjIfOs7vAzB_NE-gw6QkajJpaQ5la85OJZg9gi9tNwPh0uFecRc5X1m6dAVuylwja6EO1Vyls8w4e-NAMQPzyXcrnkzFF6TdRlGkF4LxJqkrPa2XqpSCcpTuQwLXkjklrn9Zv59yjo4W4xQKD2gyHn9F18FLru0eqOGwcPIvyzjKWxSmYD_MqDDIfNQtoc_fxBjzQCXN5NL7uNbVAbjLMJUxAr4tEZwL0NN2EsbT7lw0QB5QUW3RR4FRFoUvDNFc6KdBcSZZOYVXjsF06K2Tw92BE9Coq2M_zedYo7qS5KMOqCOXmwBq6vUzXsJeih1z6arW-TK1-77ZgUUfC1ckdmGwm72cMo-sbUPLxC1-n2mdRGFZgjWnNKDoOMXcw%3D%3D)
---
|
---
Fellow Conservative, This week, I issued a subpoena to FBI Director Christopher Wray for an FD-1023 form that a whistleblower said links Joe Biden to a criminal scheme.
We’ve been wondering why so many foreign nationals paid the Bidens so much money, and we could be very close to finding out.
**This FD-1023 form that the FBI has links Joe Biden himself to a criminal scheme involving money for policy decisions during his vice presidency.**
It is with a heavy heart that I fear our Commander-in-Chief may be compromised by foreign actors, and I’m going to do everything in my power to deliver the whole truth to the American people.
These revelations destroy the Democrat’s and media’s false narrative about Joe Biden and his family, and they are going to fight until the end to stop me from exposing their lies.
I am under constant attack, and they are only going to intensify as I get closer to providing Americans the facts. **[My only defense is fighting back and defending my integrity and credibility, and I rely on grassroots conservatives to help me do that. ](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=0e31a757632c4aaa9ebde15e9f9cc0c9&_e=-RFS9-KORofQXLVvMwWg_2UrtxjIfOs7vAzB_NE-gw6QkajJpaQ5la85OJZg9gi9tNwPh0uFecRc5X1m6dAVuylwja6EO1Vyls8w4e-NAMQPzyXcrnkzFF6TdRlGkF4LxJqkrPa2XqpSCcpTuQwLXkjklrn9Zv59yjo4W4xQKD2gyHn9F18FLru0eqOGwcPIvyzjKWxSmYD_MqDDIfNQtoc_fxBjzQCXN5NL7uNbVAbjLMJUxAr4tEZwL0NN2Esb3DujB2r9Fp8VoRkohAEDQdxiAflsZvwHjG5ChItXgeiSlBiYAI_3ID4YCBzUWIqTH8wKMEz3KK7ZXLiUnZkTIO5BNYdkgNs9LI3K414zUlHZeUZIT6bcOPlr4dq1lAnug6BqUhMoCF1BjS_vzBQq9Q%3D%3D)**
| [ **DEFEND COMER** ](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=0e31a757632c4aaa9ebde15e9f9cc0c9&_e=-RFS9-KORofQXLVvMwWg_2UrtxjIfOs7vAzB_NE-gw6QkajJpaQ5la85OJZg9gi9tNwPh0uFecRc5X1m6dAVuylwja6EO1Vyls8w4e-NAMQPzyXcrnkzFF6TdRlGkF4LxJqkrPa2XqpSCcpTuQwLXkjklrn9Zv59yjo4W4xQKD2gyHn9F18FLru0eqOGwcPIvyzjKWxSmYD_MqDDIfNQtoc_fxBjzQCXN5NL7uNbVAbjLMJUxAr4tEZwL0NN2Esbct4Iok9qpZLpUZ6OUhrGJZzk7suSX-kzRgVBgDw7VzdeVEbBoP89tICB42tSF5UiGsz90yhsKlc0qrII-oB6bxLDh8vTfNUp_yFL6zZVxs1ZdaciwYrF8wN2eHckctoq4PDWyFFFVw0DEoE0yGsxmA%3D%3D)
---
Like I’ve said before, county boys from West Kentucky are a tough breed, _**we don’t back down and we don’t cave to pressure from high and mighty big city liberals on cable TV.**_
But that’s not going to stop the folks in the mainstream media from attacking me and trying to destroy the credibility of my work and the good name I’ve spent an honest life building.
**[So please, if you’re able, chip in a couple bucks so my team and I can mount a defense to the onslaught of attacks that have already begun.](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=0e31a757632c4aaa9ebde15e9f9cc0c9&_e=-RFS9-KORofQXLVvMwWg_2UrtxjIfOs7vAzB_NE-gw6QkajJpaQ5la85OJZg9gi9tNwPh0uFecRc5X1m6dAVuylwja6EO1Vyls8w4e-NAMQPzyXcrnkzFF6TdRlGkF4LxJqkrPa2XqpSCcpTuQwLXkjklrn9Zv59yjo4W4xQKD2gyHn9F18FLru0eqOGwcPIvyzjKWxSmYD_MqDDIfNQtoc_fxBjzQCXN5NL7uNbVAbjLMJUxAr4tEZwL0NN2EsbrsDYfD_C3_x2E6nDlyuxMxh44XJ9U_dfOXksKU6nO4681IgEGo55_bX4DBiPgXP-BaGrq1lMWTn2wLdYdJmQvxAiMZUt4oss-JpO20fUyRYGELinHxKw36WEMPl-3TmCHrY7PXRDRWzBmbh_lWzcJg%3D%3D)**
If you can’t, please take the time to say a prayer for our country, we’re going to need it.
With Courage,
| |
---
|
---
**James Comer**
Chairman,**** House Oversight Committee

We’ve been wondering why so many foreign nationals paid the Bidens so much money, and we could be very close to finding out. This FD-1023 form that the FBI has links Joe Biden himself to a criminal scheme involving money for policy decisions during his vice presidency. It is with a heavy heart that I fear our Commander-in-Chief may be compromised by foreign actors, and I’m going to do everything in my power to deliver the whole truth to the American people. These revelations destroy the Democrat’s and media’s false narrative about Joe Biden and his family, and they are going to fight until the end to stop me from exposing their lies. I am under constant attack, and they are only going to intensify as I get closer to providing Americans the facts. | Like I’ve said before, county boys from West Kentucky are a tough breed, we don’t back down and we don’t cave to pressure from high and mighty big city liberals on cable TV. But that’s not going to stop the folks in the mainstream media from attacking me and trying to destroy the credibility of my work and the good name I’ve spent an honest life building. If you can’t, please take the time to say a prayer for our country, we’re going to need it. With Courage, | | | James Comer Chairman,** House Oversight Committee | | | | | | | Paid for by Comer for Congress** %unsubscribeurl%

name: Anna Kaplan
subject: I will defeat George Santos
disclaimer_text: Paid for by AB PAC
body:
| | |
---
Congressman George Santos claimed he was Jewish.

He claimed his grandparents survived the Holocaust and that his mother survived the September 11th terrorist attacks in New York City.

He claimed he graduated from college as a star volleyball player, worked for Goldman Sachs, and ran a foundation that rescued 2500 dogs and cats.

**_These claims were lies – all of them. _**

And that doesn’t even scratch the surface of the web of brazen lies Santos told to get elected.

**George Santos is a disgrace. He’s an embarrassment to our district, state, and country. And now, he’s facing 13 federal charges for crimes including money laundering and fraud.**
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63176034/405861930/-1594784076?amounts=15,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2594-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Nzc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjg2MTRiMWFkLWM3ZjAtZWQxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=3NpwTyz3cukzFqUKrwxhNMVOdSB-Kq4rjID7ovSG8K8=)
**So today, I’m announcing my intention to run for Congress to replace him.**

**My name is Anna Kaplan, and I’m asking for your support.[ Will you pitch in $25 or more – split with American Bridge PAC – to help me send George Santos into political retirement? ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63176035/405861931/-1594784076?amounts=15,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2594-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Nzc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjg2MTRiMWFkLWM3ZjAtZWQxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=3NpwTyz3cukzFqUKrwxhNMVOdSB-Kq4rjID7ovSG8K8=)**
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63176036/405861932/-1594784076?amounts=15,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2594-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Nzc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjg2MTRiMWFkLWM3ZjAtZWQxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=3NpwTyz3cukzFqUKrwxhNMVOdSB-Kq4rjID7ovSG8K8=)
I was born in Iran to a Jewish family. My family faced religious persecution, so at age 13, my parents put me on a plane, not knowing when – or if – they’d see me again. I landed in New York and found a place where women had real rights and could determine their futures.

I graduated from college and law school and met my husband, Darren. I ran for Town Council and won. And when our state legalized gay marriage, and the town clerk refused to perform the ceremonies, I proudly stepped in to perform them.

Next, I ran for New York State Senate, unseated a well-funded Republican, flipped the seat, and flipped the chamber to give Democrats control for the first time in decades. In the Senate, I sponsored and passed bills codifying Roe v. Wade and banning untraceable ghost guns.
**Now, I’m running for Congress to provide real representation to the people of New York because the truth is, Santos’ lies aren’t even the worst thing about him. **

**Santos is a Trump-supporting, election-denying, anti-choice, and pro-assault rifle disgrace to our district. He doesn’t represent our values, and I’m committed to defeating him next November.**

**[But that’s only going to happen with your support. So today, I’m asking: Will you split $25 between American Bridge PAC and my campaign to help me defeat George Santos? ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63176037/405861933/-1594784076?amounts=15,25,50,100,250&amount=25&refcode=jtk2594-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Nzc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjg2MTRiMWFkLWM3ZjAtZWQxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=3NpwTyz3cukzFqUKrwxhNMVOdSB-Kq4rjID7ovSG8K8=)**

name: Indiana Republican Party
subject: Read the Polls, Jack!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE INDIANA REPUBLICAN STATE COMMITTEE
body:
The Party Line — An Indiana Republican Party Newsletter
| | |
---
|
---
# _Read the Polls, Jack!_
---
At a rare press conference two weeks ago, President Biden was asked about recent polling that again showed an overwhelming majority of Americans don't want him to run for reelection. His response? "When the same polling data asks what kind of job I've done, it gets overwhelmingly positive results." The next day, Gallup released a poll showing his approval rating at 37%, the lowest of his presidency to date. Talk about tough timing. But that certainly hasn't been the end of his polling woes. The president started off his week with more bad news when, this past Sunday, the Washington Post released its latest again showing his approval rating slipping to new lows, more Americans doubting his mental acuity than not, and his support falling against Republican challengers. And Tuesday it got worse when Gallup released another poll showing 48% of Americans' confidence in the president "to do or recommend the right thing for the economy" is "almost none." Perhaps the president should take his own advice and "read the polls, Jack," instead of doubling down on his failed policies. But the new Republican House majority is taking bold action to reverse the damage of this presidency. That includes passing the Limit, Save, and Grow Act to lift the debt limit, end wasteful Washington spending, and put our country back on the right economic path, and passing the Secure the Border Act. Thankfully, they're just getting started. Enjoy this week's newsletter. Sincerely,
---
---
Chairman Kyle Hupfer
---
|
---
**Forwarded this newsletter from a friend?[Sign up for The Party Line here.](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/2e05b9c0f4f57557/b489315f93a5f764c3d6b838967d376c/40313)**
---
|
---
| |
# **Governor Holcomb's Week That Was**
---
| |
# _Taking Trails to the 'Next Level,' Again_
---
| |
---
_**Governor Eric Holcomb** participates in a ribbon cutting of the River Greenway Trail._**
---
This week, Governor Eric Holcomb announced details for the fourth round of the Next Level Trails (NLT) grant program, which will dedicate an additional $30 million to connect communities through more hiking, biking, and riding trails across the state.

**Zoom in:** As part of the governor’s Next Level Connections initiative, NLT is the largest infusion of trails funding in state history.
* The now $180 million program is administered by the DNR and facilitates critical trail connections within and between Hoosier communities.
* To date, NLT has awarded $150 million to 75 projects across the state.

**The latest:** The fourth round will award up to $22.5 million to regional projects and up to $7.5 million to local projects.
**From the governor:** “Through the largest infusion of trail funding in Hoosier history, Indiana’s Next Level Trails are connecting Hoosiers and our communities to each other and the great outdoors like never before,” said **Gov. Holcomb**. “With this next round of trails investments, we’ll continue Indiana’s momentum as a nationally recognized trail leader, building new connections across the state.”
**More:** Gov. Holcomb celebrated the opening of the River Greenway Trail, a 1.86-mile asphalt trail was built with help from a $642,600 NLT grant awarded in 2021.
---
| | |
---
# _Register for Our 2023 Municipal Candidate Training_
---
---
We recently announced our 2023 municipal candidate training —**** IN IT TO WIN: Victory in Indiana's Cities & Towns. **Details:** The training will be held on**** Saturday, June 10, 2023,**** at the University of Indianapolis. More details will be forthcoming. **What to expect: **This one-day session will include breakout sessions with industry experts and consultants on all things grassroots, finance, and communications, to give candidates and their campaigns the winning edge for November. **Take action:** You can now **[register](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/2e05b9c0f4f57557/b931de4caf4141acc3d6b838967d376c/40313)** for an early bird discount of $75.
---
|
---
# _Rest in Peace, Bill Oesterle_
---
It's with great sadness that we share the passing of **Bill Oesterle** , a great Hoosier who dedicated his life to building a stronger Indiana and lifting up all those around him. **Bill's** long career in business and politics was full of many accomplishments, including co-founding Angie's List, one of Indiana's largest publicly traded companies, and managing Mitch Daniels' successful first gubernatorial campaign in 2004. His loss will be deeply felt by many, and indeed, the state. You can read more about Bill's life [here](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/2e05b9c0f4f57557/40a363cc4e556ef1c3d6b838967d376c/40313).
---
|
---
# _House Republicans pass 'Secure the Border Act' _
---
Yesterday, **U.S. House Republicans** passed the strongest border security bill the country has ever seen, with zero support from the Democrats. **Context:** In President Biden's first 100 days, he took more than 94 executive actions on immigration that have weakened our system and led to more than 6.3 million illegal border crossings, including 1.3 million gotaways that have escaped past border patrol into the country.
* But he hasn't done it alone, Democrats have voted to [**aid**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/2e05b9c0f4f57557/4437d3ffef0da135c3d6b838967d376c/40313) sanctuary cities, against [hiring](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/2e05b9c0f4f57557/a190a5e03fa3f7cfc3d6b838967d376c/40313) more border patrol agents and [funding](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/2e05b9c0f4f57557/72840cf422ec7056c3d6b838967d376c/40313) Title 42, and repeatedly against [funding](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/2e05b9c0f4f57557/46b7ef2d9937f378c3d6b838967d376c/40313) the border wall.

**The solution** : The [Secure the Border Act](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/2e05b9c0f4f57557/33af686ed34279e8c3d6b838967d376c/40313) delivers on Republicans' Commitment to America to end the chaos.
* The bill would fix our broken asylum system, hire more Border Patrol agents and provide them with resources they need, reinstate policies like Remain in Mexico, and force the Biden administration to resume building the border wall.

---
|
---
# _Fox News: Federal judge blocks Biden admin from releasing migrants without court dates as Title 42 expires_
---
From [Fox News](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/2e05b9c0f4f57557/8cf861bf0e13d617c3d6b838967d376c/40313)[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/2e05b9c0f4f57557/42c5416a9e7bd120c3d6b838967d376c/40313): "A federal judge on Thursday evening blocked the Biden administration from implementing a policy that allows for the release of migrants without court dates – just hours away from the end of the Title 42 public health order. "Judge T. Kent Wetherell II imposed a two-week restraining order on the Biden administration policy, which would see migrants released on 'parole with conditions.' "The policy was outlined in a Border Patrol memo this week, which says that migrants can be allowed into the country on parole — a process typically reserved for "urgent humanitarian reasons or significant public benefit" — if Customs and Border Protection (CBP) faces overcrowding. The memo calls the practice "parole with conditions" as migrants are required to make an appointment with Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) or request a Notice to Appear by mail." _[Story continues.](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/2e05b9c0f4f57557/e37cb12ba94fa7d3c3d6b838967d376c/40313)_
---
|
---
# _Session Spotlight: SEA 5_
---
This session, there were 252 bills passed by the legislature and signed by **Gov. Holcomb**. Over the next several weeks, this section will be dedicated to highlighting some of those bills. **The bill:** SEA 5 (consumer data protection), signed May 1, 2023. **The details:** SEA 5 establishes consumer rights regarding personal data and require businesses to have data protection assessment and security checks.
* This "bill of rights" for data privacy will allow Hoosiers to monitor how their data is being used and have it deleted, if they so choose.

---
|
---
# _The Latest Biden fact check from the RNC_
---
The Republican National Committee (RNC) has launched [factcheckbiden.com](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/2e05b9c0f4f57557/302b3708f536f9fbc3d6b838967d376c/40313), a website solely dedicated to fact checking President Biden in real time. _**Biden Is Fearmongering 2022 Spending Levels He Once Celebrated**_ Biden is dishonestly attempting to frame [2022 spending levels](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/2e05b9c0f4f57557/7b4be669e67f547ec3d6b838967d376c/40313) as a [painful cutback](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/2e05b9c0f4f57557/2e4647e11dc5eaa1c3d6b838967d376c/40313), despite having previously [signed](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/2e05b9c0f4f57557/3423ef860022af57c3d6b838967d376c/40313) off on these exact spending levels last year.
* When Biden signed the FY2022 appropriations bill into law that set levels where House Republicans’ plan would again cap them, Biden said the legislation “[sends a clear message to the American people that we’re investing in safety, health, and the future of Americans](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/2e05b9c0f4f57557/7dd3df9ce004a007c3d6b838967d376c/40313).”
* Biden praised these exact same funding levels for providing veterans with “world-class health care.”
* Senate Majority Leader Chuck Schumer (D-NY) and then-Speaker Nancy Pelosi (D-CA) also celebrated these spending levels, releasing a [joint statement](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/2e05b9c0f4f57557/be15814199d541c2c3d6b838967d376c/40313) praising Biden’s “bold vision.”
* While Republicans want to rein in spending to where it was just [four months ago](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/2e05b9c0f4f57557/39fe32bfa4f2bcf1c3d6b838967d376c/40313), they have also firmly stated they “[will not](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/2e05b9c0f4f57557/699d5b7b819c34c5c3d6b838967d376c/40313)” cut veterans spending.

---
|

"The policy was outlined in a Border Patrol memo this week, which says that migrants can be allowed into the country on parole — a process typically reserved for "urgent humanitarian reasons or significant public benefit" — if Customs and Border Protection (CBP) faces overcrowding. The memo calls the practice "parole with conditions" as migrants are required to make an appointment with Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) or request a Notice to Appear by mail." | Session Spotlight: SEA 5 This session, there were 252 bills passed by the legislature and signed by Gov. Holcomb. Over the next several weeks, this section will be dedicated to highlighting some of those bills. The bill: SEA 5 (consumer data protection), signed May 1, 2023. The details: SEA 5 establishes consumer rights regarding personal data and require businesses to have data protection assessment and security checks. This "bill of rights" for data privacy will allow Hoosiers to monitor how their data is being used and have it deleted, if they so choose. | The Latest Biden fact check from the RNC The Republican National Committee (RNC) has launched , a website solely dedicated to fact checking President Biden in real time. Biden Is Fearmongering 2022 Spending Levels He Once Celebrated Biden is dishonestly attempting to frame as a , despite having previously off on these exact spending levels last year. When Biden signed the FY2022 appropriations bill into law that set levels where House Republicans’ plan would again cap them, Biden said the legislation “.” Biden praised these exact same funding levels for providing veterans with “world-class health care.” Senate Majority Leader Chuck Schumer (D-NY) and then-Speaker Nancy Pelosi (D-CA) also celebrated these spending levels, releasing a praising Biden’s “bold vision.” While Republicans want to rein in spending to where it was just , they have also firmly stated they “” cut veterans spending. | Upcoming Events Across the State May 12: May 13: May 18: May 20: May 23: June 7: Events past theses dates are available on our website and will be added to the newsletter as we get closer to them. mailto:lthomas@indiana.gop?subject=Information%20for%20Upcoming%20GOP%20Event | News You Can Use Governor Eric Holcomb Indiana's RV industry Lt. disclaimer_text: Paid for by JD Vance For Senate Inc
body:
to fix what the Left has done

|
---
Patriot,

**President Trump has already announced his 2024 campaign for President.** Each day, conservatives across America look towards the 2024 presidential election with hope, excitement, and determination. **[We need YOUR help to ensure that President Trump WINS in 2024, and conservatives WIN the majority in the U.S. Senate.](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=da40eed11d3447ed9daba24756d3426c&_e=MK3AeGKWPw7pLET8c_DvfeNTMufxU4qz6j8jZuab9g3kxd0eQsjEgmWkTYfS_9dq8O5IDTpVO7CjtH7fldqO_nt17btDt-g2AKlwqlaIXL-8kX9vdZfX_rd_aSGiGv0ihrS-ukkhUFgRalEg520NoncyoZQa5-tNnrDqWrd438VkUnEvo6S3p_DdZK_dYhHZUFT75SBBSqA-iRy2HUoQj1ngNNR_3KIlXwPuWTkg6kXecVXvbBZ-inOOsKEIL1ZVe9TuTgUhaACqFooLEmSoIT86v18DMKBzVQMX7L_N7e7qA04azPgs8Ia9alszouE_M-mhKunv4E5Gq_CGDLjmSWs6OO9IjHVhau4_fEyIbL8gRkFVQS9Mh1w0zOOrE5Vk7Vpj-PkjyC8w6rxdcAkMW__nLqEHRIqP9WRGIk9Fn7FOnWaPrbRHvxpuO8CJ8Fe8gnfurEwCylrWWXLMfOZsoUHvRK2M5ZBwGL8NpgBd4oUX-99ttIEV6md0lNqE3z40D8FXczmNtJpccQ-aQfZWLQ%3D%3D)**

We, and some top conservative strategists, believe that with President Trump on the ticket, _**voters will turn out in numbers we 've never seen before and our party will be VICTORIOUS on election night. **_

We want to make sure you know what we're fighting against. In case you have forgotten, Democrats are RUINING this country and throwing out our conservative values bit by bit.

**The border is open, and dangerous criminals, violent offenders, and illicit drugs are pouring into our country by the second. Our streets are crowded with unprosecuted criminals, and crime is rising daily in major cities and small towns across America.

The Radical Left is promoting pornography in our schools, drag queens in our libraries, and CRT in our classrooms - so our kids are leaving home in the morning with conservative values and returning with a Woke narrative imprinted on their brains.**

More broadly, America is suffering on the world stage and lacks respect from other nations - allies and enemies alike.

President Trump can fix ALL of this, but he won't be able to lift a finger unless we get him, and other key conservative voices, into the White House and Senate.

**[Please, chip in now.](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=da40eed11d3447ed9daba24756d3426c&_e=MK3AeGKWPw7pLET8c_DvfeNTMufxU4qz6j8jZuab9g3kxd0eQsjEgmWkTYfS_9dq8O5IDTpVO7CjtH7fldqO_nt17btDt-g2AKlwqlaIXL-8kX9vdZfX_rd_aSGiGv0ihrS-ukkhUFgRalEg520NoncyoZQa5-tNnrDqWrd438VkUnEvo6S3p_DdZK_dYhHZUFT75SBBSqA-iRy2HUoQj1ngNNR_3KIlXwPuWTkg6kXecVXvbBZ-inOOsKEIL1ZVe9TuTgUhaACqFooLEmSoIT86v18DMKBzVQMX7L_N7e7qA04azPgs8Ia9alszouE_M-mhKunv4E5Gq_CGDLjmSWs6OO9IjHVhau4_fEyIbL8gRkFVQS9Mh1w0zOOrE5VkM9goLqVjwW5nfWGx3cJTdR76SnnAqKriFn-hrnfCG0IJsS-zz0YGnXvhGIC1JGPD8UzF5mR47dAc2WniZTf3xI2nW1ZZeXIOW3QsChZewlr-riKNvLay03nKkkw71Og7TVGp2UZB4K81str8GN_CPg%3D%3D)** Feel free to research any of the issues I stated above - we need to be fully aware of what is happening to our country in order to protect, preserve, and save the America we love.

- Mac, GOP 2024 Alert Team

Peter,

Our official Campaign Kickoff will be held on Friday, June 2nd at La Fiesta Toledo, and I wanted to extend a special invitation your way!

**Tickets are free, but space is limited. RSVP today to secure your spot at Team Majewski’s official Campaign Kickoff!**
[](https://jrforohio.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f8b050a6338dbb74901cdea58&id=9225010b13&e=0426928d91)
| [CLICK HERE TO RSVP TODAY >>>](https://jrforohio.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f8b050a6338dbb74901cdea58&id=291d35f17a&e=0426928d91)
---
I’m running for Congress because we have a criminal in the White House, a corrupt career politician representing us in the House of Representatives, and an America-Last agenda being advanced by a radical political establishment.

I’m running for Congress to make your voice heard in Washington. That’s why I hope to see you on Friday, June 2nd at La Fiesta Toledo. The event begins at 6:00 pm.
[**Tickets are 100% but are expected to go quickly. RSVP today to secure your spot >>>**](https://jrforohio.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f8b050a6338dbb74901cdea58&id=a406afa4ce&e=0426928d91)
Join Team Majewski for an evening of good food, drinks, and to talk about the issues that are impacting you most.

I look forward to seeing you there, Peter!
[](https://jrforohio.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f8b050a6338dbb74901cdea58&id=63106ba248&e=0426928d91)
JR Majewski

_Even though Raja's all grown up, he’ll always be the little baby in this photo to me!_
Peter, I’ll be honest:
Emailing kind strangers to ask for money is new (_and a little scary_) to me.
But as a mother, I’ll do anything to help my son -- including stepping outside of my comfort zone!
So here’s what you need to know about Raja:
Our son comes from humble beginnings.
When we first arrived in the United States, we faced a difficult path.
Yet, Raja overcame the tough odds and made us so proud by getting a good education, becoming a small business owner, and getting elected to Congress.
But what I’m most proud of is that Raja has dedicated his life to fighting for the America that made our family’s story possible.
**[_Peter, I know Raja hates asking hard-working folks like you for money, but I also know how badly he’s relying on your support. A mother’s job never ends, so today, I’m asking for your help. It would mean the world to Raja to see your name on his list of contributions today.
