name: =?utf-8?Q?Chairman=20Eric=20Underwood?=
subject: A Chinese ‘police station’ near you?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NEBRASKA REPUBLICAN PARTY]( "PAID FOR BY THE NEBRASKA REPUBLICAN PARTY")
body:
We’d love to hear your thoughts on how it should be handled | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/d5a7b018b97c/n41kepo7ku-525279?e=25844e23a8)
---
| | [ ](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=c4770825be&e=25844e23a8)
---
| | Peter,
---
| Last month we learned that NYC isn’t the only state where Chinese ‘police stations’ have been operating in our nation.

According to the New York Post and a human rights group from Spain, Safeguard Defenders, [there’s a Chinese ‘police station’ in Nebraska as well.](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=2241a3153c&e=25844e23a8)
---
| [ ](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=42b50df59e&e=25844e23a8)
---
| As Nebraskans, we pride ourselves on our diversity, natural environment, agricultural industry, and competitive educational performance.

Anyone seeking an optimal quality of life amid those characteristics have made Nebraska their home, including foreigners from other nations.

America has prided itself on being the largest ‘melting pot’ in human history while becoming a nation of representative government of, by, and for the people.

Any individual who comes to Nebraska is subject to the laws of the municipality, county, state, and national laws of THIS homeland. Moreover, they also benefit from the Constitutional protections as set forth in our Bill of Rights.

We implore elected officials at the state and national level to investigate the existence of a Chinese police station in Nebraska, and assert the sovereignty of the United States.

This said, we’d love to hear your thoughts on how the existence of a Chinese police station in Nebraska should be handled.

**[Peter, I hope you’ll take a moment to answer this quick survey here](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=952fcd8a93&e=25844e23a8) :**
---
| [<< COMPLETE SURVEY >>](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=f6d9b71c80&e=25844e23a8 "<< COMPLETE SURVEY >>")
---
| The Nebraska Republican Party will always take a stand for the sovereignty of our state and nation.
---
| With Blessings,
---
|
---
| Nebraska GOP Chairman Eric Underwood
[NE.GOP](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=c34d5bbc61&e=25844e23a8)

[**P.S. We advocate non-stop for our shared values as a free people, and when you support the NEGOP with even $25, this empowers us to advance our efforts with even greater strength.**](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=85d45b6135&e=25844e23a8)

body:

Hi team, **We know that Mother’s Day can be busy for folks, so we wanted to take a moment before the weekend kicks off to wish all of you a happy Mother’s Day!** Being a mother is important to Andrea, and she was motivated to run for office to help build a better future for all of our children. For Andrea, that means fighting for a cleaner environment, an economy that doesn’t leave anyone behind, passing common-sense gun laws, improving access to healthcare, and so much more. We hope that this weekend you’re able to be with the people you love the most. Sincerely, _Team Salinas_

clean_body: Happy Mother’s Day from Team Salinas. = Hi team, We know that Mother’s Day can be busy for folks, so we wanted to take a moment before the weekend kicks off to wish all of you a happy Mother’s Day! Being a mother is important to Andrea, and she was motivated to run for office to help build a better future for all of our children. For Andrea, that means fighting for a cleaner environment, an economy that doesn’t leave anyone behind, passing common-sense gun laws, improving access to healthcare, and so much more. We hope that this weekend you’re able to be with the people you love the most. Sincerely, Team Salinas | | = Andrea Salinas for Oregon PO Box 230985 Tigard, OR 97281 Paid for by Andrea Salinas for Oregon Andrea is fighting for Oregon, fighting for affordable quality health care, an economy that works for everyone, and clean air, land, and water. Now, Andrea's ready to show Washington what hard work can accomplish – real, meaningful change for all of us. | =_

| | **Small Biz Support 🛍️**
---
---
| | From hardware stores to restaurants, small businesses are the backbone of our economy. In addition to providing products and services, they create stable jobs that help our communities thrive. East Tennessee is full of family-owned businesses that keep the state running. They have a special place in cities large and small, and I’m committed to helping them succeed. In fact, I was honored to receive the Guardian of Small Business award from National Federation of Independent Business (NFIB) last year. This week, Rep. Andy Kim (NJ-03) and I reintroduced the [Access Business Credit Act](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=2f946f6975f14428abe23fc50c7c9c80&_e=oOoJzS_xKC0MyKF0Fi0K_7yglEPIGaEBSKrq75t9zBRSzv3yjc0N5jE_3p7ZWBdpymsJ8MoyDXUBZYX2GoXNtqGbI2na7GgE32bVHGXjSvOT2M7XznSxIQehZvi8BFPQJmg2aItZRpSf9XTET53EuSeX4UYsrEGEEfw1e8JEI6AEU7j6AXSmt-CRil5HrQiow0HyzAdbbWIVkvmq2PzgSt6HnwYY529QOJ6UhvB1p6g_zpMcm9kPWv6LQt8srOPRs0OSX34XT_85bpEAJKJ1lLRuNO4ihdD38lHZgOG_Vyy_5zsxgMtfMW6U9vPbaGyVcOFFNSIj_RU6r24-yOai4g%3D%3D), a bill designed to make it easier for small businesses to access credit. How does it work? By hooking up community banks with incentives to lend to small businesses, we can amp up the economy and fuel some serious job growth. In other words, it's like giving them a sweet break on their taxes.
This legislation is a great way to support our local small businesses and ensure they have the resources they need. I’m proud to partner with Rep. Kim on this bill that will make a difference in our districts—and across the country.
---
| | |
---

[](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=2f946f6975f14428abe23fc50c7c9c80&_e=oOoJzS_xKC0MyKF0Fi0K_yVKuKebeYAD4jpbmpfCk13nOjY16FpZVdr2jxfbqFKSWRXoPu8f4nhy6oMyD56mK1zZfZGlPKWOh1Y57ZSConQLC6zllcOLy0ZmtrLMySuacBx68YVuQj2Bk2qrbDFrs7mnpl4srUB3hZqHiMn1Gt86V9IALa-lAeS0NfI-If6tXLJFSm4hPAdweF8mPgHf44nmapvLt1tbLYCndBhUL1qLnww0CGtPHExDVhqVdIw2VpiS2_omUyjj-Bd3333kSfm_fSpcetfcMKYerL32gdc6Lxw5z911varfmSVWgazO)

# Photo Credit: Navitat Canopy Adventures

---
| | East Tennessee is full of outdoor adventure—and that’s just one reason to love it—but it seems the rest of America is taking notes! Navitat Knoxville and Legacy Mountain Ziplines have both been nominated for this year’s USA Today’s [Top 10 Best Aerial Adventure Park](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=2f946f6975f14428abe23fc50c7c9c80&_e=oOoJzS_xKC0MyKF0Fi0K_2OoT89zoGIGuc6_PdW3Ia4lASKIq9fTwUu81cBPKWiP5a9f-Oo75L7Lr_Fmy7V-j975__u9ixgejbNgNOBIT3WD1OSAigiOtVbcEmuJBfv4P9mzZUPgYlakVH2evGTvkrQa8-V_a8kX2KWHSretVoUbGR94wubFouoBF12jJw3QjzFHTvpQplgIN6VjEEocH8zDSPdJy8ELZIv-m-TzIsiKFRYvl9YkCOgDXqHqmy3W). If you’ve ever visited Navitat Knoxville, you know it’s a great place to zipline through trees, test your balance on bridges, and navigate trails. Legacy Mountain Ziplines in Sevierville, and near Pigeon Forge and Gatlinburg, allow for ziplining in a “family-favorite destination.” The 4.5-mile ziplines have speeds up to 50 miles per hour! These places are now listed among some of the [top adventure and zipline companies](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=2f946f6975f14428abe23fc50c7c9c80&_e=oOoJzS_xKC0MyKF0Fi0K_yVKuKebeYAD4jpbmpfCk13nOjY16FpZVdr2jxfbqFKSWRXoPu8f4nhy6oMyD56mK1zZfZGlPKWOh1Y57ZSConQLC6zllcOLy0ZmtrLMySuacBx68YVuQj2Bk2qrbDFrs4AxKrSqPm-ly4Okjqz6U7BhEznCSnco8xFa15AGk6r55dX3m9a6uPgzrWTZO1gwGfavEHk74M1gmtcmxvmiXbeK5fue3iYlkYheSDCObKE0NiF2Pr6JMKhtM0YnLh-b5dYO3NP9kaAn9dN67JQ1w5uBsCtj5fU5uNN7nEocIFed) in the entire country. Congratulations to the staff at both locations, and best of luck making it to the top of the list.

Fellow American,

I am sending you a different type of political email - _mostly because I am not building your typical political campaign._

When I launched my campaign for President, I knew that for us to win on November 5, 2024, we needed to change the way conservatives reach Americans–that's why I am looking to recruit founding members of our new cultural movement to revive the American Dream.

[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=0b9d5534df0a4b678af96c60f976869d&_e=K7w_WKEhCjW-9irSBkT-pYYZ_0IYBvfLfCRGfuRBN2ZtYkaE09uGpm15pcv9O46T5NmBo9CUo-ALOho0aS6C0oJUhV5aABVDgpq0PtNvVRUEK8_6EiJY2OhyQVs4-HUOIte5UTumOPR7MvAa5CTzlH7XHZFF1mG6vTXMCp0rjwLrnonH47BaWcEnFDR9IF4YyCn4t7ZlDNfDDh9vERmGzqbmj9YPVgwbkhP2liLPPtzNO3-3-wbSQtBD8DCLhW6yWMa6ZFEbG5LRQBsUHvxmnNQH74cfhIUgsgZzCvxWNerTyjBa_l4Cfwa3rVFjyvZFmrR5hcOgqvl9WpIE3qNWZTRG2kn03z_-MgHB2tq5U500DnQdLV6JAZDJZMw4zXxEPW3W4p5Ipe_JhX5TD__yy7gfYLy1Phys6L0bCY1WkZfPZCCPvhSoavF3S-tnGDT_)
I am running for President to restore the voices of everyday citizens. It's time to stand up to the ruling aristocracy. They try to divide and conquer, **but that won't work if we stay united.**

How do we start? Bottom-up, grassroots support. **[A $1 donation will help us take back the Oval Office from politicians and put it back in the people's hands.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=0b9d5534df0a4b678af96c60f976869d&_e=K7w_WKEhCjW-9irSBkT-pYYZ_0IYBvfLfCRGfuRBN2ZtYkaE09uGpm15pcv9O46T5NmBo9CUo-ALOho0aS6C0oJUhV5aABVDgpq0PtNvVRUEK8_6EiJY2OhyQVs4-HUOIte5UTumOPR7MvAa5CTzlH7XHZFF1mG6vTXMCp0rjwLrnonH47BaWcEnFDR9IF4YyCn4t7ZlDNfDDh9vERmGzqbmj9YPVgwbkhP2liLPPtzNO3-3-wbSQtBD8DCLhW6yWMa6ZFEbG5LRQBsUHvxmnOgciaW653PGr0bjUmkqibJA-RFtLZyG4wLZFLZES8AsSehG3bSQvzESIHE88LCqFCgudZhVP3-rRY6oXZ4fysAlOaMhh7HgQWE9tyYyTrkb72WF8s_o8LOs-DTE0lFgmf7-xz6mDJuhEtwHUPtHUqa4AsCVLRxT_a_bdwmoNiJ9)**

Change starts today. Thanks for joining this movement.

For The American Dream,

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

I am running for President to restore the voices of everyday citizens. It's time to stand up to the ruling aristocracy. They try to divide and conquer, but that won't work if we stay united. name: Patty Murray
subject: Over 200 mass shootings this year
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
body:
| | |
---
Folks – communities across the country have been devastated by over 200 mass shootings this year alone. _We cannot let this continue._
My home state of Washington just took needed action and banned assault weapons. Now, I'm calling on the _other_ __ Washington to pass a federal ban to save lives nationwide.
_[**Will you join me in the fight for our lives and add your name to my petition calling for a national ban on assault weapons?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63209515/405959253/1823834268?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2Fmurray-2023-assaultweaponsban-survey&code=jtk20-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNjQxNjAxMi1mY2YwLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Y5CzjEoJb2lXzYrHuTqkxCKpApi-N7DHgx4Z2gh25HI=&emci=6c383927-19f0-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=d6416012-fcf0-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=13116610)_

---
Allen. Louisville. Nashville. Monterey Park. Communities across the country have been ripped apart and are mourning the loss of loved ones because a dangerous person used a military-grade assault weapon to take precious lives too soon.
**It is painfully obvious: These weapons of war have no place in our streets. **
That's why I've been working to ban assault weapons. Ten states have taken action so far, but we need more grassroots support to show Republicans in Congress that it’s past time they _stand up_ __ to the NRA and _stand with_ people across the country to pass a national ban.
**[_I need my top supporters to join my call for action today. Can I count on you to speak out in favor of an assault weapons ban? Sign the petition before midnight tonight._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63209517/405959255/1823834268?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2Fmurray-2023-assaultweaponsban-survey&code=jtk20-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNjQxNjAxMi1mY2YwLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Y5CzjEoJb2lXzYrHuTqkxCKpApi-N7DHgx4Z2gh25HI=&emci=6c383927-19f0-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=d6416012-fcf0-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=13116610)**
| | [SIGN ON](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63209518/405959256/1823834268?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2Fmurray-2023-assaultweaponsban-survey&code=jtk20-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNjQxNjAxMi1mY2YwLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Y5CzjEoJb2lXzYrHuTqkxCKpApi-N7DHgx4Z2gh25HI=&emci=6c383927-19f0-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=d6416012-fcf0-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=13116610)

Thanks for using your voice. Together, we can make real change to save lives.

clean_body: | | | Folks – communities across the country have been devastated by over 200 mass shootings this year alone. We cannot let this continue. My home state of Washington just took needed action and banned assault weapons. Now, I'm calling on the other Washington to pass a federal ban to save lives nationwide. | | Allen. Louisville. Nashville. Monterey Park. Communities across the country have been ripped apart and are mourning the loss of loved ones because a dangerous person used a military-grade assault weapon to take precious lives too soon. It is painfully obvious: These weapons of war have no place in our streets. That's why I've been working to ban assault weapons. Ten states have taken action so far, but we need more grassroots support to show Republicans in Congress that it’s past time they stand up to the NRA and stand with people across the country to pass a national ban. | | Thanks for using your voice. Together, we can make real change to save lives. Patty Murray | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. People for Patty Murray PO BOX 3662 Seattle, WA 98124 United States | | PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY

I’m a 4th generation Texan, born and raised in Dallas by a single mom. My mom was a public school teacher and sometimes worked two jobs to make ends meet. Thanks to my family and a strong support system of teachers, coaches, and the good folks at the YMCA, I earned a full ride football scholarship to Baylor University and then went on to play in the NFL.

But playing football was never my only dream – from a young age I knew I wanted to help people. So I became a civil rights attorney to defend what I believe is our most fundamental right: the right to vote. I proudly served in President Obama’s administration before I came home to Dallas, where I’m now raising my family.

I ran for Congress because I wanted more kids in North Texas to have the opportunity to achieve their version of the American dream and protect the fundamental values of our democracy – and I beat the odds to defeat an 11-term Republican incumbent, helping Democrats flip the House blue in 2018.

_Now, I’m ready for my next challenge:_ taking on Ted Cruz. I know it won’t be easy, but I also know that Texans deserve so much better than Ted Cruz’s cynical partisan politics. Everything Ted Cruz does is for Ted Cruz – when I’m in the Senate, everything I do will be to help people like you. But I can’t get there alone:

[That’s why I’m asking you to chip in right now to become a founding donor of my campaign. We’re going to need an unprecedented grassroots movement to unseat Ted Cruz and I’m counting on you to be a part of it. Please, split $10 or whatever you can spare between my campaign and The Collective PAC to help win in Texas, defeat Ted Cruz and defend our Democratic Senate majority →](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wcVmDVfjroFVbol-C41V4cRYguM6dPmz-ie5ttM77WmgAPmVIfjRQ-iU_VXXnWFVUwJ1_gvthYQgg4vlDbSksWi2fQZxhAN9GJOMOZmAM1i1csq6KJ5b9kpEuVNLeRvVy_p12osdAFdGlK1zHv06e4sMxInH7lTwV4Y47KGj-NSANiI1AkHD11F1oM8BjNOvnYVeEn6M4-AzOKLuIf4izrVceBEfX9qcQZrUzin7xW1lsNME_pWjInUj3L3wWG8CAcbtvPVv6-W3zO4W04KjQWA_tFsKhnGQO406bZ7RrZlw4RXnLVbeV2vlB-KALdYZxcdqdXzPfJ1o8hE6-Sfh0YsBPqHYlk9dGh9pBEjPCSJbvvDTCDHb5tp5ZFuDFgNEI/3w4/TcuWDxdURKmCpW6g3PLrEA/h9/yRRaCHb0NibmLPFNJkbwYIVL7qFa5yQVfV1BFWrZJZM)

Thank you so much for helping me launch this campaign. We have a long way to go, but together, I know we’ve got what it takes to win this thing.

Let’s do this,

Colin Allred

Winning in Texas will all but guarantee Democrats are able to defend our razor-thin Senate majority – and CNN is already calling Ted Cruz one of the most vulnerable Senators in the country! That’s why I need you with me: Please, will you split $10 or whatever you can spare between my campaign and The Collective PAC to help reach our daily goal of $150,000? | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately and split between Colin Allred and The Collective PAC. | | | | | | I’m a 4th generation Texan, born and raised in Dallas by a single mom. My mom was a public school teacher and sometimes worked two jobs to make ends meet. Thanks to my family and a strong support system of teachers, coaches, and the good folks at the YMCA, I earned a full ride football scholarship to Baylor University and then went on to play in the NFL. But playing football was never my only dream – from a young age I knew I wanted to help people. So I became a civil rights attorney to defend what I believe is our most fundamental right: the right to vote. name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: Send a Letter: We need Medicare for All
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
It’s time to put people over profits and care over corporations. That’s why I’m reintroducing my Medicare for All bill to finally cement universal health care — everybody in, nobody out.
#
Peter, our current health care system does not work for us.
We’re now at the halfway mark of Q2 and we wanted to take a moment to ensure that our movement’s vision remains aligned with yours.
**Health care is a human right.** And it is unconscionable that America is the richest country in the world, yet over 40 million people are uninsured and cannot get health care due to extraordinarily high costs.
**It’s time to put people over profits and care over corporations, Peter. That’s why I’m reintroducing my Medicare for All bill to finally cement universal health care — everybody in, nobody out.**
[**If you’re ready to join our fight, send a letter to your Representative and Senators today and urge them to pass Medicare for All. We need as many community supporters as possible to make an impact in Congress.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/letter/urge-your-members-congress-pass-m4a-letter/?source=em20230512-2475&t=1&akid=2475%2E420207%2Ew27-se)
**[Send a letter ››](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/letter/urge-your-members-congress-pass-m4a-letter/?source=em20230512-2475&t=2&akid=2475%2E420207%2Ew27-se)**
The pandemic shed a direct light on our broken, for-profit health care system when nearly 27 million people lost their employer-sponsored health insurance due to job losses.
Looking at the COVID-19 pandemic and evaluating the true state of our longstanding health care system, the solution is increasingly clear: **We need Medicare for All.**
Under Medicare for All:
* **Everyone** **will have health care,** including dental, vision, hearing, and long term care.
* Expensive premiums, deductibles, co-pays, and other out of pocket costs **will be eliminated completely**.
* Roughly **95% of all U.S. households would save money** on healthcare costs.
* The **U.S. would save over $450 billion** on health expenses annually.

Our country’s lack of universal health care is a racial justice issue. It’s a gender justice issue. And it’s an economic justice issue. As a progressive leader, I have a moral and ethical obligation to advocate for solutions that meet the urgency of all of our needs.
[**Please stand with me and our collective progressive movement and urge lawmakers to pass Medicare for All today. Send a letter to your members of Congress and demand they put people over profits and pass a universal health care bill that supports us all.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/letter/urge-your-members-congress-pass-m4a-letter/?source=em20230512-2475&t=3&akid=2475%2E420207%2Ew27-se)
**[Send a letter ››](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/letter/urge-your-members-congress-pass-m4a-letter/?source=em20230512-2475&t=4&akid=2475%2E420207%2Ew27-se)**
In solidarity,
Congresswoman Pramila Jayapal

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20230512-2475-footer&t=5&refcode2=2475_420207_w27-se&akid=2475%2E420207%2Ew27-se)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.

* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=7&akid=2475%2E420207%2Ew27-se)

name: Donald J. Trump, me (2)
subject: re: My way of saying THANK YOU
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J
body:
Will you join me for dinner?

| | Friend,
---
As I've always said, the strength of our campaign will NEVER be determined by the size of our supporters' contributions, but by the sheer number of grassroots patriots in our ranks.
_Simply put, no big-money special interest will ever own me! _
And unlike Crooked Joe Biden, who only cares about the donors who will make him rich, hardworking Americans like **YOU** are my only special interest.
**Which is why I decided to extend a special invitation to our incredible grassroots donors - _no matter the amount of your gift_ - to enter a contest to join me at my beautiful golf club in Bedminster on June 13 (the eve of my birthday) for a dinner event!**
You don't have to worry about a thing, Friend. I'll take care of it all:
* Flights
* Accommodations
* Tickets to the event

_And my favorite part, we 'll even take a photo together so that you'll always remember this amazing evening!_
[**So please, make a contribution of any amount - _truly, even just $1_ - to be automatically entered to win.**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=bb480aaaaa0c47b5a8de32f02b64ef3c&_e=xEkBUhkzJFlIFRs-9NDOYIz5F-5X5Ie7ZexH71eYA4ajQf5L9YklPS6fk1HiLIhFEsA_QtVvrR5r_Gc_Aj3ovA8oaaIUM2XOt3G7aIvYHpRrwpOoNSwFxLsgWS9A_M9YYAlo7GnhELb0exGw_aIL4XaXrVYIgfftuClm8hIiRxqMQKBUKAc8MuRUKYbQok3OCL3IRMyXk8lFaks5w4MnbF7Yjlmm3pnWUJO4NUTZ_FzzRHaBzjQSS0acXDp8xD7a36jZRqpJM6x9N49rvewlRq5esZ9wC4ukdU7lneeUaBXdneOjmZLAsENcMWqObDTilqe1ldC1FHoZbuRbqmm7jfdF9u2_AEIAfzietLnrrgM84kEkzTOOFCmJsAV00TpBqnRwCZ29s3C3Auqdy8ewZw%3D%3D)

clean_body: Will you join me for dinner? | | Friend, As I've always said, the strength of our campaign will NEVER be determined by the size of our supporters' contributions, but by the sheer number of grassroots patriots in our ranks. Simply put, no big-money special interest will ever own me! And unlike Crooked Joe Biden, who only cares about the donors who will make him rich, hardworking Americans like YOU are my only special interest. Which is why I decided to extend a special invitation to our incredible grassroots donors - no matter the amount of your gift - to enter a contest to join me at my beautiful golf club in Bedminster on June 13 (the eve of my birthday) for a dinner event! You don't have to worry about a thing, Friend. I'll take care of it all: Flights Accommodations Tickets to the event And my favorite part, we 'll even take a photo together so that you'll always remember this amazing evening! | Thank you, | Donald J. name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: It’s official
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tony for Wisconsin
body:
Hi Derek —

Last month, I announced that I’m officially running for reelection to the
U.S. Senate. So today, I want to take a moment to tell you a little more
about the campaign we’re building — and why your early support is so
critical.

Here’s the deal: This campaign is not going to be about me — it will
always be about working for you.

It will be about standing up for your families, your health care, your
jobs, and your retirement. And it will be about building on the progress
we’ve made together — making sure you have the leadership you deserve in
Washington.

That’s what my work has always been about. It’s why I proudly cast my vote
to fight climate change, lower the cost of prescription drugs, and expand
health care for our veterans. It’s why I’ve fought so hard to protect
marriage equality for all Americans. It’s why I’ve defended Medicare and
Social Security from those who want to tear those critical resources away
from folks relying on them.

[ https://go.tonyevers.com/go/2052?amount=10&refcode=EM_NBI_TE_20230512_FR_Baldwin_0_3MO_TammyBaldwin_TammyBaldwin_NA_Baldwin&t=1001&akid=6247%2E1827488%2EnmRsqY ]Grassroots supporters like you have been by my side in fight after
fight. Now, I’m asking if you’ll stand by me once again by splitting a
donation between Tony Evers and my reelection campaign today.

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation
will be split between Tony Evers and Tammy Baldwin and processed immediately.

[ https://go.tonyevers.com/go/2053?amount=10&refcode=EM_NBI_TE_20230512_FR_Baldwin_0_3MO_TammyBaldwin_TammyBaldwin_NA_Baldwin&t=1002&akid=6247%2E1827488%2EnmRsqY ]Donate $10 Now

[ https://go.tonyevers.com/go/2053?amount=25&refcode=EM_NBI_TE_20230512_FR_Baldwin_0_3MO_TammyBaldwin_TammyBaldwin_NA_Baldwin&t=1003&akid=6247%2E1827488%2EnmRsqY ]Donate $25 Now

[ https://go.tonyevers.com/go/2053?amount=50&refcode=EM_NBI_TE_20230512_FR_Baldwin_0_3MO_TammyBaldwin_TammyBaldwin_NA_Baldwin&t=1004&akid=6247%2E1827488%2EnmRsqY ]Donate $50 Now

[ https://go.tonyevers.com/go/2053?amount=100&refcode=EM_NBI_TE_20230512_FR_Baldwin_0_3MO_TammyBaldwin_TammyBaldwin_NA_Baldwin&t=1005&akid=6247%2E1827488%2EnmRsqY ]Donate $100 Now

[ https://go.tonyevers.com/go/2053?amount=500&refcode=EM_NBI_TE_20230512_FR_Baldwin_0_3MO_TammyBaldwin_TammyBaldwin_NA_Baldwin&t=1006&akid=6247%2E1827488%2EnmRsqY ]Donate $500 Now

[ https://go.tonyevers.com/go/2052?amount=10&refcode=EM_NBI_TE_20230512_FR_Baldwin_0_3MO_TammyBaldwin_TammyBaldwin_NA_Baldwin&t=1007&akid=6247%2E1827488%2EnmRsqY ]Another Amount

We’ve got quite a long road ahead of us. National Republicans are already
targeting Wisconsin, and they’ll undoubtedly spend a fortune attacking me.

But I know I won’t have to fight back alone. Your early support in this race
will help ensure my team and I have the resources we’ll need to take on anything
coming our way, and I couldn’t be more grateful to have you with me.

Thank you in advance for anything you’re able to pitch in today as we get this
campaign started.

— Tammy

Paid for by Tony for Wisconsin

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://go.tonyevers.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=6247%2E1827488%2EnmRsqY

name: Dan Kildee for Congress
subject: Dan’s taking action for the Great Lakes

body:
| Michiganders deserve access to clean water. It’s that simple.

Our Great Lakes are an economic engine, helping to support 1.3 million jobs. The Great Lakes are also part of who we are as Michiganders. Everyone in our state has fond memories on the water with family and friends. That’s why we must ensure our water remains safe, clean and protected for generations to come.

PFAS chemicals are an urgent public health threat. There is no safe level of these “forever” chemicals, yet hundreds of Michigan sites and water systems have found contamination.

**Dan takes his responsibility to protect Michiganders from PFAS chemicals and other hazards seriously. That’s why he just relaunched the bipartisan Congressional PFAS Task Force, to more quickly clean up these toxic chemicals.**

**_[Do you agree that Michigan families deserve clean water? Click here by midnight to be one of the 5,000 we need to sign on to support Dan’s efforts to protect our Great Lakes and communities from PFAS→](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63213000/405962116/-1306678493?source=EM_NBI_DK_20230512_PT_1.1_0_3MO_campaign_NA_NA_PFAS&refcode2=231fcc99-fef0-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Nzg3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMzFmY2M5OS1mZWYwLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UwNIHswhxF_Jj4KsrC7I5C9AmBQBQYcy19Yn5ah2vPQ=&emci=3408fa40-fef0-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=231fcc99-fef0-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=31479900)_**

Dan has one of the strongest track records in Congress for fighting for our environment, clean water, and our Great Lakes.

He worked with Republicans and Democrats to get federal aid to his hometown of Flint during the water crisis.

And he has led efforts to oppose a permanent Canadian nuclear waste storage site near the Great Lakes.

**_[Now, Dan needs you to help him keep this work up. Will you sign on right now and support Dan as he leads the fight for clean water?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63213002/405962118/-1306678493?source=EM_NBI_DK_20230512_PT_1.1_0_3MO_campaign_NA_NA_PFAS&refcode2=231fcc99-fef0-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Nzg3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMzFmY2M5OS1mZWYwLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UwNIHswhxF_Jj4KsrC7I5C9AmBQBQYcy19Yn5ah2vPQ=&emci=3408fa40-fef0-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=231fcc99-fef0-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=31479900)_**

Progress has been made, but we must recommit to protecting our Great Lakes and addressing PFAS chemicals.

— Team Kildee

Friend,

We founded Their Future PAC because our leaders are ignoring the 73 million children in America. In Congress, Republicans just passed a budget bill that would cut funding for critical programs that children and families across the country rely on.

The GOP’s extreme budget plan cuts funding for schools and child care (including Head Start early childhood education), food assistance programs for low-income children and families, and programs that support students with disabilities. The budget also makes it easier for polluters to poison our environment and jeopardizes access to affordable health care for children and Americans of all ages.

**[That’s why I’m writing to you today. We need to speak with one voice and tell our representatives in Congress that they need to get serious, stop these partisan and dangerous bills, and start centering children and families in their policy decisions. Stand with Their Future PAC by writing to your representative today.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnnniTcSX4bgWnR-FeoHhYSK8kcJT4BDDHrzhmUcjOpiZOl4pBzuTvBtGyyGVEMJVRRvFVcRC0PFi9AMpLr2KiAlm4tkD7J7tzCXQNyRKAfP8AN5nvTXsfjA96kZGaM0H4rTu5NTsN-4sTjnMYyVS2oi_ymrBwISsWFP7IRpo4oI7UktsAnPFHHQGhjJLipl54W8LdhqeeG3eRdB2TkueiEiZ8Uxmz9Yp-c6H24NGaaivH2MsnmdT2e3unXm2Z5HgO00rDVMfVCMwuNa6H63StVBNV01LG-NvoPHiOl1EoyANy6UO_Q2RYxwKoT6N8D_1szgwCys_mdF50cbK8c-QKUwaIs3_3aDKkXOBGGbexHGgAvaP1wWj7c97KQqckwO1ZgTKJ-SJwbZ0HQT4MViMXaL/3w4/_dB8Q9lkTlKhWJwfRmpuyQ/h1/-C2qlq5EEQAZnyoq2_JaDfj2k5axwcswGXHnNTIgY18)**

Our goal is to build a better future for our children by centering them in public policy decisions and holding leaders and lawmakers accountable for their actions. From school boards and state houses to the House and Senate, Their Future PAC is working hard to advocate for children across America.

**[Right now, we need to fight back against the Republican budget that would cut funding for critical programs that support children and families in every community. Will you join Their Future PAC by writing a letter to your representative today? Our children are counting on us.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnnniTcSX4bgWnR-FeoHhYSK8kcJT4BDDHrzhmUcjOpiZOl4pBzuTvBtGyyGVEMJVRRvFVcRC0PFi9AMpLr2KiAlm4tkD7J7tzCXQNyRKAfP8AN5nvTXsfjA96kZGaM0H4rTu5NTsN-4sTjnMYyVS2oi_ymrBwISsWFP7IRpo4oI7UktsAnPFHHQGhjJLipl54W8LdhqeeG3eRdB2TkueiEizzrxLzbN7hW_kHsnzljxY6IHRNjXh4Tb8Y83rccFQTUuUZZwMSwahxc42Rj77_Spx_3YLJz5MkIMPGPnvAgeVX_31kpj3vXPP7_vIJU9BZaXHnZu33YhQIsHU4VQ-lXAWAuTUZgF1hEQggJmP4LgJ89Vw9wFweDZGvgzjsjMXy3U1Mf4527hBayAsd2WuE8J/3w4/_dB8Q9lkTlKhWJwfRmpuyQ/h3/U-W2bJG5JYBV6GI7b2A881PP1yo5jYlqChjjM60NPTM)**

name: Margaret Mary Dunn
subject: Save my son from the woke mob
body:
please keep Michael and our family in your prayers.

I'm praying God will touch your heart as you read this letter to help me save my son, Michael.

Michael is a police officer who dedicated his life to keeping our community safe in Farmers Branch, Texas.

_**But now he might be facing a life sentence in prison for shooting a dangerous career criminal who tried to run Michael down in a stolen truck.**_

[**Will you help my son?**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=958bc29d9d42404897660f8febdadfcc&_e=Hn776jbOKI788NCPkpG3eXy-n8KdIIlc0SrCfCHBJE5sg4zT67yaqtpe2gtSLQJzfLC08oB5q6xLrp_wbpA8-EcI7qTl6O1IzvYH-2u3Rijetu_yuVx79OSfevWvxlgbdEO6dxN3ygupsdTt8ejNRLuARbn4CznX5GXcNpDKDun6D7YO9_F9eRFmzbzDXrlLbKscwaYpwnfuj1o2ei66loeQSyRzgnJPtyJ-f5JdG8TMDnnm4cF2cde5-plN_gZpCDd9L51vb10d9-dFr_Ua2MVAJaf6yOi3AHy2Kea_pSfOrnUjtl8-HXBfNEkK_Z8Ul622TMhJke61EgpOInUHzt_bE23wLauTm2TZS6DV4EU%3D)

That's Michael in the photo.

[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=958bc29d9d42404897660f8febdadfcc&_e=Hn776jbOKI788NCPkpG3eXy-n8KdIIlc0SrCfCHBJE5sg4zT67yaqtpe2gtSLQJzfLC08oB5q6xLrp_wbpA8-EcI7qTl6O1IzvYH-2u3Rijetu_yuVx79OSfevWvxlgbdEO6dxN3ygupsdTt8ejNRLuARbn4CznX5GXcNpDKDun6D7YO9_F9eRFmzbzDXrlLnrKuBP4amGIvCDZgSH2M451i9grWq3iac-TLkGDHhcve-ONdPEUswSuyRAU8ZuPjWCzF2Uzi4Z02dknbhBJKJy5bTgi7JoJ8cKqGaS_xKufwPSQ5XXXxu1ro4w3N_AXJJ8H6z_G_KBkPqlGJ-4PObdda06DL5WnxpyvbZuBGy7g%3D) [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=958bc29d9d42404897660f8febdadfcc&_e=Hn776jbOKI788NCPkpG3eXy-n8KdIIlc0SrCfCHBJE5sg4zT67yaqtpe2gtSLQJzfLC08oB5q6xLrp_wbpA8-EcI7qTl6O1IzvYH-2u3Rijetu_yuVx79OSfevWvxlgbdEO6dxN3ygupsdTt8ejNRLuARbn4CznX5GXcNpDKDun6D7YO9_F9eRFmzbzDXrlLDoMF2Hy8T43CctXGKpbD3Vo_cyzyFbEao5ocY_IzYdqP-39GwXRFVRoVflk7JDXnlIw9POD6jS9JtXql3YTeg9GeYo4IohrBkNuArrTqhV5GNzs549bKCRrfukpulY2kPS8L2B1vgSIA_PTMiw3ZLiW6vs041evMUIpd9HYmP-4%3D)

In addition to being a police officer, Michael is also a Master Gunnery Sergeant in the United Stated Marine Corps Reserve.

I knew when he joined the police department that it was a dangerous job.

Every night on the news I saw another story of a police officer ambushed or killed in the line of duty.

It's been a heart wrenching time for the families of police officers in recent years.

What I didn't expect was that so many Americans would turn their backs on Michael in his time of need.

I now realize that it's all about fear. Fear of being attacked as a racist.

Fear of going against woke politicians and bureaucrats.

Fear of losing their jobs.

I assumed that the police department, the prosecutor's office, and everyone else in the government and the community would have Michael's back.

**But I was wrong.**

_So_ _now_ _Michael 's_ _life_ _is_ _at_ _stake_ _for_ _simply_ _doing_ _his_ _job_ _and_ _we_ _have_ _nobody_ _to_ _turn_ _to_ _except_ _for_ _good_ _hearted_ _strangers_ _like_ _you._

**[Will you please help me save my son Michael?](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=958bc29d9d42404897660f8febdadfcc&_e=Hn776jbOKI788NCPkpG3eXy-n8KdIIlc0SrCfCHBJE5sg4zT67yaqtpe2gtSLQJzfLC08oB5q6xLrp_wbpA8-EcI7qTl6O1IzvYH-2u3Rijetu_yuVx79OSfevWvxlgbdEO6dxN3ygupsdTt8ejNRLuARbn4CznX5GXcNpDKDun6D7YO9_F9eRFmzbzDXrlLMjDbC8w8CA74L41xoazn798IPze7nwcthUYrIG3e-n0HvgFWe1RFsBwkI2Vlsbt0NMpD2xfxQXtC9WBzy759FXcZTDW7PZSgVgWH8F6d9zuurvQrqRLw2Wa3KXJ2L4PrBm3qLRD12aAFhpuL547TJ7pFw2B8TWD0WjALAi38qws%3D)**

Let me give you some more of the details...

Michael and other Farmers Branch Police detectives tracked a stolen pickup truck to the parking lot of an "adult arcade."

The truck was stolen by a convicted felon who was well-known to the police.

Michael was assigned the task of arresting this man.

When the suspect came back to the truck, Michael pulled up and stepped out of his police car.

The criminal sped the stolen truck toward him.

Michael had to do what every police officer hopes they never have to do: he drew his weapon and fired.

The man driving the stolen truck died at the scene.

My son suffered back and leg injuries.

Michael had a split-second to think about if the career criminal speeding toward him was going to crush him to death with that stolen truck.

In that split-second, he did what he needed to do in order to save his own life and the lives of his fellow officers and community.

There's no doubt in my mind, and many others, that Michael made the right choice that day.

He should be considered a hero for putting his life on the line to protect others.

But right and wrong seem to have been turned upside down in the last few years.

Why else would they be trying to put my son in prison for murder for what he did?

That's why I'm willing to do whatever it takes to clear his name. **[Even if that means asking folks like you for financial support to help my son afford the best possible attorneys and legal advice.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=958bc29d9d42404897660f8febdadfcc&_e=Hn776jbOKI788NCPkpG3eXy-n8KdIIlc0SrCfCHBJE5sg4zT67yaqtpe2gtSLQJzfLC08oB5q6xLrp_wbpA8-EcI7qTl6O1IzvYH-2u3Rijetu_yuVx79OSfevWvxlgbdEO6dxN3ygupsdTt8ejNRLuARbn4CznX5GXcNpDKDun6D7YO9_F9eRFmzbzDXrlL2qSvwzLU0Bxccsu4MM9bEL8Bjq3bDh6fBmny9SFyFcTaRI8rMhK5uYxQrxxQ5yG-iJutLAWAtDhEv68ex_mDw6IgBRu1QRjYCVAAWLCSpOVaWq6dp0tF4fzZrQoFrL5H0-VcEYxieFbuKLN078GBxXuQbGGXgE2yEXrF-U1zOnY%3D)**

After the incident, Michael was distraught to hear the criminal died.

But the other officers assured him the shooting was justified.

And then our whole world was rocked.

**Just 8 days after the incident Michael was indicted.**

Experts described the indictment as "unusually swift." The president of the Dallas Police Association said:

"We have never had an investigation completed in less than eight days ready to hand over to the District Attorney. Never."

I knew in my heart something was wrong - and we would be facing the fight of our lives to defend Michael in court.

We started a fundraising campaign on the internet site "GoFundMe" to raise money for a proper legal defense.

After a few days, "GoFundMe" shut down the fundraiser.

They claimed Michael's actions as a police officer were an "act of hate" - and helping him violated their terms of service.

So in this anti-police climate, politically woke climate, the case was closed in their minds.

No "innocent until proven guilty." No due process.

Instead, my son was smeared as a "murderer" who committed a "hate crime."

Since then, my husband and I spent half our life savings on legal fees and bills to help Michael.

_With the investigation devastating my family... seeing Michael, an American hero, being smeared on the internet... and our family quickly running out of money to pay mounting court fees... hope was fading._

Until we heard about the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund (LELDF). **LELDF is the best friend a police officer could ever have.**

LELDF defends good officers, like my son, who have been unfairly prosecuted for split-second, use-of-force decisions in the line of duty.

The group's president, Jason Johnson, served over 20 years as a police officer, including as Deputy Commissioner of the Baltimore Police Department.

And praise the Lord, LELDF saw it fit to help my son!

**[Will you please consider sending a tax-deductible contribution to the LELDF so they can help my son beat his charges?](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=958bc29d9d42404897660f8febdadfcc&_e=Hn776jbOKI788NCPkpG3eXy-n8KdIIlc0SrCfCHBJE5sg4zT67yaqtpe2gtSLQJzfLC08oB5q6xLrp_wbpA8-EcI7qTl6O1IzvYH-2u3Rijetu_yuVx79OSfevWvxlgbdEO6dxN3ygupsdTt8ejNRLuARbn4CznX5GXcNpDKDun6D7YO9_F9eRFmzbzDXrlLTLKmHK4Rg6IUcRS8IGy2-ftwo-mUw7ZviA0dBW4PbNBTKKU9adrVl4umLBFo7RD38NDsw7rdJSBrUxa1-rL3mSn_AHCBJg_RfVVEJkLOpirvZwVFHHZDlh5BjjDiojNZbHjeb-kYPggEi8IIqjjJ7FP4ghQiLHyFDJ8-8uzyUUg%3D)**

You see, LELDF is a non-profit organization. It doesn't receive any funds from the government to help our police officers.

Or, if the Lord has blessed you with the means to help with a **[gift of $250, $500, or even $1,000 or more,](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=958bc29d9d42404897660f8febdadfcc&_e=Hn776jbOKI788NCPkpG3eXy-n8KdIIlc0SrCfCHBJE5sg4zT67yaqtpe2gtSLQJzfLC08oB5q6xLrp_wbpA8-EcI7qTl6O1IzvYH-2u3Rijetu_yuVx79OSfevWvxlgbdEO6dxN3ygupsdTt8ejNRLuARbn4CznX5GXcNpDKDun6D7YO9_F9eRFmzbzDXrlLZmh5e-Ke41ZqcHaTP_HIPiOIcDJNqG1ciA4LFlxgrXhXBqTkiT_q6Ckz4Hr5Uh0pjuoHEO42opzeh9YLSree-H_Tkz_NNUzELQADDShH3-v54q60DtTP__MQ-DI_eEoZVy8ABqP4v5J1rYqBIfpJkvwAyYWGvYqN2WQAQIwjmlQ%3D)** I pray you will consider doing so.

Please know any gift amount you can send today is truly a blessing.

If you can't help financially today, I understand. And please keep Michael and our family in your prayers.

My son Michael is an American hero who served our nation and his community. He shouldn't be locked behind bars for defending his life from a career criminal.
[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=958bc29d9d42404897660f8febdadfcc&_e=Hn776jbOKI788NCPkpG3eXy-n8KdIIlc0SrCfCHBJE5sg4zT67yaqtpe2gtSLQJzfLC08oB5q6xLrp_wbpA8-EcI7qTl6O1IzvYH-2u3Rijetu_yuVx79OSfevWvxlgbdEO6dxN3ygupsdTt8ejNRLuARbn4CznX5GXcNpDKDun6D7YO9_F9eRFmzbzDXrlLyGQ1h6CYaPqT8o4npi3A1TSDqVxKxkssfvGgnlLTg0KTZmOehqMXR_GVnrNlKaDkxx9HTGKyvi4CRDA2tWkuvVYJLr9AC3HGDPfKWr5GdZ4thTodKjjGhMMfShiuIXgidJ7ZHvvc5XK88SS2IDMBhsjlAn1uQOFSivUuSpX3BTo%3D)
_That's a picture of Michael with his daughter - my granddaughter - Mary-Kaitlyn_
[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=958bc29d9d42404897660f8febdadfcc&_e=Hn776jbOKI788NCPkpG3eXy-n8KdIIlc0SrCfCHBJE5sg4zT67yaqtpe2gtSLQJzfLC08oB5q6xLrp_wbpA8-EcI7qTl6O1IzvYH-2u3Rijetu_yuVx79OSfevWvxlgbdEO6dxN3ygupsdTt8ejNRLuARbn4CznX5GXcNpDKDun6D7YO9_F9eRFmzbzDXrlLGDa98LiqruLgEOgkTRoTfZLyr7nJF8VG522FbU6oHUHZcxAa9MvRDVdL2j3jVBhIDybobt9ZtMQ6vfzh2ikzk0Fh7Qy8bcfc6mCY12YRDYikBHSMRaS2yRE6f-X6Ko0nUB0Jq0IMMgwh4iqTNaKE4gjwQRbP6Nz3CRAfhfmUf88%3D)
_That's a picture of Michael with his Son - my grandson - William_

I pray you never go through something like this. But if you do, may God touch the hearts of kind people to help you - just as I'm praying He'll touch your heart to help my son today.

Sincerely,

Margaret Mary Dunn

PS: LELDF relies on caring people like you to send donations so they can fight tooth and nail to help wrongly-accused police officers like Michael. And because LELDF is a non-profit, all donations are tax-deductible. Your kind **[donation today of $35, $50, or $100](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=958bc29d9d42404897660f8febdadfcc&_e=Hn776jbOKI788NCPkpG3eXy-n8KdIIlc0SrCfCHBJE5sg4zT67yaqtpe2gtSLQJzfLC08oB5q6xLrp_wbpA8-EcI7qTl6O1IzvYH-2u3Rijetu_yuVx79OSfevWvxlgbdEO6dxN3ygupsdTt8ejNRLuARbn4CznX5GXcNpDKDun6D7YO9_F9eRFmzbzDXrlLMBZ870Vo9195-KZx5fSeIhQLquIzOpkkHH_s8qbc6US-W36PgUudhfblDk4nQevMV_HoS0SMgpH8dCSChqh0yH96T10X1MBT9AzG2JxG1-c6AeH_IvkCSJeueVRBd6Joo5JtJm_aOVQtTkhqJEnJoaqa85djbPxvpuxEbhl7ifo%3D)** to help Michael will mean so much to my family.

\----------------

_More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we 're defending, please visit **www.leldf.org**. And remember - Blue Lives Matter!_

| Hi, it’s Jane Fonda. I don’t want to take up too much of your time, but I need your help.

Every year there are crucial elections across the country that will determine the future of the fight against the climate crisis, _**and this year is no different.**_

From approving permits for deadly drilling projects to determining how we power our homes, offices, and public transportation, **every leader at the local level has immense climate power and it’s important we elect climate champions who are ready to take action.**

[_**Before you log off for the weekend, will you contribute $10 to help elect climate champions up and down the ballot in 2023 and beyond?**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63214285/405967854/931978131?refcode=BLU-JANE-20230512-1-EM&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImU0OTYyNjQxLTAwZjEtZWQxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=-ylBhp9cRw-5jnKUSNvEzWhCzXVmjUqFNidvEUji3GA=)

I don’t want to take up too much of your time, but I need your help. Every year there are crucial elections across the country that will determine the future of the fight against the climate crisis, and this year is no different. From approving permits for deadly drilling projects to determining how we power our homes, offices, and public transportation, every leader at the local level has immense climate power and it’s important we elect climate champions who are ready to take action. = | | | = | = | = | = | = Let’s fight like hell together, Jane Fonda = | | Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. name: Nick Melvoin
subject: Thank a teacher today: Following up about Teacher Appreciation Week
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nick Melvoin for Congress - FEC ID #C00831289
body:
|
---
| | Peter – Since I sent this email the other day, I've heard from a number of people eager to share a memory or a word of gratitude for a teacher who inspired them. **So, let's take that tribute public, and show our teachers how much they still mean to us.[Head over to Twitter to tell us about a great teacher in your life. ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63214480/405968892/2111453622?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQxNjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjRmYWQwODgtMDBmMS1lZDExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=C1pgfv363jmtV_FlDXyKNYUIoB1okQTEBWPBntpWNmc=&emci=2a6b4026-e2f0-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=b4fad088-00f1-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=10481059)** _Nick_ Forwarded Message | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63214482/405968895/2045957508?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQxNjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjRmYWQwODgtMDBmMS1lZDExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=C1pgfv363jmtV_FlDXyKNYUIoB1okQTEBWPBntpWNmc=&emci=2a6b4026-e2f0-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=b4fad088-00f1-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=10481059)
---
It's Teacher Appreciation Week, Peter, and it's never been more necessary.
I became a teacher because I wanted to be on the front lines of social change, building a better America for everyone. And I'll admit that when I walked in the door that first day, I was pretty impressed with my own idealism and work ethic.
**But as I got to know my fellow teachers and got to see them in action, I realized – and I mean this in the very best way – I wasn't unique. Instead, I was awed by my colleagues' commitment and enthusiasm.**
Day after day, our teachers show up for our kids. And Peter, "show up," isn't a matter of punching a clock or filling out the right forms; it's a whole-self effort academically, socially, creatively, and emotionally, as every one of our country's structural issues appears in our classrooms.
Despite the challenges, **the teachers I know will give everything they have to help their students succeed.** Whether it's staying after school to provide extra help, chaperoning dances, lending a sympathetic ear, or spending their own money to buy school supplies, teachers _give_.
And yet, we're seeing a nationwide campaign to discredit, dismiss, and disparage not just our teachers, but the very profession of teaching; legislatures across the country are systematically defunding schools and libraries, banning books, and undermining the judgment of educators.
Let's not forget the awful truth that while extremists put our teachers in the cultural crosshairs, others are putting them in literal crosshairs. As Congress continues to stonewall meaningful gun safety legislation, our schools are sites of horrific – and preventable – violence.
Teacher Appreciation Day gives us the chance to let teachers know that we see through all of the disinformation and mud-slinging, and show our appreciation for the long hours, the early mornings, the late nights, and the constant dedication to our children's education.
**As a former teacher, I know how a simple "thank you" from a student or family member can make all the difference during a rough time. If you can, please take a minute to express your gratitude to the teachers who work tirelessly to make a difference in our students' lives.**
This campaign is about turning that gratitude into policy – in fact, just yesterday, I voted to approve a historic contract that raises the average teacher salary to $106,000. But our work extends well beyond the LAUSD; that's why we're bringing this movement to Congress. Together, we'll lead the fight to fully fund our schools, make sure every student gets the support they need to succeed, and build a future where _every_ week is Teacher Appreciation week.
In gratitude,
_Nick_

| | | Paid for by Nick Melvoin for Congress - FEC ID #C00831289
---

|

name: Marshall for Congress
subject: Everyone deserves a living wage - sign the petition!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Derek Marshall for Congress
body:
**Nobody should have to accept a subminimum wage!**

**[Join Derek Marshall and demand that Congress end the federal subminimum wage!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63214543/405969128/-813061260?source=group-derek-marshall-for-congress&referrer=group-derek-marshall-for-congress&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fpl_marshall2024%3Famount%3D10%26refcode%3Dpl_20230510_06%26noskip%3Dtrue&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NWU2ZmZiMS0wMGYxLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mIs9CEmjzFaXGr1K6X4rHADq-hdX9bL-URWyICHEV3Y=&emci=155bab47-38ef-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=55e6ffb1-00f1-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=21617867)**
Not all employers pay their workers the federal minimum wage. The minimum wage for tipped workers, called the subminimum wage, is just $2.13 per hour in forty-three states!

Civil rights advocates argue that paying tipped employees a subminimum wage harms workers by promoting customer biases that foster racial and gender inequities.
**The seven states that DO pay tipped workers the FULL minimum wage experience stronger small business growth and better pay for tipped workers!

[Sign the petition urging Congress to level the playing field and end the federal subminimum wage!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63214544/405969129/-813061260?source=group-derek-marshall-for-congress&referrer=group-derek-marshall-for-congress&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fpl_marshall2024%3Famount%3D10%26refcode%3Dpl_20230510_06%26noskip%3Dtrue&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NWU2ZmZiMS0wMGYxLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mIs9CEmjzFaXGr1K6X4rHADq-hdX9bL-URWyICHEV3Y=&emci=155bab47-38ef-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=55e6ffb1-00f1-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=21617867)**

Women of color who work as tipped employees receive an average of $5 less an hour than their white male counterparts. Additionally, women in the restaurant industry in states that permit the $2.13 minimum wage report twice the rate of sexual harassment.

Tipped employees who are subject to the $2.13 subminimum wage are[ twice ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63214545/405969130/1238764264?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NWU2ZmZiMS0wMGYxLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mIs9CEmjzFaXGr1K6X4rHADq-hdX9bL-URWyICHEV3Y=&emci=155bab47-38ef-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=55e6ffb1-00f1-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=21617867#page=1)as likely to suffer from poverty and depend on food stamps compared to the general population.

**Derek Marshall believes it is time for the service industry to adopt one fair wage.

[Add your name and tell Congress it is long passed time to end the subminimum wages!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63214546/405969131/-813061260?source=group-derek-marshall-for-congress&referrer=group-derek-marshall-for-congress&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fpl_marshall2024%3Famount%3D10%26refcode%3Dpl_20230510_06%26noskip%3Dtrue&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NWU2ZmZiMS0wMGYxLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mIs9CEmjzFaXGr1K6X4rHADq-hdX9bL-URWyICHEV3Y=&emci=155bab47-38ef-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=55e6ffb1-00f1-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=21617867)**

We all do better when we all do better!
Derek Marshall for Congress

clean_body: Nobody should have to accept a subminimum wage! Not all employers pay their workers the federal minimum wage. The minimum wage for tipped workers, called the subminimum wage, is just $2.13 per hour in forty-three states! Civil rights advocates argue that paying tipped employees a subminimum wage harms workers by promoting customer biases that foster racial and gender inequities. The seven states that DO pay tipped workers the FULL minimum wage experience stronger small business growth and better pay for tipped workers! Women of color who work as tipped employees receive an average of $5 less an hour than their white male counterparts. Additionally, women in the restaurant industry in states that permit the $2.13 minimum wage report twice the rate of sexual harassment. Tipped employees who are subject to the $2.13 subminimum wage are likely to suffer from poverty and depend on food stamps compared to the general population. Derek Marshall believes it is time for the service industry to adopt one fair wage. We all do better when we all do better! Derek Marshall for Congress = Derek Marshall is a Democrat running for Congress in California's 23rd District. He's running to bring the folks of the high desert & mountains together for a more livable life. = To donate by check, please mail to: Derek Marshall for Congress P.O. Box 2836 Victorville, CA 92395 (760) 486-2416 Paid for by Derek Marshall for Congress | |

| | I wanted to update you on my critical fight to put dollars back in YOUR pocket — and the pockets of hard-working people across New Jersey.

My new bill — **the SALT Deductibility Act** — is a bipartisan law that completely restores the State and Local Tax (SALT) deduction. That means you’ll stop getting taxed **_twice_** on the money you earned.

This common-sense measure will cut taxes for **_millions of middle-class Jersey residents_** — and families across the country. Families everywhere are struggling with higher costs — and getting your money back in your pocket can’t wait.

[I’m fired up to get money back in your pocket, but I can’t keep at this fight alone. Currently, one of my top priorities in Congress is to ban Members of Congress, their spouses, and their dependent children from trading stocks.

Members of Congress must always focus on the needs of their constituents, not their own financial portfolios. It’s not a radical idea, I know, and the American people agree. _**Take a look:**_

name: Aditya Pai
subject: My first endorsement! And it’s a big one.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democrats Serve, DemocratsServe
body:
|

| | Hi Peter!

When Democrats win in politically diverse places like our district, we do it with a relentless focus on public service - not politics.

That’s why I’m proud my first ever political endorsement comes from a prominent group who are all about public service.

Democrats Serve just announced they are all in, endorsing us right after we announced our campaign.

Voters in my community like the fact that I’ve never been a politician, and don’t aspire to be one. I am and plan to remain a public servant. Public servants don’t run to make a point, or to make a living. We run to **make a difference** for hard-working Americans of *every* political persuasion.

I’m proud such a prominent group that has helped elect many sitting members of Congress agrees.

I’m going to win this election. But more importantly, I am putting together a talented team that will serve this community.

Please consider becoming a founding donor to our campaign. We are so close to reaching our first goal, and every contribution counts. Please contribute here: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/demsserve-pai](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yRYHVcKSCW4GVJAOfcd-eEQtZ2gjfmg9VJ1qD9qEk6YrHlJKwQIhv5x4nt7m8qmgDQmL8-lz5gy-54FZ18HXHNBTq4prsamtaN3f17rpBaZfqqyGBexXRIahsCEA9-lIn-_La3S51jXYddBIwjkmO87eAZcFcnE1-g1A32m8HTzlS7pELYIa_RRx3h3XnrJL37tpiquu02Z3-QX6Euf0G935WAYy7NS8n1Sj6BzYs0lMaYxntyEZL1oNus_Kg6ZYzWBmqxcWyPbLFg_tCQdmUtOLACFFLl1bZeHx-iv5Cev9BKJjz3cMF9X247pj8IZvY/3w4/0Rtp5Q3cRcam-CTb7DjpmQ/h0/UXVv7TOyRYYdgzRHJWkOURiVcYmf628N0Jw7-GYoSiY)

Thank you so much for everything you do. We really appreciate your help and support.

Best,

Democrats Serve is a national organization that backs Democrats running for office with frontline public service backgrounds, including first responders, firefighters, social workers, police officers, prosecutors, judges, public defenders, educators, and more.

Democratic candidates with professional experience serving their communities in government have a pragmatic approach to governing and know how to get things done, making for strong narratives and an ability to connect with voters uniquely.

However, when running for office, they often lack access to the professional campaign staff and wealthy donor networks that non-working class candidates do.

Democrats Serve

Milford, CT 06460
United States

name: Katie Porter for California
subject: Explaining the importance of our fundraising deadlines
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
No whiteboards needed to explain this.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=22799%2E3422442%2EhAXFZO)
One of Katie’s favorite sayings is: **"A task without a deadline is just a dream."**
That’s why we have monthly fundraising deadlines, they help us stay on track and plan for the tough race ahead.
We’ll explain why meeting these deadlines makes a difference, but first: [**Can you make your first contribution of $5 to help us stay on track to reach our May fundraising goal?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230512-2?amount=5&refcode=EMAH12_2_DEA_20230512_V1_F&refcode2=22799_3422442_hAXFZO&akid=22799%2E3422442%2EhAXFZO)
**[Donate $5 ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230512-2?amount=5&refcode=EMAH12_2_DEA_20230512_V1_F&refcode2=22799_3422442_hAXFZO&akid=22799%2E3422442%2EhAXFZO)**
Our fundraising deadlines matter because:
* As a truly grassroots powered campaign, Katie isn’t accepting handouts from corporate PACs and federal lobbyists.
* Running a successful campaign in California is resource intensive, with some of the most expensive media markets in the country.
* Early investments allow us to do more with less later on—so it’s crucial we raise as much as possible as early as possible.

**[We need Katie to know that we have her back. Will you pitch in $5 ahead of our mid-month fundraising deadline?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230512-2?amount=5&refcode=EMAH12_2_DEA_20230512_V1_F&refcode2=22799_3422442_hAXFZO&akid=22799%2E3422442%2EhAXFZO)**
**[Donate $5 ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230512-2?amount=5&refcode=EMAH12_2_DEA_20230512_V1_F&refcode2=22799_3422442_hAXFZO&akid=22799%2E3422442%2EhAXFZO)**
Thank you for your support! More to come soon,
—Katie Porter for California

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=EMAH12_2_DEA_20230512_V1_F&t=2&refcode2=22799_3422442_hAXFZO&akid=22799%2E3422442%2EhAXFZO)**
---

clean_body: Stay up to date with Jim Banks's Senate campaign. Read more right now >>| | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Stay in touch: TEXT "JIM" TO 81638 | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- | | Paid for by Banks for Senate

name: Sharice (personal)
subject: I want to get a hold of you
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHARICE FOR CONGRESS
body:
| Hey —

I’m writing this quick message because Mohona asked me to reach out to you before the weekend.

Our team has been looking over our books all day today and we’re $2,000 short of where our budget should be. We need to close the gap and we have until the end of the day today to do so.

Can I ask you to please chip in $20 today to help? Here’s a secure link:

**[https://act.shariceforcongress.com/a/may23-goal](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63215786/405973959/-951952754?amount=20&contactdata=CKGdssV+97M6VxXxeVQ29U78259bxB1c6gDvVIktZ3znFSmVonIWB8xCfn+dN/b0T9bUVosCMHiclq8Nk39408Ev1MIkRotYh+Ppq0tsal4J7x4GzqfxWJd/T9Acn5lk5lJCDqu90pQ92k7Oimf5sA==&source=EM_NBI_SD_20230512_FR_mmfr.2.4_0_6MO_candidate_NA_NA_mmfr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYzBkMmMzYi0wNmYxLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=S4IoCw1LGsST1gz21zxc7bkOo0OFWbiaGPzDmmnRF2c=)**

It’s outrageous to see how some of my colleagues have turned their backs on the American people. Instead of working for them, they’re willing to push our economy to the brink of disaster in order to push through a budget that would do nothing but hurt working families.

We need to start right now if we’re going to make sure they don’t win again.

Thanks for doing what you can,

Sharice

subject: What happened on May 12th?
body:
Historical facts enclosed >>| |
---
| |
---
| |
---
** _QUOTE OF THE DAY_** _No president who performs his duties faithfully and conscientiously can have any leisure.

_ \- President James K. Polk _
_

[**May 12, 1846:** After President James K. Polk accused Mexican forces of attacking Americans on U.S. soil. The Senate voted 40-2 to go to war against Mexico. The result of the Mexican-American war led to the U.S. annexation of land stretching from present-day California to New Mexico.](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=1565e31e83d84d2f831a5c1ef718321a&_e=DABj0xMl3--n_RaHicvT3i-rAhfn50R3FOSZw0jCYVwBtWePCflR4QniABIJgsJ8QTiipvmps-K9D0veTvJsPATtPSBSUapjipVtXMUL4PW-qpw7u_0R8LxerFpRU2M-b-yukC2fpANhRgdiJ6h0--OZSUUHWy4hzocBA7CvQp4CkXwRR9KCdYYJNaF-1ybp4OUzBVOMHdZ1n0Ctn4LtM5UZENA1xLjaV230F2kBE3SHvVLLoKkAnamNY7G_-Q9TlRzG-0vLyb2AEPqF76YhbrqWBR37crb4WQ70vFh8r9o%3D) **Source -[senate.gov](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=1565e31e83d84d2f831a5c1ef718321a&_e=DABj0xMl3--n_RaHicvT3i-rAhfn50R3FOSZw0jCYVwBtWePCflR4QniABIJgsJ8QTiipvmps-K9D0veTvJsPATtPSBSUapjipVtXMUL4PW-qpw7u_0R8LxerFpRU2M-b-yukC2fpANhRgdiJ6h0-2ggpw0BtTFUErT9WhJ0kghpe1tCOglRARqtB-kkc2wznuGuDsYt4qiEgRU4IA42mouWuR1gUU2Gutxd4L7LAJIG5LgK-sk8UOour6FJ0OA-FYrhk3Xnq3MENMialgse_EUTPkNrO4tYIrISAu2vkEU%3D)[](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=1565e31e83d84d2f831a5c1ef718321a&_e=DABj0xMl3--n_RaHicvT3mH3w8AxIPTrilM0YcW8H0VsGFyLQ3SZ_FSwDFslzVlCRdvhq_dUu4sC9FUs68nhIyozSqQXH8LsP3klAWl8N-bV9Wnln37fB7RaGuhxJwhD_SUEIKEK5JrfOwERPJnjjCLYqHZXr5jEuB06KAPj4FDAYBUv94Y0X-t9m7M5H7BychkiuZMBzkym5Svcjz6uqvOkoAvrh4zd1n2lRGRck3Fcgf6jAQqwRDAM-P9xrW3b)**

[**May 12, 1865:** News of the Confederate surrender at Appomattox hadn’t reached the troops down in Texas which is how the final battle of the Civil War resulted in a Confederate victory. [**May 12, 2002:** For the first time since the Cuban Revolt in 1959, an American President visited Cuba. Former President Jimmy Carter visited Cuba at the invitation of Fidel Castro for a five-day trip. Carter called on both governments to mend relations.](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=1565e31e83d84d2f831a5c1ef718321a&_e=DABj0xMl3--n_RaHicvT3jEQ-IqdIFya-AnKdTnc95qXDyH3byFWPVc0NNf3n7pugcFCpP8h5VFRd2Rt4bZpKnruPgFp9rXUR6JoB9rz-D24tyF73xmvleKz3Q1N8N2-Z1UzzivRNS7p6P1CSOUIUMNV4YJ-ugQQMt232sxHtaELVC8nhYm7GH1DmUy900JWvs15WBV1272qPQosnXrCB1t8QQ6JuOvOVRd6_27jaLc%3D) **Source -[cartercenter.org](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=1565e31e83d84d2f831a5c1ef718321a&_e=DABj0xMl3--n_RaHicvT3jEQ-IqdIFya-AnKdTnc95qXDyH3byFWPVc0NNf3n7pugcFCpP8h5VFRd2Rt4bZpKk3O7Pr__QMQCHMGILkUREoxreS7o9RdMKwpsBdSOpoUyuDFbSigZJR4xnmPC3lkjxExMN7wbGwESupGE-IkeO7fplNVh8RVNZ_HaTJ1x5BoBB0Awa1CgoZL_A6IQCUwCySDig4CdCG9o883XmRw5rQ%3D)**

body:
Ending Biden's Border Crisis | |
---
| | | [ ](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=360610b7b0&e=1050d051da)
---
| Friend,

It's Jake LaTurner here. House Republicans are the last line of defense to saving our country from Joe Biden and radical left politicians in Congress.

This week in Washington I worked to pass commonsense legislation to secure the border and joined my colleagues to uncover the truth about the Biden family's overseas bribery schemes.

Thanks to all your help, we are **FINALLY** getting America back on track. I am so grateful for your continued trust and support.

Yours in the fight,
Jake
---
|
---
| **UNCOVERING THE BIDEN FAMILY BRIBERY SCHEME**
---
| [ ](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=d54c02d4ea&e=1050d051da)
---
| As one of the top GOP investigators in the House, I have been working to uncover the truth about the Biden family's overseas business dealings.

Let me tell you: __It's**WAY** worse than I could have imagined.__

After reviewing thousands of bank records, it's clear that at least 9 Biden family members received payments linked to foreign nationals—including individuals tied to Communist China!

These transactions totaled more than **$10 MILLION! **To make matters worse, the Bidens used 20 shell companies to try and hide these wire transfers.

__**I have one simple question: What did these foreign actors get in return for their investment?!**__

Joe Biden can deny these claims all he wants, but the bank records don't lie. I am **NOT** going to stop until my colleagues and I on the Oversight Committee get to the bottom of this bribery scheme. [**[READ MORE HERE]**](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=72fdf7fed4&e=1050d051da)
---
|
---
| **SECURING THE BORDER**
---
| [ ](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=f501af4450&e=1050d051da)
---
| If Secretary Mayorkas says that the border is secure one more time, I'm going to lose my mind.
**The American people are smart. They know that Joe Biden and his "border czar" Kamala Harris turned their back on the southern border and failed our nation.**
By allowing Title 42 to expire last night, Joe Biden and his radical allies in Congress finally got what they've wanted: _**_a wide open southern border._**_

House Republicans took action yesterday and passed the strongest border security bill in American history to build the wall, end catch-and-release, and hire 22,000 more Border Patrol agents. To no one's surprise, **213 House Democrats** voted against this commonsense bill.

**The United States is being invaded. It's time to put AMERICA FIRST and stop illegal immigrants and fentanyl from pouring across the southern border.[[READ MORE HERE]](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=d19f1f2a5c&e=1050d051da)**
---
|
---
| **HOUSE REPUBLICAN LEGISLATIVE UPDATE**
---
| I am proud to have voted in favor of legislation on the House Floor that **REVERSES** Joe Biden's far-left policies and puts **AMERICA FIRST** :

✅ Defund Joe Biden’s IRS army
✅ Protect parents' rights
✅ Block gov't officials from colluding with Big Tech to censor speech
✅ Declassify all info relating to the COVID-19 lab leak
✅ Rein in Biden's reckless federal spending
✅ Strengthen penalties for violent crimes
✅ Protect women's sports
✅ Stop Democrats from forcing their woke climate agenda into retirement funds
✅ Create a committee to hold Communist China accountable
✅ Create a subcommittee on the weaponization of government
✅ Push back on Democrats' extreme pro-abortion agenda
✅ Unleash domestic energy production
✅ Officially end the COVID-19 national emergency

---
| [DONATE NOW TO DEFEND THE HOUSE GOP MAJORITY](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=60d7aca755&e=1050d051da "DONATE NOW TO DEFEND THE HOUSE GOP MAJORITY")

Fellow Conservative,

This week, Republicans in the U.S. House are voting on legislation that would bring about some of the most stringent border security measures our country has ever known.

Against ALL common sense, **President Biden has promised to veto the bill.**

As an American, this makes me angry. **As the Sheriff of Arizona’s third largest county, it will make doing my job even harder than it already is.**

Why on earth would President Biden veto legislation that secures and protects the border?

**Because Republicans led the efforts to pass it**.

**As someone who has personally pulled the dead bodies of immigrants out of ditches, I cannot express my dismay at Biden’s failure to secure the border.**

As a candidate for the U.S. Senate and a Sheriff in my own right, **[I’m putting together a petition to send to President Biden urging him to let this border bill become law. I’m looking for 500 Americans to sign it right now](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=164c554eccd04fff985546e9c885ef65&_e=0hIlKrjEJMhvPT7jfDcokZTzpwNHoKA0kFp48wT1xKw2s3vUrF4XaSwpbUNu9k63a03-XZ6MuYrLPO3wqrvfcJIBplPxWRAuV_Aq8CmYBxyJY1RJk5w2r840jm_qFIz6kBJqNnjSrgs_ek7keIvlZphsKtBsgneG3UX6aU4dvkP7_aDE-KZWfq03s4uCwrTHeJuISCzIRJYizSGXjMwoGGlJkA9mXOAo3s-qjkxebXYoISfDm5_fH_TPgwT23tAetUsVYHolPvl4eYtpqwqq8und2NdffESL9U0e465ITZBQq4s6cwIZCS5P_EgDhomWCGAYKyzAtXXljXHdI9PEPbBxbiFGFJubL0Wm5wZ76tcZ5tQcbs4iVKE_cnK_PB0Xo2VQnjrcgedxsZcHxQd7arc5Ws1D2MGz_gYygcPs8uw%3D)**.

**Meet Sheriff Lamb:** | GOD. FAMILY. FREEDOM.

Sheriff Mark Lamb is a husband, father, grandfather, and God-fearing patriot. From Hawaii to Manila, Arizona, Mark Lamb's rich experirences inspired his life of service. As the 24th Sheriff of Pinal County, Arizona, he drives a powerful agenda to ensure community safety and prosperity.

Sheriff Lamb trained with the Maricopa County Sheriff's Office Deputy Academy and was named Valedictorian of his class. He was hired by the Salt River Pima-Maricopa Indian Community, where he excelled as a police officer and was named Rookie of the Year. The following year, he received the Officer of the Year award. He was later promoted as a Detective to the Gang Enforcement Unit and in his first year was named Detective of the Year.

clean_body: President Biden is making the lives of every American sheriff more difficult by failing to secure the southern border. | | Fellow Conservative, This week, Republicans in the U.S. House are voting on legislation that would bring about some of the most stringent border security measures our country has ever known. Against ALL common sense, President Biden has promised to veto the bill. As an American, this makes me angry. As the Sheriff of Arizona’s third largest county, it will make doing my job even harder than it already is. Why on earth would President Biden veto legislation that secures and protects the border? Because Republicans led the efforts to pass it. As someone who has personally pulled the dead bodies of immigrants out of ditches, I cannot express my dismay at Biden’s failure to secure the border. As a candidate for the U.S. Senate and a Sheriff in my own right, . If you’re tired of people from all over the world treating our border like an imaginary line, will you Fellow Conservative, we must stop the invasion. It’s as simple as that. We do that by sending law enforcement officials, who know a thing or two about quelling unrest, to replace Democrats in the Senate who can’t seem to figure out how to do their damn jobs. Sheriff Mark Lamb Republican for U.S. Senate Follow Sheriff Lamb On Social Media Meet Sheriff Lamb: | GOD. FAMILY. FREEDOM. Sheriff Mark Lamb is a husband, father, grandfather, and God-fearing patriot. From Hawaii to Manila, Arizona, Mark Lamb's rich experirences inspired his life of service. As the 24th Sheriff of Pinal County, Arizona, he drives a powerful agenda to ensure community safety and prosperity. Sheriff Lamb trained with the Maricopa County Sheriff's Office Deputy Academy and was named Valedictorian of his class. He was hired by the Salt River Pima-Maricopa Indian Community, where he excelled as a police officer and was named Rookie of the Year. The following year, he received the Officer of the Year award. He was later promoted as a Detective to the Gang Enforcement Unit and in his first year was named Detective of the Year. | Paid for by Mark Lamb for Senate
