name: Josh Harder
subject: Our kids’ mental health
body:
I’m introducing a new bill called the Improving Mental Health in Schools Act. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63217563/405980614/657127102?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDViYjMzMWUtMGRmMS1lZDExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=YMD1lL4K0Ccm-q_YbqO-fkMEyLrpBR-zPrZnYra-I2w=) | Peter, Today I want to talk about something that’s on the minds of a lot of parents: our kids’ mental health. I spend a lot of time with parents these days and the number one thing I hear is concern about their kids’ mental health. Depression, anxiety, loneliness are at an all time high. **In fact, a recent ACLU survey found that 43% of California students had a panic or anxiety attack in 2021.** It’s incredibly scary. So I started digging into what we could do to help. First, I found out that one of the best ways to help is early intervention directly in schools. But with more digging, I found out that because of an outdated law, specialists like family counselors, social workers and psychologists are often prevented from working in public schools. It made no sense. That’s why I just introduced a new bill called the _Improving Mental Health in Schools Act_. It’s very simple - it rewrites the law to let schools hire the trained specialists our kids need, where they need it. Look, I know one law isn’t going to change everything for our kids, but I truly believe good policy is a part of the solution. [**If you support this legislation and believe our kids’ mental health is important, I hope you will sign this petition to become a citizen co-sponsor of my new bill today.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63217565/405980616/2073272060?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDViYjMzMWUtMGRmMS1lZDExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=YMD1lL4K0Ccm-q_YbqO-fkMEyLrpBR-zPrZnYra-I2w=&emci=c5b24111-0df1-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=45bb331e-0df1-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=6455652) [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63217567/405980618/2073272060?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDViYjMzMWUtMGRmMS1lZDExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=YMD1lL4K0Ccm-q_YbqO-fkMEyLrpBR-zPrZnYra-I2w=&emci=c5b24111-0df1-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=45bb331e-0df1-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=6455652) Thanks for listening, I’ll keep working hard to help our next generation. \- Josh

Your donation today will help us plan for the long road ahead, which is
why we’re asking for your support right now. Chipping in today, no matter
the amount, will help us prepare for anything the GOP throws our way (and
it’s only a matter of time before they launch another lie about Tammy’s
record!).

Your support is so important to our team — and Tammy — which is why she
wants to call you to thank you herself.

Team Baldwin

Marylanders need someone who understands the challenges facing their families and who has a proven track record of fighting for equity, justice, and community.
I’ve dedicated the last 26 years of my life to exactly that – working to reduce crime and decrease recidivism rates as a prosecutor and finding solutions to alleviate pressure on Maryland families as County Executive of Prince George’s.
**I believe that I’ve got the tools to deliver results for Maryland in the United States Senate, and I need your help getting there.**
**[Will you take a moment to watch my launch video and become a Founding Donor of my campaign? I’m counting on you to help me reach voters in every corner of Maryland!](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/807?t=11&amount=25&akid=56%2E52803%2EGT9e1U)**

name: Sydney Batch
subject: Attacking OUR rights
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Foushee for Congress
body:
Make no mistake, this is a calculated attack on women’s reproductive rights, and we must fight back.

| Peter,

This is urgent. Republicans in the state legislature passed an extreme abortion ban that will deny many NC women access across our state.

**Make no mistake, this is a calculated attack on women’s reproductive rights, and we must fight back.**

North Carolinians believe in freedom – and that includes the freedom to make your own health care decisions. Abortion is essential, life-saving health care that should not be politicized or criminalized. But Republicans will do whatever it takes to push through their extremist agenda, even if it harms the very people they were elected to represent.

Peter, we need your help to make sure Republicans don’t retain absolute control of the state legislature in 2024 so we can continue to advocate for abortion access and defend reproductive health care across the state.

Valerie Foushee and I will always stand up for reproductive rights, but we need you with us. name: Cori Bush HQ
subject: Here's what we've accomplished with your support
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cori Bush for Congress
body:
Cori has been pivotal on legislation ranging from voting rights to environmental issues.
#
Peter,
It's been more than 2 years since Cori first entered the halls of the People's House. Despite this short amount of time, **we've done a lot and have so much more to do.**
Today, we wanted to provide you with a brief recap of some of our movement's accomplishments but before we continue: [**Can you pitch in $5 today so that our movement has the resources it needs to build on past achievements?**](https://act.coribush.org/go/238?c0=cori-em-20230512.05H8kB&refcode=em20230512-2681&t=1&akid=2681%2E1082990%2EhD6j-Q)
**[Donate](https://act.coribush.org/go/238?c0=cori-em-20230512.05H8kB&refcode=em20230512-2681&t=2&akid=2681%2E1082990%2EhD6j-Q)**
From public safety to environmental justice to conducting oversight and securing federal funds, every vote and every committee hearing has been made and attended with the intention of centering St. Louis in the important work we do every day.
**With your support, here's some of what we've been able to accomplish:**
✅ Passed 25 pieces of legislation in the House.
✅ Had two amendments signed into law.
✅ Led and co-led 20 bills and filed nearly 30 amendments.
✅ Added guardrails to help pass the Domestic Terrorism Prevention Act — a necessary step aimed to address white supremacy.
✅ Partnered with Senator Bernie Sanders and Representative Jason Crow on legislation to address our reliance on fossil fuels, address the energy crisis, and prioritize efficiency, electric transportation and renewable energy.
✅ Introduced the Insulin for All Act which would cap the price of insulin at $20 per vial.
✅ Secured more than $1 billion of direct funding for the District through the American Rescue Plan.
**These are unprecedented achievements for MO-01 that we can all take pride in.**
It's clear that campaigning on a people-first agenda is a winning one. But there's still a lot more work ahead of us to protect Black lives, legislate for working families, and pass the bold transformative policies our communities urgently need.
We're beyond happy to have you with us in this fight, and are grateful for your continued support for Cori and her work. But Republican super PACs and corporate interests are hellbent on reversing all of the progress our grassroots movement has made in this short amount of time.
**We won't let them — but we need your help.**
[**That's why we're asking you to chip in $5 today to keep Cori fighting for us all in Congress. We've only gotten this far thanks to the grassroots movement you helped build.**](https://act.coribush.org/go/238?c0=cori-em-20230512.05H8kB&refcode=em20230512-2681&t=3&akid=2681%2E1082990%2EhD6j-Q)
**[Donate](https://act.coribush.org/go/238?c0=cori-em-20230512.05H8kB&refcode=em20230512-2681&t=22&akid=2681%2E1082990%2EhD6j-Q)**
In solidarity,
Cori Bush HQ

**[Contribute ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cori-em-footer?refcode=em20230512-2681-footer&t=23&refcode2=2681_1082990_hD6j-Q&akid=2681%2E1082990%2EhD6j-Q) **
---
Follow us on **[Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/VoteCoriBush/)** , **[Twitter](https://twitter.com/CoriBush)** , **[Instagram](https://www.instagram.com/coribush/)** , and **[visit our website](https://coribush.org/)**. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Mail us: Cori Bush for Congress, 75 North Oaks Plaza, St. Louis, MO 63121.
Paid for by Cori Bush for Congress
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.coribush.org/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.coribush.org/signup/update-your-information?t=24&akid=2681%2E1082990%2EhD6j-Q)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.coribush.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=25&akid=2681%2E1082990%2EhD6j-Q)

name: CaucusRoom
subject: Putin's Sad Little Parade
body:
What You Need To Know Today! No images? [Click here](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-e-alluhjl-trhiujldw-yk/) [](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-alluhjl-trhiujldw-r/)
## **Happy Friday!**
[](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-alluhjl-trhiujldw-y/) **Grow your organization and keep the momentum going with our powerful platform.** [Schedule a CaucusRoom Live demo today!](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-alluhjl-trhiujldw-j/) **Charged in Chokehold Death** The Marine veteran that is **[accused of choking a homeless man](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-alluhjl-trhiujldw-t/)** to death on a NYC subway is going to be charged by DA Alvin Bragg. **Conflicting Reports from the Border** It's hard to know what the truth is. **[Mayorkas claims to be issuing a stern warning](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-alluhjl-trhiujldw-i/)** to migrants, but there are also reports that **[migrants are being set free.](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-alluhjl-trhiujldw-d/) **In other news, this is an**[environmental catastrophe.](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-alluhjl-trhiujldw-h/)** **CNN Town Hall** **[Did you watch Trump](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-alluhjl-trhiujldw-k/)** on CNN last night? Here are a **[few moments to catch you up](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-alluhjl-trhiujldw-u/)** and analysis from **[Bill O'Reilly](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-alluhjl-trhiujldw-o/)**. Trump didn't like the **[host](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-alluhjl-trhiujldw-x/).**

**Gender Neutral Levi's?** Levi's CEO says they will be **[designing a gender-neutral line of clothing](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-alluhjl-trhiujldw-m/) **called jeans. _This guy is literally an idiot._ **Is it Really a Parade with One Tank?** **[Russia's scaled-down Victory Day military parade](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-alluhjl-trhiujldw-c/) **showed not only Russia's insecurities over possible Ukrainian attacks and highlighted the depleted military resources. **That's Hot** The government wants you to **[set your air conditioner to 78 degrees](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-alluhjl-trhiujldw-q/)** during the day and 82 at night. **Let****'s [have a good laugh](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-alluhjl-trhiujldw-a/)!**
* Biden's **[military](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-alluhjl-trhiujldw-f/).**
* There's been**[a mistake](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-alluhjl-trhiujldw-z/).**
* **[_Highest_](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-alluhjl-trhiujldw-v/)[ paid](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-alluhjl-trhiujldw-e/) actor.**
* Very**[expensive](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-alluhjl-trhiujldw-s/) **vehicle.

[](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-alluhjl-trhiujldw-g/)[](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-alluhjl-trhiujldw-w/)[](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-alluhjl-trhiujldw-yd/) [](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-alluhjl-trhiujldw-yh/) | CaucusRoom, LLC

clean_body: It’s a Border CRISIS. | Here’s what the left says about the crisis on our Southern Border → “I don’t hear a lot about immigration from voters, except for people in the far right.” -Democrat Senator Sherrod Brown. Securing our Southern Border, stopping the flow of fentanyl, and protecting the sovereignty of our nation should NOT be a partisan issue. However, leftist politicians insist that there is NO crisis on our border and absolve themselves of the responsibility for THOUSANDS of deaths due to deadly fentanyl overdoses. We must NOT tolerate the continued influx of people illegally crossing our border. We must take decisive action IMMEDIATELY to prevent our Southern Border from collapsing into total anarchy. Increase and strengthen our border patrol. Invest in technology that will help us detect and apprehend those attempting to cross our border lawlessly. It’s COMMON SENSE | It’s time to take action to secure our borders. It is time for our government to act and safeguard the American people. Best, GOP Border Alerts | Matt Dolan is running for U.S. Senate in Ohio he needs YOUR HELP. Rush a contribution below! | PAID FOR BY DOLAN FOR OHIO Not authorized by any other candidate.

Friend,
We need to be ready to ramp up our campaign soon. MAGA Republicans across the country are gearing up for 2024, and the Minnesota House will be a target. Protecting our House DFL majority is crucial, and you have a great opportunity to support that effort. Through the Minnesota Political Contribution Refund (PCR) program, you can donate $50 (or $100 per couple) once per year and have it refunded by the state. Will you make your refundable contribution today and help protect our House DFL Majority?

name: Cecile Richards
subject: re: recent attacks on reproductive rights
disclaimer_text: Paid for by AB PAC
body:
Did you see my earlier message, friend?
---
With Republicans waging an all-out war on our reproductive rights, we don't have a second to waste. That's why it's so important that we get responses on our reproductive rights priorities survey so we can form our strategy to FIGHT BACK!
**But I just checked, and we're still missing your response. **
**[Please, friend, will you take 60 seconds to fill out our reproductive rights survey? I want to make sure we get your input before the midnight deadline.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63218451/405984154/-610940185?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk2559-su-nd&refcode=jtk2559-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Nzc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjEyYTkwZDA5LTExZjEtZWQxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=KdWD569BuiiC-W6yqnroaT2Yh-Ldn052a_UkF3V33fU=&emci=113b50fb-5cef-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=12a90d09-11f1-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=23124236)**

\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: **Cecile Richards**
Date: Thur, May 11, 2023
Subject: I need your help to protect reproductive rights
| | |
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63218453/405984156/-610940185?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk2559-su-nd&refcode=jtk2559-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Nzc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjEyYTkwZDA5LTExZjEtZWQxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=KdWD569BuiiC-W6yqnroaT2Yh-Ldn052a_UkF3V33fU=&emci=113b50fb-5cef-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=12a90d09-11f1-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=23124236) I'll be the first to say that things seem disheartening right now, friend. In all my years in politics, I've _never_ witnessed such an intense period of attacks on reproductive rights as this one.

Just last month, Florida and North Dakota passed near-total bans on abortion. Roe v. Wade wasn't overturned overnight, and constitutionally protecting our reproductive rights won't happen overnight either.

**The majority of Americans are on our side, friend, on the side of protecting reproductive freedom, and together, we can build a country in which everyone has access to the health care they need. **
I'm working with American Bridge to hold Republicans accountable at the ballot box and stop them from ending abortion access nationwide, but we can't do that without your help. To that end, will you take 60 seconds to answer my reproductive rights priorities survey? Your insights are critical as we strategize to fight back and protect our fundamental freedoms.
**[I set a goal to get 2,500 responses by midnight tonight, so please click here to complete my reproductive rights priorities survey.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63218454/405984157/-610940185?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk2559-su-nd&refcode=jtk2559-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Nzc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjEyYTkwZDA5LTExZjEtZWQxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=KdWD569BuiiC-W6yqnroaT2Yh-Ldn052a_UkF3V33fU=&emci=113b50fb-5cef-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=12a90d09-11f1-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=23124236)**
| | [TAKE THE SURVEY >>](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63218455/405984158/-610940185?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk2559-su-nd&refcode=jtk2559-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Nzc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjEyYTkwZDA5LTExZjEtZWQxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=KdWD569BuiiC-W6yqnroaT2Yh-Ldn052a_UkF3V33fU=&emci=113b50fb-5cef-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=12a90d09-11f1-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=23124236)

name: Adam Schiff
subject: Donald Trump’s CNN Town Hall
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=2214%2E5257348%2ESQLHOJ ]Adam Schiff for Senate

Derek, CNN gave Donald Trump free rein to showcase his abhorrent
views during a town hall in front of an adoring MAGA crowd.

To begin, he lied constantly. He denied his 2020 election loss. He denied
pressuring the Georgia secretary of state to find him more votes. He
called a police officer who defended Congress during the January 6th
insurrection a “thug,” and denied the mob put his vice president’s life in
danger. He refused to call Vladimir Putin a war criminal or to say who he
wanted to win the war.

And one day after a jury of Trump’s peers found him civilly liable for
sexual misconduct in New York, he attacked the survivor he victimized and
disgustingly made light of that civil ruling — and the audience laughed
right along with him.

I know it’s not the news you wanted to hear. It’s not the news that I
wanted to deliver. But like it or not, Trump’s grip on the Republican
Party is stronger than ever before. And given that he is by far the
leading GOP candidate for president, the threat to our constitutional
democracy is as great as ever.

The people in the room with Trump, and his millions of supporters across
the nation, have fully bought into his brand of lies, anger, and downright
cruelty. I wish it were not so, but we have to do more than defeat Trump.
We have to defeat the MAGA movement he started, and that remains fiercely
loyal to him alone.

So I’m going to need your help. Especially with the media giving him an
open platform to continue to spread his lies and demagoguery. Nothing less
than the future of our democracy is at stake.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1312?c0=may2023_abs_em.TpLEiB&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230512_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1004&akid=2214%2E5257348%2ESQLHOJ ]Derek, will you make a $10 contribution to my campaign right
now to help us respond to Trump, fight back against MAGA Republicans, and
win this campaign for U.S. Senate?

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1015?c0=may2023_abs_em.zFhEHH&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230512_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1005&akid=2214%2E5257348%2ESQLHOJ ]EXPRESS DONATE $10

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1016?c0=may2023_abs_em.-ikdjF&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230512_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1006&akid=2214%2E5257348%2ESQLHOJ ]EXPRESS DONATE $25

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1017?c0=may2023_abs_em.giYyqq&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230512_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1007&akid=2214%2E5257348%2ESQLHOJ ]EXPRESS DONATE $50

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1018?c0=may2023_abs_em.3BVBtQ&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230512_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1008&akid=2214%2E5257348%2ESQLHOJ ]EXPRESS DONATE $100

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1019?c0=may2023_abs_em.VrKnFM&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230512_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1009&akid=2214%2E5257348%2ESQLHOJ ]EXPRESS DONATE $250

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=may2023_abs_em.tUimEk&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230512_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1010&akid=2214%2E5257348%2ESQLHOJ ]ANOTHER AMOUNT

I wish I could say that I was surprised at how CNN aired a town featuring
Donald Trump and his many, many lies and falsehoods.

For nearly two hours, Trump lied about the 2020 election, denigrated the
reporter interviewing him, and played to his adoring crowd. It was a
two-hour Trump infomercial.

Have we learned nothing from 2016? Or 2020? Trump has literally called for
my imprisonment over my efforts to hold him accountable during his first
impeachment and to investigate the attack he incited on January 6th.

He doesn’t want me in the Senate. He doesn’t want oversight or
accountability. But that is what our system of government demands. And I
need your help.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1312?c0=may2023_abs_em.TpLEiB&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230512_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1011&akid=2214%2E5257348%2ESQLHOJ ]Chip in $10 to help us respond to Trump’s CNN town hall and prepare for
the many fights ahead. I need you with me, now more than ever.

Trump’s campaign of disinformation and attacks on truth and decency are a
threat to everything we hold dear – and it’s up to us to fight back.

Thanks for standing with me today.

— Adam

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=may2023_abs_em.tUimEk&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230512_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1012&akid=2214%2E5257348%2ESQLHOJ ]Adam Schiff for Senate Banner

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1032?c0=may2023_abs_em.FKV_Cj&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230512_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1013&akid=2214%2E5257348%2ESQLHOJ ]DONATE MONTHLY

135 E. Olive Ave., #750 Burbank CA, 91502

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/60?t=1002&akid=2214%2E5257348%2ESQLHOJ ]www.adamschiff.com | [ mailto:contact@adamschiff.com ]contact@adamschiff.com | [ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/64?t=1003&akid=2214%2E5257348%2ESQLHOJ ]Privacy Policy

PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE

He called a police officer who defended Congress during the January 6th insurrection a “thug,” and denied the mob put his vice president’s life in danger. He refused to call Vladimir Putin a war criminal or to say who he wanted to win the war. And one day after a jury of Trump’s peers found him civilly liable for sexual misconduct in New York, he attacked the survivor he victimized and disgustingly made light of that civil ruling — and the audience laughed right along with him. I know it’s not the news you wanted to hear. It’s not the news that I wanted to deliver. But like it or not, Trump’s grip on the Republican Party is stronger than ever before. And given that he is by far the leading GOP candidate for president, the threat to our constitutional democracy is as great as ever. The people in the room with Trump, and his millions of supporters across the nation, have fully bought into his brand of lies, anger, and downright cruelty. I wish it were not so, but we have to do more than defeat Trump. We have to defeat the MAGA movement he started, and that remains fiercely loyal to him alone. So I’m going to need your help. Especially with the media giving him an open platform to continue to spread his lies and demagoguery. Nothing less than the future of our democracy is at stake. [ ]Derek, will you make a $10 contribution to my campaign right now to help us respond to Trump, fight back against MAGA Republicans, and win this campaign for U.S. Senate? If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: [ ]EXPRESS DONATE $10 [ ]EXPRESS DONATE $25 [ ]EXPRESS DONATE $50 [ ]EXPRESS DONATE $100 [ ]EXPRESS DONATE $250 [ ]ANOTHER AMOUNT I wish I could say that I was surprised at how CNN aired a town featuring Donald Trump and his many, many lies and falsehoods. For nearly two hours, Trump lied about the 2020 election, denigrated the reporter interviewing him, and played to his adoring crowd. It was a two-hour Trump infomercial. Have we learned nothing from 2016? Or 2020? Trump has literally called for my imprisonment over my efforts to hold him accountable during his first impeachment and to investigate the attack he incited on January 6th. He doesn’t want me in the Senate. He doesn’t want oversight or accountability. But that is what our system of government demands. And I need your help. [ ]Chip in $10 to help us respond to Trump’s CNN town hall and prepare for the many fights ahead. I need you with me, now more than ever. Trump’s campaign of disinformation and attacks on truth and decency are a threat to everything we hold dear – and it’s up to us to fight back. Thanks for standing with me today. — Adam [ ]Adam Schiff for Senate Banner [ ]DONATE MONTHLY 135 E. Olive Ave., #750 Burbank CA, 91502 [ ]www.adamschiff.com | [ mailto:contact@adamschiff.com ]contact@adamschiff.com | [ ]Privacy Policy PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:

subject: Mother’s Day Message
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MAHER FOR CONGRESS
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/maherforcongress/mothersday?e=1722d05e10)
---
| | [ ](https://michaelmaher.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6239b7d9cb3ad9388556be8be&id=cae6d3b6dc&e=1722d05e10)
---
| |
May 12, 2023

Dear Friend,

As many of you know, my husband Michael is running for Congress. However, I wanted to take the opportunity to send today’s update and wish all of you, especially my fellow moms, a very happy and blessed Mother’s Day weekend.

I plan on spending a wonderful weekend with Michael and our boys; there aren’t too many free weekends in a campaign, so I will appreciate and cherish every moment we get as a family.

I also thank you all for supporting and praying for Michael in his race for Congress. Your encouragement, donations, and help mean so much.

This Mother’s Day weekend, please spoil all the moms in your life. And if you can help Michael’s campaign with an [extra $10 or $20](https://michaelmaher.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6239b7d9cb3ad9388556be8be&id=8e1d288407&e=1722d05e10), too, that would wonderful.
---
| [Donate Today!](https://michaelmaher.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6239b7d9cb3ad9388556be8be&id=afc37bf38e&e=1722d05e10 "Donate Today!")
---
| Thank you again, and Happy Mother’s Day from our family to yours.

Sincerely,

Ann Maher
---
|
---
| _**Background** : Michael Maher is a former FBI Special Agent and US Navy Veteran who was raised in the Central Valley. Michael and his wife, Ann, are raising their young family in Fresno County, and he owns and operates an aviation business. Michael was the 2022 nominee for California's 21st Congressional District._

body:

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63218568/405984784/507660252?refcode2=d58cb76a-12f1-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&refcode=em230512-1-t2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNThjYjc2YS0xMmYxLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WkIs7ESXAhks2wdKD8bSliyBw7YSEzr3m7H0Nk4y4bY=&emci=5ee2cfd8-0df1-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=d58cb76a-12f1-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=16877361)
**THEN,** Robert made this happen:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63218569/405984785/507660252?refcode2=d58cb76a-12f1-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&refcode=em230512-1-t2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNThjYjc2YS0xMmYxLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WkIs7ESXAhks2wdKD8bSliyBw7YSEzr3m7H0Nk4y4bY=&emci=5ee2cfd8-0df1-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=d58cb76a-12f1-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=16877361)
**NEXT,** this news came out:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63218570/405984786/507660252?refcode2=d58cb76a-12f1-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&refcode=em230512-1-t2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNThjYjc2YS0xMmYxLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WkIs7ESXAhks2wdKD8bSliyBw7YSEzr3m7H0Nk4y4bY=&emci=5ee2cfd8-0df1-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=d58cb76a-12f1-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=16877361)
**NOW,** we need this action:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63218571/405984787/507660252?refcode2=d58cb76a-12f1-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&refcode=em230512-1-t2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNThjYjc2YS0xMmYxLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WkIs7ESXAhks2wdKD8bSliyBw7YSEzr3m7H0Nk4y4bY=&emci=5ee2cfd8-0df1-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=d58cb76a-12f1-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=16877361)
Robert has been at the forefront of fighting for accountability for George Santos and it’s time Congress act and expel him from the House. Our country can no longer be plagued by a congressman who was elected on the basis of fabrication and fraud, and one that has broken the law time and time again.
Allowing George Santos to continue serving will set a dangerous precedent that other candidates can fabricate their qualifications to voters without fear of punishment. That is a danger to our democratic process.
[**If you agree, please add your name in support of Robert's official resolution to expel George Santos from Congress. We need Congress to ACT.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63218572/405984788/507660252?refcode2=d58cb76a-12f1-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&refcode=em230512-1-t2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNThjYjc2YS0xMmYxLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WkIs7ESXAhks2wdKD8bSliyBw7YSEzr3m7H0Nk4y4bY=&emci=5ee2cfd8-0df1-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=d58cb76a-12f1-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=16877361)

Team, after more than **_50 YEARS_** of service to our nation, Dr. Anthony Fauci just received the most prestigious honor in public health!

Throughout the COVID-19 pandemic, Dr. Fauci's hard work combated misinformation and brought hope to millions of families. **We can't think of a more deserving recipient of this award.**

That’s why we're organizing a MASSIVE card to congratulate Dr. Fauci on this honor. But we need 49 more Democrats from Pennsylvania to sign on if we're going to hit our 50,000 signature goal -- and right now, your signature is missing!

**_Crime is at an all-time high, and safety is at an all-time LOW!_**

Liberals are sitting by while their cities are up in flames.

**_What happened to our country?_**

Our nation used to be a safe haven for differing ideas, a place where people could live out the **American Dream.**

Now, crime is rampant, children are being targeted by the Radical Left's agenda, and loving your country makes you a domestic terrorist.

clean_body: What happened? | Crime is at an all-time high, and safety is at an all-time LOW! Liberals are sitting by while their cities are up in flames. What happened to our country? Our nation used to be a safe haven for differing ideas, a place where people could live out the American Dream. Now, crime is rampant, children are being targeted by the Radical Left's agenda, and loving your country makes you a domestic terrorist. We NEED to restore honor to this country. We NEED to fight for her and for our freedoms. | Thank you, Patriot Alerts via Team Vance Conservative Outsider. Marine. Businessman. Author. Ohio needs a true conservative in the U.S. Senate. It needs someone who understands how our economic and government leaders conspire to make life harder for normal Americans. Ohio needs JD Vance. If you'd like to support our campaign, you can click below to make a donation. | | ---|---|--- Paid for by JD Vance For Senate Inc. Republicans are working around the clock to ban abortion, restrict voting rights, and block life-saving gun-safety legislation. They’re backed by far-right billionaires and Trump’s MAGA mob, but with enough grassroots support, we can give state Democrats the resources they need to go toe-to-toe with Republicans and WIN in special elections like these.
**If every Democrat reading this email chipped in $7, we’d be one step closer to stopping right-wing extremists from gaining more power in our state legislatures ahead of 2024.**
[Building strong Democratic power in the states is vital – and by securing victories in key races like these, we can lay the groundwork to expand our majorities in 2023, 2024, and beyond. All of these races are vital to electing state Democrats who will defend our democracy. The stakes are sky-high, and if Republicans win both races in PA, they could take back the House! That’s why grassroots Democrats nationwide are fired up and ready to meet this moment. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | Republicans are working around the clock to ban abortion, restrict voting rights, and block life-saving gun-safety legislation. They’re backed by far-right billionaires and Trump’s MAGA mob, but with enough grassroots support, we can give state Democrats the resources they need to go toe-to-toe with Republicans and WIN in special elections like these. If every Democrat reading this email chipped in $7, we’d be one step closer to stopping right-wing extremists from gaining more power in our state legislatures ahead of 2024. Let's do this! name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: A June 20th primary could decide whether or not Glenn Youngkin will have the votes to ban abortion in Virginia next year.
body:
Abortion at risk in Virginia
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tbcd2cdec-15ba-4991-8cb0-fe094ecf73d8/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, **[June 20th may determine if abortion remains legal in Virginia](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0bfe6b6a-1de6-4a95-8b74-2fd273a311f1/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9).**_ **Democrats control the VA State Senate by 2 votes, while Republicans have the governor & state house. Yet, it gets worse.** _**_One of the 2 Democrats, Joe Morrissey, has a history of sordid behavior and says he's a "pro-life" Democrat._ ** **_Morissey was *twice* disbarred as state prosecutor for fistfights and contempt of court citations. He was charged with "delinquency of a minor" for having a relationship with, and marrying, a 17-yr old law firm receptionist._** _Add in his will to control all women's bodies, and it's not surprising this happened:_ [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T507816e8-6286-4249-8c98-61857f04a8cd/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _We don't know how the November general election will go, we could lose pro-choice seats._ **_Yet, we can remove a morally bankrupt anti-choicer and replace him with former Delegate Lashrecse Aird. __Aird has made Abortion rights the centerpiece of their campaign with a "Roe Not Joe" tour around the district._** [_The primary's June 20th, but early voting has begun! If we want another crucial pro-choice vote from a Democratic district, _we must help Aird NOW_ , or risk Glenn Youngkin banning abortion next year. _**_Will you join Blue Amp's "Roe Not Joe," effort by supporting Lashrecse Aird with $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T156bb34f-007d-45c3-917d-0b90ac521749/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _We must remove anti-abortion extremists, even when they dress up as Democrats. _ Cliff
---
|
---
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | | | [**DONATE NOW**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4536a9dd-8d90-4f8b-b9e1-8bbb67342205/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

1776 Mentor Ave. #411 | Norwood, Ohio 45212
513.438.0171 | info@blueampaction.com
---
| Having trouble viewing this email? [View it in your web browser](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/vasenateprimary-aird-n?wvpId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | |
---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T148be3a6-e91c-4a51-ae24-2f66c5393954/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Joe Biden
subject: I'd love to give you a call soon
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
A few folks who donate through this email might get a call from me. | | |
---
Since my very first campaign, getting to talk one on one with supporters has been one of my favorite parts of running for office. Hearing your stories and your hopes for the future inspires me to keep going day after day. So, to show my sincere gratitude for each and every one of you who are helping build this campaign, my team is going to pick a few Founding Donors to get a call from me. **Will you pitch in $25 to become a Founding Donor to our campaign today? I’d love to get a chance to give you a call to say thanks.**

I wish I could personally thank each person who has pitched in to this campaign. That's the truth. But I do hope I get the chance to thank you, Peter.

clean_body: A few folks who donate through this email might get a call from me. | | | Since my very first campaign, getting to talk one on one with supporters has been one of my favorite parts of running for office. Hearing your stories and your hopes for the future inspires me to keep going day after day. So, to show my sincere gratitude for each and every one of you who are helping build this campaign, my team is going to pick a few Founding Donors to get a call from me. Will you pitch in $25 to become a Founding Donor to our campaign today? I’d love to get a chance to give you a call to say thanks. | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | I’m proud that every campaign I’ve ever run has been powered by grassroots donors, giving a few bucks at a time -- and this campaign is certainly no exception. I wish I could personally thank each person who has pitched in to this campaign. That's the truth. But I do hope I get the chance to thank you, Peter. From the bottom of my heart, thank you for everything you do. Joe Joe Biden | If you would like to unsubscribe from emails like these, Paid for by Biden for President.

name: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez
subject: I stand with Helen Gym
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Helen Gym
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hhg-april23-em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hhg-april23-em]
Something remarkable is happening in Philly.

Helen Gym, a community organizer, teacher, and former City Councilmember, is running an insurgent mayoral campaign against self-funding millionaires and the entrenched political establishment — and with only 4 days left, a new poll shows Helen with a razor-thin lead.

Can you chip in now to support Helen’s campaign in the final stretch? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hhg-gotv-fund]

Helen first made headlines in 2012, after Philly closed 23 public schools in a year. The Mayor at the time had slashed the city’s education budget and shuttered schools, libraries, rec centers, and fire departments, putting the safety and wellbeing of Philly’s most vulnerable communities at risk.

And do you know who was there at every turn fighting against school closures and winning back resources that community members needed to thrive? Helen Gym.

For over 30 years, Helen has stood up to the status quo and delivered results. When schools were understaffed and water fountains had lead in them, she stepped up to guarantee safe drinking water, nurses, and counselors in every school. When low-wage workers were being exploited, she passed legislation to guarantee reliable schedules. And when Philly had one of the highest rates of eviction in the country, Helen passed legislation that cut evictions by 70%.

I'm proud to support Helen Gym for mayor, because she’s running to return power where it belongs — in the hands of the community. Donate today to push Helen over the finish line on May 16!

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your contribution will go through immediately:

CHIP IN $15 NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hhg-gotv-fund?express_lane=true&amount=15]
CHIP IN $25 NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hhg-gotv-fund?express_lane=true&amount=25]

CHIP IN $50 NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hhg-gotv-fund?express_lane=true&amount=50]
CHIP IN $100 NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hhg-gotv-fund?express_lane=true&amount=100]

CHIP IN $250 NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hhg-gotv-fund?express_lane=true&amount=250]
ANOTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hhg-gotv-fund]

Just last week, a Super PAC funded by a rightwing billionaire who wants to destroy public education, and even funded the people responsible for the insurrection, started running false attack ads against her.

Like Helen, I've faced attacks from right-wing billionaires who want to close our schools, criminalize our youth, and deport our neighbors — all while lining their own pockets. I know what it’s like to be told that my ideas are 'too big' or 'too hard' and that 'it’s better to keep quiet.' And I also know that our power lies in our connections to each other, and that a burgeoning people-powered movement from Philly to New York to Chicago and beyond is going to transform the status quo that has held this country back for too long.

It will take all of us fighting together, in every city and in every corner of this country, to win the future we deserve — a future where housing is a human right, immigrant families are welcomed, workers are protected, and our communities are safe and vibrant.

It’s leaders like Helen who will help make that vision a reality. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hhg-gotv-fund]

Pa'lante,
Alexandria
Helen Gym is a Philly mom, a school teacher, a community organizer, and former City Councilmember. She has been fighting for Philly families and communities for decades — winning more resources for our schools, safer communities, and a more affordable Philadelphia. Our efforts are supported by everyday people like you who give what they can, whenever they can, because they want to see a safer, more prosperous, equitable Philadelphia that works for all of us. If you’d like to donate to Helen and help elect her as Philadelphia’s next Mayor, click here:
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hhg-em-feb2023]
Friends of Helen Gym
PO Box 11766
Philadelphia, PA 19101
United States
www.helengym.com [https://www.helengym.com/] | info@helengym.com [info@helengym.com]
Paid for by Friends of Helen Gym
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . If you wish to no longer receive these messages, please unsubscribe. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/Vi6mnRf0jkCnbZV_ILvlFQ2?unsubscribedata=spcQYPzS3bpCeivzIc8jleOYrR%2B6mj3gO0WS0B4GuLSZWI900Uz6nZ4DhhP6iB99Gc2O0jh5EKxXwtxUPzVVEUwv%2BTNQQqKbCqZ3MMszHqE3ETYuMfi3npG5R7MZzbB6FJALhtoDeRAm%2BlHQX%2FvdiEWBPZr6ybR2M%2BZRgpjYUx%2BDU4F05M3N%2FozE9bpMO9j7T94xCjpDj9CSxCYm3v1y%2FZHc4UqV7ujLNKIevyFnX8M3VioRd3qteVULog2R3uuG95Fs3kRauqi4HQcujNjDtjPV5AeglmD%2F7OxTfRkYroIaR1sYG8K%2BRVPuNC%2BK2RSjiRLW6CA929eF3sTLbtEmDLOdBnMQZaZ7HrlIJ9%2BDkf1Ue%2FIB1f%2Br4lAkOpO2cuplHRjIMd0XSqsISIAjKZDBxCUpzBqk9F7RVIAvPgu8dkCrvzzo63oEjcUbCp6qqvOq]

name: Sheriff Mark Lamb
subject: Tell Biden: NO VETO!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mark Lamb for Senate
body:
Open and please sign. Biden is putting my deputies in danger by threatening to VETO Republicans' border security bill.
[Unsubscribe](http://links.bestamericanow.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_s=e844f8f5d99743b8862627309ca01408&_t=xusKuRV37vgnOfHyppjoB388zk7ENr3NiRMBuC1GTFJI9t7L03AHjZpbnZ-jrRWH9OguX2HIg5Bebxp2BgyGb9Br-sucDcR8LsaHxQHPN3E%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.bestamericanow.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_s=e844f8f5d99743b8862627309ca01408&_t=xusKuRV37vgnOfHyppjoB388zk7ENr3NiRMBuC1GTFJI9t7L03AHjZpbnZ-jrRWH9OguX2HIg5Bebxp2BgyGb9Br-sucDcR8LsaHxQHPN3E%3D)

[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=e844f8f5d99743b8862627309ca01408&_e=3wq6JweMArKJODHWbBcr0wOMf1YSfMt-f0YEVBhJuTqvDl6WaxGemQ-eXg9qttI2RfuTqRXzpQSITGlWk584AGlmIl5-tUNPSMninpVqeWq0C2T9Ttq3F9SW9PoGrtGVQpTc84bwPqoFx0f-nKqtu12dHdTyLoLt0auNn7Cz3cRY3-FjweQERsJX0cRr07ni__ugBmXOiq-C9_9yqyJLodgU-G6G4Ju-zpfkwGLgXAjlTh2vQVJEPOS114Qyt-e2MLtkjiF4q2Lxm8Rd5-S5Q_fdXf6ANYI1EA4UBRZlI2xUirQkPGCrnrLYCyrC7xcBfOLpDg93Z2Fhkagja1c8YHNONwx6psEgAonM2l8HT0jTxHbCcjxGpUFgXOhfzC7I4P1iNY_d3RZjzgAwduY0w7a7spZazLHQVspK9AoOpFw%3D)
|
Peter,

This week, Republicans in the U.S. House are voting on legislation that would bring about some of the most stringent border security measures our country has ever known.

Against ALL common sense, **President Biden has promised to veto the bill.**

As an American, this makes me angry. **As the Sheriff of Arizona’s third largest county, it will make doing my job even harder than it already is.**

Why on earth would President Biden veto legislation that secures and protects the border?

**Because Republicans led the efforts to pass it**.

**As someone who has personally pulled the dead bodies of immigrants out of ditches, I cannot express my dismay at Biden’s failure to secure the border.**

As a candidate for the U.S. Senate and a Sheriff in my own right, **[I’m putting together a petition to send to President Biden urging him to let this border bill become law. I’m looking for 500 Americans to sign it right now](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=e844f8f5d99743b8862627309ca01408&_e=3wq6JweMArKJODHWbBcr0wOMf1YSfMt-f0YEVBhJuTqvDl6WaxGemQ-eXg9qttI2RfuTqRXzpQSITGlWk584AGlmIl5-tUNPSMninpVqeWq0C2T9Ttq3F9SW9PoGrtGVQpTc84bwPqoFx0f-nKqtu12dHdTyLoLt0auNn7Cz3cRY3-FjweQERsJX0cRr07ni__ugBmXOiq-C9_9yqyJLodgU-G6G4Ju-zpfkwGLgXAjlTh2vQVJEPOS114Qyt-e2MLtkjiF4q2Lxm8Rd5-S5Q-gYZw1gDXhydzgyB8cOgV6nsd4coZ55-NShJIoEfzPsb4lPpb0YTTV99WsXQCe4XiPm3bL-Nav3_pEGvwXVksRwrthxaRunZRrGyxeZKP3VokWeeALBaeqiV49nrQrtyf-KJnH2ctqlSld3iaxq5NQ%3D)**.

[**TELL BIDEN: DO NOT VETO THIS BILL ->**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=e844f8f5d99743b8862627309ca01408&_e=3wq6JweMArKJODHWbBcr0wOMf1YSfMt-f0YEVBhJuTqvDl6WaxGemQ-eXg9qttI2RfuTqRXzpQSITGlWk584AGlmIl5-tUNPSMninpVqeWq0C2T9Ttq3F9SW9PoGrtGVQpTc84bwPqoFx0f-nKqtu12dHdTyLoLt0auNn7Cz3cRY3-FjweQERsJX0cRr07ni__ugBmXOiq-C9_9yqyJLodgU-G6G4Ju-zpfkwGLgXAjlTh2vQVJEPOS114Qyt-e2MLtkjiF4q2Lxm8Rd5-S5Qy9_ILqc52-Y96gRDq_XKAkVPRgbqZtQlQd-jXgwk8LSfqACKbCpyXElDP0abl1ohQf_3OP9SQm2u8t2_7mSxogEKmlVXcdVh80g3TCnfeA2bLsWDHY9wIhlgNg75lkTfNWWX7v4vtyMW_gQe3V6Zw4%3D)

If you’re tired of people from all over the world treating our border like an imaginary line, will you **[join me in telling Biden he simply cannot veto Republicans’ border bill?](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=e844f8f5d99743b8862627309ca01408&_e=3wq6JweMArKJODHWbBcr0wOMf1YSfMt-f0YEVBhJuTqvDl6WaxGemQ-eXg9qttI2RfuTqRXzpQSITGlWk584AGlmIl5-tUNPSMninpVqeWq0C2T9Ttq3F9SW9PoGrtGVQpTc84bwPqoFx0f-nKqtu12dHdTyLoLt0auNn7Cz3cRY3-FjweQERsJX0cRr07ni__ugBmXOiq-C9_9yqyJLodgU-G6G4Ju-zpfkwGLgXAjlTh2vQVJEPOS114Qyt-e2MLtkjiF4q2Lxm8Rd5-S5Qz6mlTdIyCt0-YRrZJvxru51Fi6m-coCQUwxpU4arWTOwp3Q9zr6DriaUtG490H772g5nKC3nhRtwUTHG1lxiHOnu-gs1VuScuGtEDRkuBPB9EBO_j9rgz24V37BZLnXMkVYlBVlHMhdCC1hqWT7Wxc%3D)**

[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=e844f8f5d99743b8862627309ca01408&_e=3wq6JweMArKJODHWbBcr0wOMf1YSfMt-f0YEVBhJuTqvDl6WaxGemQ-eXg9qttI2RfuTqRXzpQSITGlWk584AGlmIl5-tUNPSMninpVqeWq0C2T9Ttq3F9SW9PoGrtGVQpTc84bwPqoFx0f-nKqtu12dHdTyLoLt0auNn7Cz3cRY3-FjweQERsJX0cRr07ni__ugBmXOiq-C9_9yqyJLodgU-G6G4Ju-zpfkwGLgXAjlTh2vQVJEPOS114Qyt-e2MLtkjiF4q2Lxm8Rd5-S5Q2shDp6TzNDnYWPV-Hjz1DpiirXTg-jQ-HBer-z6wzsL576Kz5AYNYNFdHChvsldkyIVIPS9Azd7gC6wfrHxLqD4Fqc-CM_8kq3m4IC1QOU38Rx1Z6d_6HaazTNhUE6A71R5O1rRvbjNpCu6kY91gl4%3D)

Peter, we must stop the invasion. It’s as simple as that.

We do that by sending law enforcement officials, who know a thing or two about quelling unrest, to replace Democrats in the Senate who can’t seem to figure out how to do their damn jobs.
**
[Thanks for standing with me today.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=e844f8f5d99743b8862627309ca01408&_e=3wq6JweMArKJODHWbBcr0wOMf1YSfMt-f0YEVBhJuTqvDl6WaxGemQ-eXg9qttI2RfuTqRXzpQSITGlWk584AGlmIl5-tUNPSMninpVqeWq0C2T9Ttq3F9SW9PoGrtGVQpTc84bwPqoFx0f-nKqtu12dHdTyLoLt0auNn7Cz3cRY3-FjweQERsJX0cRr07ni__ugBmXOiq-C9_9yqyJLodgU-G6G4Ju-zpfkwGLgXAjlTh2vQVJEPOS114Qyt-e2MLtkjiF4q2Lxm8Rd5-S5Q8-D-A45jU5iFi5Tku3cZtHtGGaw0rxwIY6ewbCCwsABp61dKA171TRLl7hD6AeXChOutexNll32BvnEb7CTCHOqDJKrzu-ddtXnNG7z0Vk1S32S7oCqvFPRiavxNynPhnnc-k1vAxShpUYkS1kPcIQ%3D) **

[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=e844f8f5d99743b8862627309ca01408&_e=3wq6JweMArKJODHWbBcr0wOMf1YSfMt-f0YEVBhJuTqvDl6WaxGemQ-eXg9qttI2RfuTqRXzpQSITGlWk584AGlmIl5-tUNPSMninpVqeWq0C2T9Ttq3F9SW9PoGrtGVQpTc84bwPqoFx0f-nKqtu12dHdTyLoLt0auNn7Cz3cRY3-FjweQERsJX0cRr07ni__ugBmXOiq-C9_9yqyJLodgU-G6G4Ju-zpfkwGLgXAjlTh2vQVJEPOS114Qyt-e2MLtkjiF4q2Lxm8Rd5-S5Q7kzN_fpbav8VvT5zmKNRaLqOhTSgn3lt6zvXf-hgiSSonS20tMp49PSY7IVL0JLuljSTe0lxe5tlNVPqHmZyYyZwLqIFKgEiD54N8QQk5G8l3L7Lc91q7HWRadrHKnHWIZfy_YYc2GOulnJ9OfTaqk%3D)
Sheriff Mark Lamb
Republican for U.S. Senate

**Follow Sheriff Lamb On Social Media**

[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=e844f8f5d99743b8862627309ca01408&_e=3wq6JweMArKJODHWbBcr08GnWzf41iQv3Yeo-I1x2R2J7JLmniOUwrfRYB3ASf7L804g_4fu7GtlCj001d-6rjhntDYzRykDSIFAoM-ZJtYg_7EwrVqQjYvxGF3aABlZvGLECKreBHsAqE9fYaLEDQqdBHV1-hIB44_2JTux2TlLi0xcCjDUYRcwHH-Ts6e0PT9uk_PW53pBgOLpNmt6i-Sy5R1HwuJubKEHc6eixm4%3D) [](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=e844f8f5d99743b8862627309ca01408&_e=3wq6JweMArKJODHWbBcr06LGC3ppnHnryfzp9vwH21Q45c0oMQ4_2CClgg3KnxuxA7eogQzqMU1TyN8xHrgSavm1Fjxh1fRXfHSgy8PTmOehieQEAQ5-l3RC2RCZZyJMig36yLogBDnli3rwmHJJwTw3xHnEbu1WxfmFXUGkZSfv11fgXzvZr9CsRVui6VvKbCkmdPuk-ozy8f3BhqA_sA%3D%3D) [](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=e844f8f5d99743b8862627309ca01408&_e=3wq6JweMArKJODHWbBcr0116mZI-qfvuHDjYDBF_CEXu5r605SNCiUyMzO0LURNXHFXXUqDZeG1cfc57Qv56Hyqw9EvGxBpAK4rfNOI_XcdMwTpDOFuVEivnNNRDAKE3HAhGkgEBNCnixeele2bkCYSVYvCce1u0D_-z-S4lpDqI_xGTZmyhlDoeDEWPCyQXUjXd6-mo9_xjQvHFF-bbX--aNrL3cT4T7eWGlS3V140%3D)

**Meet Sheriff Lamb:** | GOD. FAMILY. FREEDOM.

Sheriff Mark Lamb is a husband, father, grandfather, and God-fearing patriot. From Hawaii to Manila, Arizona, Mark Lamb's rich experirences inspired his life of service. As the 24th Sheriff of Pinal County, Arizona, he drives a powerful agenda to ensure community safety and prosperity.

Sheriff Lamb trained with the Maricopa County Sheriff's Office Deputy Academy and was named Valedictorian of his class. He was hired by the Salt River Pima-Maricopa Indian Community, where he excelled as a police officer and was named Rookie of the Year. The following year, he received the Officer of the Year award. He was later promoted as a Detective to the Gang Enforcement Unit and in his first year was named Detective of the Year.

name: Team Kennedy
subject: Campaign update
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM KENNEDY
body:
It's been three weeks since Robert F. Kennedy Jr. announced his candidacy and the reception has been electric, with multiple polls clocking his support upwards of 20% right out the gate.

| [ ](http://www.kennedy24.com/?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=general_news_update_1&n=1)
---
Peter -- It's been three weeks since [**Robert F. Kennedy, Jr.**](https://www.kennedy24.com/?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=general_news_update_1&n=2)**announced his candidacy** and the reception has been electric, with multiple polls clocking his support upwards of 20% right out the gate. This may come as no surprise to you, given your early commitment to the cause, but it's certainly surprising to the powers that be. RFK, Jr. has been on podcasts and television network shows nearly every day since the inception of the campaign. You can read and watch the [**interviews**](https://www.kennedy24.com/interviews?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=general_news_update_1&n=3)**on**[**Kennedy24.com**](https://www.kennedy24.com/?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=general_news_update_1&n=4)**.** Here are a few that have been particularly popular: [**All In podcast**](https://www.kennedy24.com/presidential_candidate_robert_f_kennedy_jr_conversation_besties_all_in?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=general_news_update_1&n=5) [**Russell Brand**](https://www.kennedy24.com/russell_rfk_jr_fauci_cia_secrets_running_for_president?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=general_news_update_1&n=6) [**CNN: Michael Smerconish**](https://www.kennedy24.com/cnn-michael-smerconish-robert-kennedy-jr?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=general_news_update_1&n=7) [**Megyn Kelly**](https://www.kennedy24.com/megyn_kelly_interview_of_rfk_jr?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=general_news_update_1&n=8) You may notice that most of these interviews are on alternative media and podcasts. That showcases just how important it is for us to bypass traditional media and reach people directly through word-of-mouth. **That's where we need your help.** Share your belief in the Kennedy message with friends, family, and community. Over dinner, on social media, by email, or by text. Send links to [**RFK, Jr.’s interviews**](https://www.kennedy24.com/interviews?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=general_news_update_1&n=9). Follow him on [**Twitter**](https://www.kennedy24.com/r?u=YqgukYA3Mrlri-dqG7I8TvJMDEmDChn4crVEdym-uYEvPdkFBV9SaYXx39MwIdLI&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=general_news_update_1&n=10). Share the [**launch video**](https://www.kennedy24.com/campaign_launch_video?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=general_news_update_1&n=11) or [**announcement speech**](https://www.kennedy24.com/historic_presidential_announcement_in_boston_ma?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=general_news_update_1&n=12). Tell people why you are supporting Robert F. Kennedy Jr. for President. And if you feel really inspired, **please**[**donate**](https://www.kennedy24.com/support?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=general_news_update_1&n=13)**to the campaign.** Sincerely, Team Kennedy

---
_He’s right!_ Across the country, we’re seeing escalated attacks on our democratic institutions as Republicans restrict voting rights, force through gerrymandered maps, undermine our system of checks and balances, and more.

**We’ll be blunt, team: The future of free and fair elections in our country depends on how we respond to this ongoing threat.** A.G. Holder put it perfectly:
“We have to win elections . . . people have to be engaged, and progressives and Democrats **have to play the long game** – this is not something that can be episodic.

**If we want to have democracy, we have to do democracy**.”
---
_He’s right about that, too._ For years, Republicans have used anti-democratic tactics to horde unearned power and undermine the will of the voters. To defeat them and deliver power back to the people, those of us who believe in democracy must be prepared to stay in this fight for the long haul – no matter how long it takes.
[**_The NDRC is 100% committed to continuing our fight for fairness nationwide. Will you help us do democracy by making a donation of any amount today?_**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63219835/405989167/2067580287?amount=30&refcode=EM_RTI_20230512_FR_5P_redlight922_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjkyYWJjM2NjLTFhZjEtZWQxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=FkMGkA3R2YngouCIOKzkvJmGMx1el4S1QWsAEIIz2vU=)

clean_body: | Team – when Attorney General Eric Holder appeared on All in with Chris Hayes on MSNBC, he had a clear message about what we must do to combat the ongoing threat of GOP extremism. | = = He’s right! Across the country, we’re seeing escalated attacks on our democratic institutions as Republicans restrict voting rights, force through gerrymandered maps, undermine our system of checks and balances, and more. We’ll be blunt, team: The future of free and fair elections in our country depends on how we respond to this ongoing threat. A.G. Holder put it perfectly: “We have to win elections . . . people have to be engaged, and progressives and Democrats have to play the long game – this is not something that can be episodic. If we want to have democracy, we have to do democracy.” He’s right about that, too. For years, Republicans have used anti-democratic tactics to horde unearned power and undermine the will of the voters. To defeat them and deliver power back to the people, those of us who believe in democracy must be prepared to stay in this fight for the long haul – no matter how long it takes. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = – The NDRC = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete.
